Motivation: 现有联邦LoRA直接平均LoRA因子存在表示依赖问题：同一内在更新有无限多种规范等价的分解方式，因子级聚合会因坐标选择变化而改变，导致语义不匹配。

Method: GLoRA提出规范感知的服务器表示：从客户端投影仪估计共识更新子空间，在共享参考坐标系中聚合客户端更新，完全以低秩形式表示语义更新聚合；并提供秩兼容读取接口，支持从同一服务器状态实例化不同秩的适配器。

Result: 在GLUE和SuperNI上，GLoRA在数据、资源和任务异质性场景下（包括异构客户端秩、稀疏参与、更大骨干网络、未见任务评估）一致优于联邦LoRA基线，且实现了良好的效率-性能权衡。

Conclusion: 有效的联邦LoRA不仅需要平均低秩因子，更需要定义语义上有意义的服务器端表示进行聚合。

Abstract: Federated LoRA enables parameter-efficient adaptation of large language models under decentralized data and limited client resources.However, directly averaging LoRA factors is representation-dependent: the same intrinsic update admits infinitely many gauge-equivalent factorizations, so factor-level aggregation can change under arbitrary coordinate choices while the underlying update remains unchanged. This reveals a semantic mismatch in existing federated LoRA aggregation rules. We propose \textbf{GLoRA}, a gauge-aware server representation for federated LoRA.Instead of aggregating raw factors, GLoRA estimates a consensus update subspace from client projectors and aggregates client updates in shared reference coordinates, thereby representing semantic update aggregation entirely in low-rank form. To support heterogeneous client capacities, GLoRA further provides a rank-compatible readout that instantiates adapters of different ranks from the same server state without dense update reconstruction. Experiments on GLUE and SuperNI show that GLoRA consistently outperforms federated LoRA baselines under data, resource, and task heterogeneity, including heterogeneous client ranks, sparse participation, larger backbones, and unseen-task evaluation. GLoRA also achieves a favorable efficiency--performance trade-off, suggesting that effective federated LoRA requires not merely averaging low-rank factors, but defining a semantically meaningful server-side representation for aggregation.

</details>


### [327] [Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06734)
*Kuo-Chung Peng,Samuel Yen-Chi Chen,Jiun-Cheng Jiang,Chen-Yu Liu,En-Jui Kuo,Yun-Yuan Wang,Prayag Tiwari,Andrea Ceschini,Chi-Sheng Chen,Yu-Chao Hsu,Chun-Hua Lin,Tai-Yue Li,Antonello Rosato,Massimo Panella,Simon See,Saif Al-Kuwari,Kuan-Cheng Chen,Nan-Yow Chen,Hsi-Sheng Goan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种结合快速权重编程与量子启发式KAN的轻量级时序模型，仅用单量子比特电路实现，在NISQ设备上可部署，以12.5k参数超越13倍参数量的经典循环网络。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有量子快速权重编程依赖多量子比特架构，在NISQ设备上难以扩展且经典模拟成本高，亟需更轻量、可部署的量子启发式方案。

Method: 提出gated QKAN-FWP框架：1) 采用单量子比特数据重上传电路（DARUAN）作为可学习非线性激活；2) 引入标量门控快速权重更新规则，稳定参数演化；3) 结合量子启发式KAN进行时序建模。

Result: 在528月输入、132月预测的长时序太阳周期预测任务中，12.5k参数模型在MSE、峰值幅度误差和峰值时序误差上均优于LSTM（25.9k-89.1k）、WaveNet-LSTM（167k）、Vanilla RNN（11.5k）和Echo State Network（132k）。在IonQ和IBM量子处理器上部署，1024次采样下与无噪声模拟器的相对MSE误差仅0.1%。

Conclusion: gated QKAN-FWP是一种可扩展、参数高效且兼容NISQ的量子启发式序列建模方法。

Abstract: Fast Weight Programmers (FWPs) encode temporal dependencies through dynamically updated parameters rather than recurrent hidden states. Quantum FWPs (QFWPs) extend this idea with variational quantum circuits (VQCs), but existing implementations rely on multi-qubit architectures that are difficult to scale on noisy intermediate-scale quantum (NISQ) devices and expensive to simulate classically. We propose gated QKAN-FWP, a fast-weight framework that integrates FWP with Quantum-inspired Kolmogorov-Arnold Network (QKAN) using single-qubit data re-uploading circuits as learnable nonlinear activation, known as DatA Re-Uploading ActivatioN (DARUAN). We further introduce a scalar-gated fast-weight update rule that stabilizes parameter evolution, supported by a theoretical analysis of its adaptive memory kernel, geometric boundedness, and parallelizable gradient paths. We evaluate the framework across time-series benchmarks, MiniGrid reinforcement learning, and highlight real-world solar cycle forecasting as our main practical result. In the long-horizon setting with 528-month input window and 132-month forecast horizon, our 12.5k-parameter model achieves lower scaled Mean Square Error (MSE), peak amplitude error, and peak timing error than a suite of classical recurrent baselines with up to 13x more parameters, including Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) networks (25.9k-89.1k parameters), WaveNet-LSTM (167k), Vanilla recurrent neural network (11.5k), and a Modified Echo State Network (132k). To validate NISQ compatibility, we further deploy the trained fast programmer on IonQ and IBM Quantum processors, recovering forecasting accuracy within 0.1% relative MSE of the noiseless simulator at 1024 shots. These results position gated QKAN-FWP as a scalable, parameter-efficient, and NISQ-compatible approach to quantum-inspired sequence modeling.

</details>


### [328] [STDA-Net: Spectrogram-Based Domain Adaptation for cross-dataset Sleep Stage Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06736)
*Unaza Tallal,Shruti Kshirsagar,Ankita Shukla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出STDA-Net框架，利用2D频谱图+CNN、双向LSTM和领域对抗网络，在无监督域适应下实现跨数据集睡眠分期，在三个公开数据集上平均准确率89.03%，宏F1-score 87.64%，优于传统1D方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同数据集的EEG通道配置、采样率、记录环境和受试人群存在差异，现有跨数据集方法多依赖一维EEG信号，二维频谱图结合无监督域适应的方法尚未被充分探索。

Method: 提出STDA-Net框架，包含三个模块：CNN提取频谱图特征、BiLSTM建模睡眠时序动态、DANN实现源域到目标域的特征对齐（无需目标域标签）。

Result: 在Sleep-EDF、SHHS-1、SHHS-2三个数据集六种跨域设置下，平均准确率89.03%，宏F1-score 87.64%，一致优于1D基线方法，且五次独立运行方差更低，稳定性和可重复性更好。

Conclusion: 2D频谱图表达结合时序建模与对抗域适应，为跨数据集睡眠分期提供了一种稳健且具有竞争力的替代方案。

Abstract: Accurate sleep stage classification across datasets remains challenging due to variability in EEG channel montages, sampling rates, recording environments, and subject populations. Although deep learning has shown considerable promise for automated sleep staging, most existing cross-dataset methods rely on one-dimensional EEG signal representations, whereas the use of two-dimensional spectrogram-based inputs within an unsupervised domain adaptation framework has remained largely unexplored. Here, we propose STDA-Net (Spectrogram-based Temporal Domain Adaptation Network), a framework that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) for spectrogram-based feature extraction, a bidirectional long short-term memory (BiLSTM) module for temporal modeling of sleep dynamics, and a domain-adversarial neural network (DANN) for source-to-target feature alignment without requiring any labeled target-domain data during training. Experiments are conducted on three publicly available datasets Sleep-EDF, SHHS-1, and SHHS-2 under six cross-dataset transfer settings. Results show that the proposed framework achieves an average accuracy of 89.03% and an average macro F1-score of 87.64%, consistently outperforming existing 1D baseline methods in terms of balanced classification performance, with substantially lower variance across five independent runs, indicating improved stability and reproducibility. Overall, these findings demonstrate that 2D spectrogram-based representations, combined with temporal modeling and adversarial domain adaptation, provide a robust and competitive alternative to conventional 1D EEG inputs for cross-dataset sleep staging.

</details>


### [329] [Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06740)
*Abhijit Sen,Bikram Keshari Parida,Giridas Maiti,Mahima Arya,Denys I. Bondar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出几何KAN（GeoKAN），通过学习对角黎曼度量对输入进行几何自适应变形，使KAN在非均匀、陡峭等复杂科学问题上更高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准KAN在固定欧氏坐标下进行逼近，缺乏对输入空间几何结构的感知能力，难以自适应地分配表示分辨率以应对科学机器学习中常见的陡峭、局部化、高度非均匀的问题。

Method: GeoKAN通过学习一个对角黎曼度量来"扭曲"输入空间，实现基展开和特征混合前的几何自适应坐标变换。基于此框架提出了三个变体：GeoKAN-NNMetric、GeoKAN-γ和LM-KAN（进一步包含RBF、Wav、Fourier三种基版本）。

Result: 在变分剧烈、非均匀性强的科学问题上，GeoKAN相比标准KAN能更好地将模型容量分配到关键区域，提升了逼近效率和精度。

Conclusion: GeoKAN通过几何归纳偏置（局部长度缩放和体积畸变）有效增强了KAN在科学机器学习与物理信息学习中的表现，尤其适用于尖锐、刚硬、局部化和强非均匀的微分方程问题。

Abstract: We introduce Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks (GeoKANs), a family of geometry-aware KAN-type models in which approximation is carried out in learned, geometry-adapted coordinates rather than in fixed Euclidean input coordinates. GeoKAN achieves this by learning a diagonal Riemannian metric that warps the input before basis expansion and feature mixing. The learned metric provides a geometric inductive bias through local length scaling and volume distortion, and in physics-informed settings it also affects the differential structure seen by the model. Within this framework, we develop three main variants, namely GeoKAN-NNMetric, GeoKAN-$γ$, and LM-KAN. For LM-KAN, we further consider three basis-specific versions, LM-KAN-RBF, LM-KAN-Wav, and LM-KAN-Fourier. These variants allow us to study geometry-aware KAN models both as general function approximators and as surrogates in physics-informed learning. By stretching regions with rapid variation and compressing smoother regions, GeoKAN reallocates representational resolution in a task-dependent manner, allowing the model to place capacity where it is most needed. As a result, GeoKAN is well suited to sharp, stiff, localized, and strongly non-uniform regimes arising in scientific machine learning and differential-equation problems.

</details>


### [330] [A Closed-Form Upper Bound for Admissible Learning-Rate Steps in Belief-Space Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06741)
*Zixi Li,Youzhen Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出学习率步长并非超参数，而是可以通过局部置信空间计算得出的公式化上限，该上限由KL/Bregman几何中的收缩性条件决定。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上将学习率步长视为需要手动调优的超参数，缺乏理论指导。

Method: 将参数更新建模为概率单纯形上的投影前向步骤，利用KL/Bregman几何中的收缩性（contractivity）条件推导可接受步长的上界公式。

Result: 可接受步长的上界不是经验调优的口号，而是有闭式解的公式。

Conclusion: 学习率步长可以从理论上精确计算，无需作为超参数进行手动调节。

Abstract: Learning-rate steps are usually treated as hyperparameters. This paper isolates a local beliefspace calculation: when an update is modeled as a projected forward step on the probability simplex, admissibility means contractivity in the natural KL/Bregman geometry. Under this model, the upper bound of an admissible step is not a tuning slogan but a formula.

</details>


### [331] [Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06755)
*Ismam Nur Swapnil,Aranya Saha,Tanvir Ahmed Khan,Mohammad Ariful Haque,Ser-Nam Lim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GXPO提出了一种仅需三次反向传播即可近似多步前瞻的策略更新方法，替代标准GRPO的单步更新，在数学推理任务上提升pass@1达+1.65~+5.00点，并实现最高4倍步数加速。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准GRPO仅使用当前步信息更新模型，而多步前瞻虽能提供更优更新方向但计算成本过高（需大量反向传播）。GXPO旨在以极低的计算开销近似多步前瞻收益。

Method: GXPO在活跃阶段仅用三次反向传播：先执行两次快速优化步，测量梯度变化，预测虚拟K步前瞻点，将策略部分移向该点，再在新位置用真实梯度进行修正更新。不稳定时自动回退到标准单步GRPO。

Result: 在Qwen2.5和Llama的数学推理实验中，GXPO相比GRPO提升pass@1 +1.65~+5.00点；相比最强SFPO提升+0.14~+1.28点；达到GRPO峰值精度时，最多实现4.00倍步数加速、2.33倍时间加速和1.33倍反向传播加速。

Conclusion: GXPO是一种即插即用的GRPO替代更新规则，通过近似多步前瞻在几乎不增加计算成本的前提下显著提升推理模型性能与训练效率。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning is widely used to improve the reasoning ability of large language models, especially when answers can be automatically checked. Standard GRPO-style training updates the model using only the current step, while full multi-step lookahead can give a better update direction but is too expensive because it needs many backward passes. We propose Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization (GXPO), a plug-compatible policy-update rule for GRPO-style reasoning RL. GXPO approximates a longer local lookahead using only three backward passes during an active phase. It reuses the same batch of rollouts, rewards, advantages, and GRPO loss, so it does not require new rollouts or reward computation at the lookahead points. GXPO takes two fast optimizer steps, measures how the gradients change, predicts a virtual K-step lookahead point, moves the policy partway toward that point, and then applies a corrective update using the true gradient at the new position. When the lookahead signal becomes unstable, GXPO automatically switches back to standard single-pass GRPO. We also give a plain-gradient-descent surrogate analysis that explains when the extrapolation is exact and where its local errors come from. Across Qwen2.5 and Llama math-reasoning experiments, GXPO improves the average sampled pass@1 by +1.65 to +5.00 points over GRPO and by +0.14 to +1.28 points over the strongest SFPO setting, while keeping the active-phase cost fixed at three backward passes. It also achieves up to 4.00x step speedup, 2.33x wall-clock speedup, and 1.33x backward-pass speedup in reaching GRPO's peak accuracy.

</details>


### [332] [Physics-based Digital Twins for Integrated Thermal Energy Systems Using Active Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06756)
*Umme Mahbuba Nabila,Paul Seurin,Linyu Lin,Majdi I. Radaideh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种主动学习框架，结合Modelica系统仿真与四种简化代理模型（SINDyC、MvG-SINDyC、FNN、GRU），通过模型特定的主动学习采样策略，在热能量分配系统的实时监督控制中，仅需随机采样所需五分之一轨迹即可达到可比精度。其中GRU预测精度最高，SINDyC计算效率与可解释性最优，MvG-SINDyC支持不确定性量化且计算增益最大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 高保真仿真计算成本高昂，纯数据驱动代理模型鲁棒性不足，现有方法难以同时满足热能量分配系统数字孪生对精确性、可解释性、不确定性感知以及数据与计算效率的要求。

Method: 提出主动学习框架，将系统级Modelica仿真与四种代理模型（确定性SINDyC、概率性MvG-SINDyC、FNN、GRU）耦合；针对不同模型设计特定采样策略（MvG-SINDyC采用系数空间马氏距离采样，其余采用预测空间误差采样），优先选择动态信息丰富的轨迹进行学习。

Result: 在INL的TEDS系统的乙二醇换热器子系统中，主动学习框架在旁路质量流量和热传递率两个关键输出上，仅需随机采样五分之一的仿真轨迹即达可比精度；GRU预测保真度最高，SINDyC计算效率与可解释性最佳，MvG-SINDyC在主动学习下计算增益最大并能进行不确定性量化。

Conclusion: 所提主动学习框架能有效平衡精度与效率，适用于热能量分配系统的实时监督控制；不同代理模型各有优势，可根据实际需求选择（追求精度选GRU，追求效率与可解释性选SINDyC，需要不确定性量化选MvG-SINDyC）。

Abstract: Real-time supervisory control of thermal energy distribution systems requires digital twins that are accurate, interpretable, and uncertainty-aware, yet remain data and computationally efficient. High-fidelity simulations alone are costly, while purely data-driven surrogates often lack robustness. To address these challenges, this work proposes an active learning (AL) framework that couples system-level Modelica simulations with four simpler physics-informed and data-driven surrogate modeling approaches: deterministic Sparse Identification of Nonlinear Dynamics with Control (SINDyC), its probabilistic multivariate-Gaussian extension (MvG-SINDyC), feedforward neural network (FNN), and gated recurrent unit (GRU) network. Tailored to each surrogate, model-specific AL query strategies are employed, including Mahalanobis-distance sampling in coefficient space for MvG-SINDyC and error-based sampling in prediction space for SINDyC, FNN, and GRU, allowing the learning process to prioritize dynamically informative trajectories.
  The proposed approach is demonstrated on the glycol heat exchanger (GHX) subsystem of the Thermal Energy Distribution System (TEDS) at Idaho National Laboratory. Across key GHX outputs--the bypass mass flow rate $\dot{m}_{\mathrm{GHX}}$ and heat transfer rate $Q_{\mathrm{GHX}}$-the AL framework achieves comparable predictive accuracy using as few as one-fifth of the simulation trajectories required by random sampling. Among the evaluated surrogates, the GRU achieves the highest predictive fidelity, while SINDyC remains the most computationally efficient and interpretable. The probabilistic MvG-SINDyC surrogate further enables uncertainty quantification and exhibits the largest computational gains under AL.

</details>


### [333] [Sparse Attention as a Range Searching Problem: Towards an Inference-Efficient Index for KV Cache](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06763)
*Mohsen Dehghankar,Abolfazl Asudeh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Louver，一种基于半空间范围搜索的稀疏注意力索引结构，能在保证零假阴性（即不遗漏关键KV条目）的前提下高效检索，兼具理论保证与硬件优化，在准确率和运行速度上均优于现有稀疏注意力方法和FlashAttention。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有稀疏注意力方法虽然提高了LLM推理效率，但存在遗漏关键KV条目导致精度骤降的问题，尤其在长推理任务中，重要token集随解码步骤动态变化。现有方法缺乏对零假阴性的理论保证，无法确保召回所有高于阈值的关键键。

Method: 将稀疏注意力重新形式化为半空间范围搜索问题，并设计了Louver索引结构。该结构：(i) 在理论与实践中保证指定阈值下的零假阴性；(ii) 轻量级，易于集成到现有LLM流程；(iii) 包含CPU和GPU的硬件感知优化。

Result: 实验表明，Louver在准确率和运行时间上均优于现有稀疏注意力方法，且比高度优化的密集注意力（如FlashAttention）更快。

Conclusion: 召回保证是稀疏注意力中一个被忽视的关键维度，Louver开辟了构建具有理论保证的高效KV缓存索引的新方向。

Abstract: Sparse attention improves LLM inference efficiency by selecting a subset of key-value entries, but at the cost of potential accuracy degradation. In particular, omitting critical KV entries can induce substantial errors in model outputs. Existing methods typically operate under fixed or adaptive token budgets and provide empirical robustness or partial theoretical guarantees, yet they do not ensure zero false negatives in decoding steps, particularly since the set of relevant tokens is both query- and step-dependent. Our empirical observations confirm that missing even one critical key can lead to sharp error spikes, especially in long reasoning tasks where the set of important tokens varies throughout decoding. This observation motivates the need for indexing methods that dynamically adapt to these variations across decoding steps while guaranteeing a full recall of the relevant keys above a certain threshold. We address this challenge by reformulating sparse attention as the halfspace range searching problem. However, existing range searching indices are not suitable for modern LLM inference due to their computational and implementation overheads. To overcome this, we introduce Louver, a novel index structure tailored for efficient KV cache retrieval. Louver (i) guarantees zero false negatives with respect to a specified threshold in both theory and practice, (ii) is lightweight to integrate into existing LLM pipelines, and (iii) incorporates hardware-aware optimizations for both CPU and GPU executions. Our experiments demonstrate that Louver outperforms prior sparse attention methods in both accuracy and runtime, and is faster than highly optimized dense attentions such as FlashAttention. These results highlight that recall guarantees are a critical and overlooked dimension of sparse attention, and open a new direction for building theoretically grounded, efficient KV cache indices.

</details>


### [334] [Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06764)
*Florin Gogianu,Adrian Catalin Lutu,Razvan Pascanu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新审视了无经验回放的在线深度强化学习，发现传统DQN和C51算法在此设置下表现良好，并揭示了两个关键特性：目标导数有界和权重更新的方差调整。基于这些发现，提出了Adaptive Q(λ)算法，在55个Atari游戏上超越现有方法，接近两倍人类基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 打破深度强化学习长期依赖经验回放或并行采样的范式，探索在不显式存储交互序列的情况下，能否实现更简单、高效且自适应的在线学习算法。

Method: 1) 分析DQN和C51等传统算法在纯在线环境下的表现；2) 研究优化算法（尤其是Adam）与在线更新的交互机制；3) 识别出两个关键特性：目标函数导数有界性和权重更新的方差调整；4) 基于这些洞察，提出了结合资格迹的方差调整算法Adaptive Q(λ)。

Result: 1) 传统DQN和C51在纯在线设置下表现良好；2) C51因兼具两个关键特性（导数有界+方差调整）与StreamQ竞争；3) Adaptive Q(λ)在55个Atari游戏上超越所有现有方法，接近两倍人类基线。

Conclusion: 在线深度强化学习无需依赖经验回放也能取得优异性能，关键在于目标函数的导数有界性和权重更新的方差调整。基于此设计的Adaptive Q(λ)实现了更优的在线学习效果。

Abstract: Learning from a sequence of interactions, as soon as observations are perceived and acted upon, without explicitly storing them, holds the promise of simpler, more efficient and adaptive algorithms. For over a decade, however, deep reinforcement learning walked the contrary path, augmenting agents with replay buffers or parallel sampling routines, in an effort to tame learning instability. Recently, this topic has been revisited by Elsayed et al. (2024), focusing on update computation through eligibility traces and modifications to the optimisation routine, resulting in the StreamQ algorithm. In this work we take a step back, investigating the efficacy of established updates, such as those implemented by DQN and C51 within this online setting. Not only do we find that they perform well, but through analysing how the optimisation algorithm generally, and Adam in particular, interacts with these updates, we contend that two properties are essential for robust performance: i) the derivative of the objective is to be bounded and ii) weight updates are variance-adjusted. Rigorous and exhaustive experimentation demonstrates that C51, which exhibits both characteristics, is competitive with StreamQ across a subset of 55 Atari games. Using these insights, we derive a variance-adjusted algorithm based on eligibility traces, termed Adaptive Q$(λ)$, which approaches double the human baseline on the same subset, surpassing existing methods by all performance metrics.

</details>


### [335] [Distributional Process Reward Models: Calibrated Prediction of Future Rewards via Conditional Optimal Transport](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06785)
*Rachel Ma,Dylan Hadfield-Menell,Kristjan Greenewald*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次将条件最优传输（CondOT）用于过程奖励模型（PRM）的校准，通过估计条件分位数函数来修正PRM对成功概率的高估问题，在数学推理基准上显著提升了校准效果和下游Best-of-N性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有过程奖励模型（PRM）在校准上存在缺陷，往往高估成功概率，影响推理时扩展方法的可靠性。

Method: 改进条件最优传输（CondOT）映射学习方法，用于估计PRM隐藏状态条件下、对PRM估计成功概率的单调条件分位数函数，从而得到结构有效的分位数估计和置信区间。

Result: 在MATH-500和AIME基准上，对于排序信号可靠的PRM，校准效果显著优于未校准PRM和分位数回归；下游Best-of-N IAS性能整体优于未校准PRM。

Conclusion: 条件最优传输为PRM校准提供了一种有理论保障且实用的新方法，能灵活地提供不确定性估计。

Abstract: Inference-time scaling methods rely on Process Reward Models (PRMs), which are often poorly calibrated and overestimate success probabilities. We propose, to our knowledge, the first use of conditional optimal transport for calibrating PRMs, modifying conditional OT (CondOT) map learning \cite{bunne2022supervised} to estimate a monotonic conditional quantile function over success probabilities estimated by the PRM, conditioned on PRM hidden states. This yields structurally valid quantile estimates and enables efficient extraction of confidence bounds at arbitrary levels, which we integrate into the instance-adaptive scaling (IAS) framework of \cite{park2025know}. We evaluate on mathematical reasoning benchmarks spanning moderate-difficulty problems (MATH-500) and harder out-of-distribution problems (AIME). For PRMs with reliable ranking signals, our method substantially improves calibration over both uncalibrated PRMs and quantile regression. On downstream Best-of-N IAS performance, our method generally improves over uncalibrated PRMs. These results establish conditional optimal transport as another principled and practical approach to PRM calibration, offering structural guarantees and flexible uncertainty estimation.

</details>


### [336] [Conformal Agent Error Attribution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06788)
*Naihe Feng,Yi Sui,Shiyi Hou,Ga Wu,Jesse C. Cresswell*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种基于共形预测（CP）的多智能体系统（MAS）错误归因框架，通过过滤式CP算法生成连续序列预测集，实现精确的错误定位和系统回滚恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多智能体系统（MAS）失败时，识别决定性错误发生的位置是自动化恢复的关键第一步。但基于LLM的MAS会产生长交互轨迹，使得错误归因成为基本挑战。

Method: 基于共形预测（CP）构建错误归因框架，提出针对序列数据（如智能体轨迹）的过滤式CP新算法，生成连续序列预测集以实现高效调试和恢复。

Result: 在多种智能体和数据集上验证了理论保证，表明错误可以被精确隔离，并利用预测集回滚MAS以自行纠正错误。

Conclusion: 该方法具有模型无关性，为MAS错误归因提供了原则性的不确定性层，并已开源代码。

Abstract: When multi-agent systems (MAS) fail, identifying where the decisive error occurred is the first step for automated recovery to an earlier state. Error attribution remains a fundamental challenge due to the long interaction traces that large language model-based MAS generate. This paper presents a framework for error attribution based on conformal prediction (CP) which provides finite-sample, distribution-free coverage guarantees. We introduce new algorithms for filtration-based CP designed for sequential data such as agent trajectories. Unlike existing CP algorithms, our approach predicts sets that are contiguous sequences to enable efficient recovery and debugging. We verify our theoretical guarantees on a variety of agents and datasets, show that errors can be precisely isolated, then use prediction sets to rollback MAS to correct their own errors. Our overall approach is model-agnostic, and offers a principled uncertainty layer for MAS error attribution. We release code at https://github.com/layer6ai-labs/conformal-agent-error-attribution.

</details>


### [337] [MIND: Monge Inception Distance for Generative Models Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06797)
*Quentin Berthet,Yu-Han Wu,Clement Crepy,Romuald Elie,Klaus Greff,Michael Eli Sander*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出Monge Inception Distance (MIND) 作为生成模型评估新指标，利用切片 Wasserstein 距离替代 FID 的高维协方差估计，在样本效率、计算速度和对抗鲁棒性上显著优于 FID。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: FID 依赖高维均值和协方差矩阵估计，存在样本效率低、计算成本高、易受对抗攻击（如矩匹配）等局限性。

Method: 采用切片 Wasserstein 距离，通过排序高效计算一维最优传输距离的平均值，避免高维协方差矩阵的显式估计。

Result: MIND 在样本效率上提升一个数量级（5k 样本等效 FID 的 50k 样本），计算速度提升两个数量级，对矩匹配攻击更具鲁棒性，且与 FID 高度相关、区分性能更优。

Conclusion: MIND 可作为 FID 的高效且鲁棒替代方案，尤其适用于小样本快速迭代场景（如 1k-2k 样本仍具信息量）。

Abstract: We propose the Monge Inception Distance (MIND), a metric for evaluating generative models that addresses key limitations of the widely adopted Fréchet Inception Distance (FID). The MIND metric leverages the sliced Wasserstein distance to compare distributions by averaging one-dimensional optimal transport distances, efficiently computed via sorting. This approach circumvents the estimation of high-dimensional means and covariance matrices, which underlie FID's poor sample complexity and vulnerability to adversarial attacks. We empirically demonstrate three primary advantages: (i) it is more sample-efficient by one order of magnitude, (ii) it is faster to compute by two orders of magnitude, (iii) it is more robust to adversarial attacks such as moment-matching. We show that MIND with 5k samples can replace the evaluation performance of FID with 50k samples, providing high correlation with this standard benchmark and superior discriminative performance. We further demonstrate that even smaller sample sizes (e.g., 1k or 2k) remain highly informative for rapid model iteration.

</details>


### [338] [From Model to Data (M2D): Shifting Complexity from GNNs to Graphs for Transparent Graph Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06814)
*Debolina Halder Lina,Arlei Silva*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Model-to-Data (M2D)蒸馏框架，通过将图神经网络的模型复杂度转移到数据空间（生成增强特征和结构的图），使得简单学生模型能匹配复杂教师模型的性能，从而提升架构透明度和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GNN可解释性方法只解释单个预测（归因于节点、边或特征），但无法提供架构层面的透明度，也无法解释简单模型与复杂模型之间的性能差距。

Method: 提出Model-to-Data (M2D)蒸馏框架：将教师模型的行为"物化"到数据空间中，生成具有增强特征和结构的增广图，使简单学生模型通过在该数据上学习即可匹配教师模型的性能。

Result: M2D能够以可解释的方式揭示公平性目标和基于注意力的聚合等底层机制，增强GNN透明度同时保持性能。

Conclusion: M2D通过将模型复杂性转移到数据空间，实现了架构层面的可解释性，为人理解不同GNN架构之间的性能差异提供了新的视角。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) achieve high performance but can be opaque to humans, making it difficult to understand and compare the many proposed architectures. While existing explainability methods attribute individual predictions to nodes, edges, or features, they do not provide architectural transparency or explain the fundamental performance gap between simple and more complex models. To address this limitation, we introduce Model-to-Data (M2D) distillation, a new framework that increases transparency by transferring model complexity into the data space. M2D distills the teacher model into an augmented graph with enriched features and structure, enabling a simple student to match the teacher's performance. By materializing model behavior in the data, our approach allows humans to inspect architectural advantages directly. We show that M2D reveals underlying mechanisms such as fairness objectives and attention-based aggregation in an interpretable way, enhancing GNN transparency while preserving performance.

</details>


### [339] [CellScientist: Dual-Space Hierarchical Orchestration for Closed-Loop Refinement of Virtual Cell Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07335)
*Mengran Li,Bo Li,Jiaying Wang,Wenbin Xing,Yixuan Dong,Chengyang Zhang,Hongliang Zhang,Yuzhong Peng,Jinlin Wu,Bob Zhang,Bingo Wing-Kuen Ling,Fuji Yang,Zhen Lei,Jiebo Luo,Zelin Zang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CellScientist 是一个双空间层次框架，通过将高层次假设空间与低层次可执行实现空间耦合，解决 LLM 辅助建模中的细化路由问题。它把建模决策表示为结构化状态，将执行差异路由回假设或实现更新，从而形成闭环迭代，在形态学和转录组学基准测试中优于参考基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前 LLM 辅助建模工作流面临细化路由问题：预测差异在可执行实现中被观察到，但相关修订可能涉及建模假设、表示设计、实现或任务约束。缺乏跨层次的结构化反馈传播导致迭代可能只修复代码而未能修正根本假设。

Method: 提出 CellScientist，一个双空间层次框架：(1) 高层次假设空间，将建模决策表示为结构化状态；(2) 低层次可执行实现空间，将假设实现为符合任务和接口约束的可执行程序。通过将执行差异路由回假设或实现更新，形成 Hypothesis -> Implementation -> Hypothesis 闭环。

Result: 在形态学和转录组学基准测试以及单细胞扰动评估中，CellScientist 选择的最终可执行模型在固定划分和评估协议下优于参考基线，并且工作流产生可审计的细化轨迹。

Conclusion: CellScientist 将失败转化为模型细化的结构化信号而非调试事件，有效解决了虚拟细胞建模中的细化路由问题，为 LLM 辅助科学建模提供了可审计的闭环框架。

Abstract: Virtual Cell Modeling (VCM) requires models that not only predict perturbation responses, but also support targeted revision when predictions fail. Current LLM-assisted modeling workflows face a refinement-routing problem: prediction discrepancies are observed through executable implementations, but the relevant revision may involve the modeling assumption, representation design, implementation, or task constraint. Without structured feedback propagation across these levels, iterative refinement may repair code while failing to revise the assumption responsible for the discrepancy. We propose CellScientist, a dual-space hierarchical framework that couples a high-level hypothesis space with a low-level executable implementation space. CellScientist represents modeling decisions as structured states, realizes them as admissible programs under task and interface constraints, and routes execution discrepancies back to targeted hypothesis or implementation updates. This enables a closed Hypothesis -> Implementation -> Hypothesis loop where failures become structured signals for model refinement rather than debugging events. Across morphology and transcriptomic benchmarks, with additional single-cell perturbation evaluations, the final executable models selected by CellScientist improve over reference baselines under fixed split and evaluation protocols, while the workflow produces auditable refinement traces.

</details>


### [340] [A Theory of Online Learning with Autoregressive Chain-of-Thought Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06819)
*Ilan Doron-Arad,Idan Mehalel,Elchanan Mossel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了自回归生成的在线学习框架，研究在端到端和思维链两种反馈模式下，学习未知 next-token 生成器所产生最终输出的错误界，并分析了生成步数 M 的影响。主要结论包括：端到端模式下错误界增长速率介于常数与对数之间；思维链模式可完全消除对 M 的依赖。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩展 [Joshi et al., 2025] 的 PAC 框架到在线学习场景，理解自回归生成中生成步数 M 如何影响学习难度，以及中间 token 的观测能否降低这种影响。

Method: 构建了在线自回归学习框架，区分两种反馈模式（端到端 vs 思维链），通过理论分析推导了不同模式下的最优错误界，并针对自回归线性阈值类给出了最优错误界及统计设置下的新下界。

Result: 端到端模式下错误界增长率可以呈现从常数到对数的多种速率，对数上界不可绕过；思维链模式可完全消除对 M 的依赖；解决了 [Joshi et al., 2025] 遗留的若干开放问题。

Conclusion: 在线自回归学习在定性上与统计学习类似，但定量上对生成步数的依赖尺度不同。中间 token 的观测能从根本上降低学习难度。

Abstract: Autoregressive generation lies at the heart of the mechanism of large language models. It can be viewed as the repeated application of a next-token generator: starting from an input string (prompt), the generator is applied for $M$ steps, and the last generated token is taken as the final output. [Joshi et al., 2025] proposed a PAC model for studying the learnability of the input-output maps arising from this process. We develop an online analogue of this framework, focusing on the mistake bound of learning the final output induced by an unknown next-token generator.
  We distinguish between two forms of feedback. In the End-to-End model, after each round the learner observes only the final token produced after $M$ autoregressive steps. In the Chain-of-Thought model, the learner is additionally shown the entire $M$-step trajectory. Our goal is to understand how the optimal mistake bound depends on the generation horizon $M$, and to what extent observing intermediate tokens can reduce this dependence.
  Our main results show that the online theory of autoregressive learning exhibits a qualitative picture analogous to the statistical one found by [Hanneke et al., 2026], but with a different scale of dependence on the generation horizon. In the End-to-End model, we prove a taxonomy of possible mistake-bound growth rates in the generation horizon $M$: essentially any rate between constant and logarithmic can arise. We further show that this logarithmic ceiling is unavoidable. In the Chain-of-Thought model, we show that access to the full generated trajectory eliminates the dependence on $M$ altogether.
  We also analyze autoregressive linear threshold classes, and prove optimal mistake bounds, as well as a new lower bound for the statistical setting. Along the way, our results resolve several questions left open by [Joshi et al., 2025].

</details>


### [341] [Mage: Multi-Axis Evaluation of LLM-Generated Executable Game Scenes Beyond Compile-Pass Rate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07342)
*Hugh Xuechen Liu,Kıvanç Tatar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出编译通过率在LLM代码生成评估中具有误导性，提出四轴评估协议Mage（编译成功、运行时成功、结构保真度、机制遵循），对858次生成实验分析发现：直接NL-to-C#生成运行时通过率最高（43%）但结构空洞（机制F1≈0.12），结构IR条件化使运行时率减半但恢复领域忠实结构（F1最高1.00），编译率与功能正确性在该领域呈反相关。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM代码生成评估过度依赖编译通过率这一单一信号，而在多组件领域特定工件（如可执行游戏场景合成）中该指标具有误导性，无法真实反映功能正确性。

Method: 提出四轴评估协议Mage（编译成功、运行时成功、结构保真度、机制遵循），在858次生成实验中比较4种开源LLM（7B-30B）、26个Unity目标模式可玩概念、两种自动提取IR粒度级别；对比直接NL-to-C#生成与结构IR条件化生成的效果。

Result: 直接NL-to-C#生成运行时通过率最高（均值43%）但结构空洞（机制F1≈0.12）；结构IR条件化使运行时率减半但结构保真度恢复（F1最高1.00）；仅行为与全场景粒度间无显著差异（McNemar p=1.0）；编译率与功能正确性呈反相关。

Conclusion: 编译通过率在该领域与功能正确性反相关，多轴评估对检测这种偏离至关重要；输入级粒度存在饱和效应。

Abstract: Compile-pass rate is the dominant evaluation signal for LLM code generation, yet for multi-component domain-specific artifacts it can be actively misleading. We demonstrate this on executable game scene synthesis with a four-axis evaluation protocol (named `Mage') -- compile success, runtime success, structural fidelity, and mechanism adherence -- applied to 858 generation attempts across four open-weight LLMs (7B--30B), 26~hand-crafted Unity goal pattern playable concepts, and two automatically extracted IR granularity levels. Direct NL-to-C\# generation achieves the highest runtime-pass rate (43\% mean) yet produces structurally vacuous scenes (mechanism $F_1 \approx 0.12$). Structural IR conditioning halves the runtime rate but recovers domain-faithful structure ($F_1$ up to 1.00). Within IR conditioning, behavior-only and full-scene granularity are statistically indistinguishable (McNemar $p = 1.0$), indicating input-level granularity saturation. These results show that compile rate is anti-correlated with functional correctness in this domain and that multi-axis evaluation is necessary to detect the divergence. We release the benchmark, replay logs, and per-record metrics for independent verification.

</details>


### [342] [A Rod Flow Model for Adam at the Edge of Stability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06821)
*Eric Regis,Sinho Chewi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将"rod flow"方法从梯度下降扩展到Adam等自适应优化器，通过在参数和动量联合相空间建模，更准确地追踪离散迭代在稳定性边缘的行为。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 自适应优化器（如Adam）在稳定性边缘运行，但现有连续时间模型主要针对梯度下降，缺乏对动量方法的扩展。

Method: 将rod flow扩展到Adam：在$(w, m)$联合相空间中建模，将二阶矩$ν$视为光滑辅助变量。同时开发了heavy ball动量、Nesterov动量、RMSProp、Adam、NAdam的标量和逐分量版本rod flow。

Result: 在代表性机器学习架构上，八种优化器的rod flow相比相应的stable flow都能更准确地追踪离散迭代在edge-of-stability regime的行为。

Conclusion: Rod flow方法可成功扩展到自适应优化器，为理解动量方法在稳定性边缘的动态行为提供了更精确的连续时间建模工具。

Abstract: Cohen et al. (arXiv:2207.14484) observed that adaptive gradient methods such as Adam operate at the edge of stability. While there has been significant work on continuous-time modeling of gradient descent at the edge of stability, extending these models to momentum methods remains underdeveloped. In the gradient descent setting, Regis et al. (arXiv:2602.01480) introduced rod flow, which models consecutive iterates as an extended one-dimensional object -- a "rod." Here we extend rod flow to Adam by working in the joint phase space of parameters and first moment $(w, m)$ and treating the second moment $ν$ as a smooth auxiliary variable. We also develop rod flows for heavy ball momentum, Nesterov momentum, and scalar and per-component versions of RMSProp, Adam, and NAdam. For all eight optimizers, we empirically evaluate rod flow on representative machine learning architectures, where it tracks the discrete iterates through the edge-of-stability regime significantly more accurately than the corresponding stable flow.

</details>


### [343] [SHARP: A Self-Evolving Human-Auditable Rubric Policy for Financial Trading Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06822)
*Xiwen Chen,Wenhui Zhu,Songzhu Zheng,Kashif Rasul,Yueyue Deng,Huayu Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SHARP框架，用结构化的符号化策略优化（人类可读的规则集）替代无约束的自由文本提示优化，解决LLM在金融交易中的信用分配问题和策略漂移，使GPT-4o-mini等模型性能平均提升10-20个百分点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM自优化交易代理采用无约束的自由文本提示优化，在低信噪比环境和延迟标量回报下，优化器无法区分系统性逻辑缺陷与随机市场波动，导致严重的信用分配问题和策略漂移。

Method: 提出SHARP（自我进化人类可审计规则策略）神经符号框架：1）将推理约束在结构化、人类可读的条件-行动规则集中；2）交易亏损时，归因代理通过跨样本推理定位具体规则失败；3）进行精准原子级策略编辑；4）通过严格的向前验证进行正则化。

Result: 在三个不同股票板块和四个LLM骨干网络上评估，SHARP稳定地将通用初始启发式策略转化为强健策略，使紧凑模型（如GPT-4o-mini）平均提升10-20个百分点。

Conclusion: SHARP证明LLM能够实现动态高效的适应，同时显著增强机构金融所需的结构透明性和可审计性。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed for autonomous financial trading, a domain requiring continuous adaptation to noisy, non-stationary markets. Existing self-improving agents typically address this through unbounded free-form prompt optimization. However, in low signal-to-noise environments with delayed scalar rewards (P\&L), this unstructured approach exacerbates the fundamental credit assignment problem: optimizers cannot reliably distinguish systematic logic flaws from stochastic market variance, inevitably leading to policy drift. To overcome this bottleneck, we introduce the Self-Evolving Human-Auditable Rubric Policy (SHARP), a neuro-symbolic framework that replaces unconstrained text mutation with structured, symbolic policy optimization. SHARP confines the agent's reasoning to a bounded, human-readable rubric of explicit condition-action rules. When sub-optimal trades occur, an attribution agent employs cross-sample reasoning across multiple samples to isolate specific rule failures. This enables targeted, atomic policy edits that are subsequently regularized through strict walk-forward validation. Evaluated across three diverse equity sectors and four LLM backbones, SHARP consistently transforms generic initial heuristics into highly robust strategies, lifting the empirical performance of compact models by 10 to 20 percentage points on average (e.g., GPT-4o-mini). Ultimately, SHARP demonstrates that LLMs can achieve dynamic and efficient adaptation while significantly enhancing the structural transparency and auditability demanded by institutional finance.

</details>


### [344] [ProtSent: Protein Sentence Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06830)
*Dan Ofer,Oriel Perets,Michal Linial,Nadav Rappoport*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ProtSent 是一种对比微调框架，通过在多种蛋白质对数据集上训练，将蛋白质语言模型适配为通用嵌入模型，在23个下游任务中显著提升了性能，尤其在远程同源检测和结构检索方面效果突出。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的蛋白质语言模型（pLMs）虽然能生成捕获进化和结构信息的残基级别表示，但其平均池化的序列嵌入并未经过显式训练来反映蛋白质之间的功能、进化或结构相似性。作者希望通过对比微调解决这一局限。

Method: 提出了 Protein Sentence Transformers (ProtSent)，一种对比微调框架。使用 MultipleNegativesRankingLoss 在五个蛋白质对数据集上训练：Pfam家族、结构来源的硬负样本、AlphaFold DB结构对、StringDB蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用以及深度突变扫描数据。在23个下游任务中使用冻结嵌入和k近邻探针进行评估。

Result: 在ESM-2 150M模型上，ProtSent改进了23个任务中的15个，远程同源检测提升+105%，变异效应预测提升+17%，SCOPe-40结构检索Recall@1提升+19.9%。35M变体改进了23个任务中的16个，远程同源检测提升+40.5%，SCOPe-40 Recall@1提升+15.5%。

Conclusion: 对比微调能够重构嵌入空间，使其更好地捕捉蛋白质功能和结构信息，且无需任何任务特定的监督。ProtSent可作为通用的蛋白质嵌入模型，相关工作已开源。

Abstract: Protein language models (pLMs) produce per-residue representations that capture evolutionary and structural information, yet their mean-pooled sequence embeddings are not explicitly trained to reflect functional, evolutionary or structural similarity between proteins. We present Protein Sentence Transformers (ProtSent), a contrastive fine-tuning framework for adapting PLMs into general-purpose embedding models. ProtSent trains with MultipleNegativesRankingLoss across five protein-pair datasets: Pfam families, structurally derived hard negatives, AlphaFold DB structural pairs, and StringDB protein--protein interactions, and Deep Mutational Scanning data. We evaluate on 23~downstream tasks using frozen embeddings with a k-nearest-neighbor probe to measure embedding neighborhood quality. On ESM-2 150M, ProtSent improves 15 of 23 tasks, with gains of +105% on remote homology detection, +17% on variant effect prediction, and +19.9% Recall@1 on SCOPe-40 structural retrieval. The 35M variant improves 16 of 23 tasks with +40.5% on remote homology and +15.5% Recall@1 on SCOPe-40. Contrastive fine-tuning restructures the embedding space to better capture protein function and structure, without any task-specific supervision. We release the models, public data, and training recipe and code.

</details>


### [345] [Why DDIM Hallucinates More than DDPM: A Theoretical Analysis of Reverse Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06831)
*Muhammad H. Ashiq,Samanyu Arora,Abhinav N. Harish,Ishaan Kharbanda,Hung Yun Tseng,Grigorios G. Chrysos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从理论上研究了DDPM和DDIM两种扩散采样器中的幻觉现象，证明了在临界时间后DDIM会卡在两个高斯模式之间产生幻觉，而DDPM的随机性帮助其避免幻觉，并提出了增加随机步骤改善DDIM的方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散模型在采样时会出现幻觉现象（生成不存在的虚假模式），目前缺乏理论层面的深入理解，尤其不同采样器（随机性DDPM vs 确定性DDIM）的幻觉差异原因不明。

Method: 以高斯混合分布为目标，从理论上分析DDIM（ODE）和DDPM（SDE）的逆向动力学，推导出临界时间后两者的行为差异，并通过实验验证理论预测。

Result: (a) DDIM在临界时间后会被卡在两个最近模式之间的线段上产生幻觉；(b) DDPM的随机性帮助其逃离该区域，幻觉率显著更低；(c) 增加随机步骤可帮助DDIM避免幻觉。

Conclusion: 随机性在扩散采样中具有去幻觉的关键作用，为设计更好的采样器提供了新的理论视角和实用指导。

Abstract: We theoretically study the hallucination phenomena in two canonical diffusion samplers: the stochastic Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) and the deterministic Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM). We analyze the reverse ODE (DDIM) and SDE (DDPM) for a Gaussian mixture target, proving that after a critical time $τ$, (a) DDIM can become stuck on the segment connecting the two nearest modes and (b) DDPM *stochasticity* helps it become unstuck from this region, thus avoiding hallucination. Our empirical validation verifies that DDPM has a significantly lower hallucination rate than DDIM when this region is entered. Building on our observations, we exhibit how using additional stochastic steps can help DDIM avoid hallucinations and offer new insights on how to design improved samplers.

</details>


### [346] [Attribution-Based Neuron Utility for Plasticity Restoration in Deep Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06834)
*Patrick Elisii,Lucas Beauchemin,Dawer Jamshed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出GXD（梯度乘以与参考点的差），一种基于参考梯度归因的效用度量，用于估计重置网络参数的功能代价，从而在持续学习中更可靠地恢复网络可塑性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于代理信号的效用度量（如激活幅度、梯度活动等）会与重置干预本身脱节，导致自适应重置策略不可靠。需要一种与重置功能代价直接对齐的效用度量。

Method: 提出GXD（Gradient times Difference from reference），基于参考梯度归因，估计替换网络单元的一阶功能代价，以此作为重置决策的效用度量。

Result: 与现有代理信号效用度量相比，GXD在传统方法失效的场景下仍能保持可靠的干预效果，使自适应重置更加稳健。

Conclusion: GXD将自适应重置重新定义为干预代价估计问题，为构建更鲁棒的持续学习系统提供了实用路径。

Abstract: Continual learning research attempts to conserve two fundamental capabilities: new knowledge acquisition and the preservation of previously acquired knowledge. While knowledge in this case can be measured through performance over an implicit or explicit task space, model plasticity generally concerns adaptability as data distributions evolve. Though much of the literature has focused on catastrophic forgetting, deep networks can also suffer from loss of plasticity, becoming progressively harder to update under continued training. Recent research has identified multiple mechanisms underlying this phenomenon, including neuron saturation, parameter norm growth, and loss of useful curvature directions. Adaptive reset-based interventions, which selectively reinitialize low-utility network parameters, have emerged as practical solutions to restore trainability. Existing utility measures used to guide resets, such as activation magnitude, contribution utility, or gradient-based activity, rely on proxy signals that can become misaligned with the intervention they are meant to guide. In this paper, we introduce gradient times difference from reference (GXD), a theoretically motivated utility measure based on reference-based gradient attribution that estimates the first-order functional cost of replacing a unit. Our results show that utility measures aligned with the functional cost of the reset can make interventions more reliable in settings where existing reset criteria degrade. GXD reframes adaptive resetting as an intervention cost estimation problem, providing a practical path toward more robust continual learning systems.

</details>


### [347] [On Privacy Leakage in Tabular Diffusion Models: Influential Factors, Attacker Knowledge, and Metrics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06835)
*Masoumeh Shafieinejad,D. B. Emerson,Behnoosh Zamanlooy,Elaheh Bassak,Fatemeh Tavakoli,Sara Kodeiri,Marcelo Lotif,Xi He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对表格扩散模型（TDM）的隐私风险进行了系统性量化分析，通过黑盒与白盒下的成员推理攻击，研究了训练配置、合成选择及攻击者知识对隐私泄露的影响，并揭示了传统启发式隐私指标的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 表格数据在隐私敏感领域广泛应用，生成高质量合成数据的需求日益增长。尽管表格扩散模型在合成性能上表现优异，但其隐私风险尚不明确，亟需系统性评估与量化。

Method: 利用最先进的成员推理攻击方法，在黑盒与白盒两种攻击设定下，系统测量不同训练配置、合成策略及攻击者知识水平对表格扩散模型隐私泄露的影响。

Result: 研究表明，攻击者无需完全掌握训练配置、拥有相同的数据分布或消耗大量计算资源即可成功实施攻击。此外，传统启发式隐私指标（如距离最近记录）存在明显缺陷。

Conclusion: 表格扩散模型虽然生成能力强，但存在不容忽视的隐私泄露风险，且攻击门槛较低；现有启发式隐私度量方法不可靠，需要更严谨的隐私评估手段。

Abstract: Tabular data plays an important role in many fields and industries, including those with elevated privacy considerations and risks. As such, there is a rising interest in generating high-quality synthetic proxies for real tabular data as a means of reducing privacy risk and proprietary data exposure. With tabular diffusion models (TDMs) demonstrating leading performance in synthesizing such data, understanding and measuring the privacy risks associated with these models is imperative. Leveraging state-of-the-art membership inference attacks for TDMs in both black- and white-box settings, this work quantifies the impact of training setup, synthesis choices, and attacker knowledge on privacy leakage. Moreover, the results demonstrate that adversaries need not have perfect knowledge of the training setup, identical data distributions, or massive compute resources to construct successful attacks. Finally, the pitfalls associated with applying heuristic privacy metrics, such as distance-to-closest record, are revealed.

</details>


### [348] [How to Compress KV Cache in RL Post-Training? Shadow Mask Distillation for Memory-Efficient Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06850)
*Rui Zhu,Weiheng Bai,Qiushi Wu,Yang Ren,Haixu Tang,Yuchu Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了在线强化学习（如RLHF/RLAIF）在长上下文推理任务中面临的严重“内存墙”问题：rollout阶段的KV缓存压缩虽能节省内存，但微小误差会被RL的不稳定性急剧放大，导致离线策略偏差，且现有统计方法（如重要性重加权）因高梯度方差和低样本效率而失效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决在线RL在长上下文推理任务中，因KV缓存爆炸导致的“内存墙”问题，以及现有KV压缩方案在rollout阶段引入的离线策略偏差。

Method: 论文指出了KV缓存压缩在RL rollout阶段引入的偏差问题，并分析了其与标准推理中近无损压缩的本质区别——RL的不稳定性会放大微小近似误差，导致稀疏上下文（采样器）与密集上下文（学习者）之间的不一致。

Result: 发现即使现代KV压缩在标准推理中近乎无损，在RL优化中微小误差也会被剧烈放大；重要性重加权等统计校正方法因高梯度方差和样本低效而效果不佳。

Conclusion: 现有KV压缩方法无法直接套用于在线RL训练，需要针对RL特性设计的偏差校正机制或内存高效的rollout方案。

Abstract: Reinforcement Learning (RL) has emerged as a crucial paradigm for unlocking the advanced reasoning capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs), encompassing frameworks like RLHF and RLAIF. Regardless of the specific optimization algorithm (e.g., PPO, GRPO, or Online DPO), online RL inherently requires an exploratory trajectory generation (rollout) phase. However, for long-context reasoning tasks, this rollout phase imposes a severe ``memory wall'' due to the exorbitant Key-Value (KV) cache footprint. While applying KV cache compression during rollouts mitigates this memory overhead, it induces a critical off-policy bias. Although modern KV compression is often nearly lossless during standard inference, even minuscule approximation errors are drastically amplified by the inherent instability of RL optimization. Specifically, the sampler generates responses under a sparse context, whereas the learner updates parameters using the full, dense context. Existing statistical solutions, such as importance reweighting, struggle to correct this magnified bias, suffering from high gradient variance and severe sample inefficiency.

</details>


### [349] [Benchmarked Yet Not Measured -- Generative AI Should be Evaluated Against Real-World Utility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06856)
*Ishani Mondal,Shweta Bhardwaj*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文指出生成式AI在标准基准测试中表现优异但实际部署效果不佳，通过28个案例识别出三大评估缺陷（代理位移、时间坍塌、分布隐藏），提出从静态基准评估转向基于利益相关者、目标和情境的效用透明度评估，并设计了SCU-GenEval四阶段评估框架及三项支持工具。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 生成式AI系统在标准基准测试中表现优异，但在教育、医疗、软件工程和法律等领域的实际部署中未能带来相应效用，存在"基准效用鸿沟"。现有评估主要关注模型输出属性，而部署成功取决于AI与利益相关者长期交互是否真正改善其目标达成能力，缺乏对"效用"这一核心概念的衡量。

Method: 通过28个部署案例识别出三大评估缺陷：代理位移（用代理指标替代真正目标）、时间坍塌（忽略时间动态变化）、分布隐藏（忽视实际分布差异）。提出SCU-GenEval四阶段评估框架：（1）利益相关者-目标映射；（2）构念-指标规范；（3）机制建模；（4）纵向效用测量。配套三项支持工具：结构化部署协议、情境条件用户模拟器、角色和目标条件代理指标。

Result: 识别出评估实践中的三个系统性失败模式：代理位移、时间坍塌和分布隐藏。提出了从静态基准中心评估向基于利益相关者、目标和情境的效用透明度评估的范式转换方案。

Conclusion: 生成式AI的进步必须通过人类结果的可衡量改善来评估，而非仅依赖基准测试性能。作者呼吁各领域采取针对性行动，推动评估范式从模型输出特性转向人类效用轨迹。

Abstract: Generative AI systems achieve impressive performance on standard benchmarks yet fail to deliver real-world utility, a disconnect we identify across 28 deployment cases spanning education, healthcare, software engineering, and law. We argue that this benchmark utility gap arises from three recurring failures in evaluation practice: proxy displacement, temporal collapse, and distributional concealment. Motivated by these observations, we argue that generative AI evaluation requires a paradigm shift from static benchmark-centered transparency toward stakeholder, goal, and context-conditioned utility transparency grounded in human outcome trajectories. Existing evaluations primarily characterize properties of model outputs, while deployment success depends on whether interaction with AI improves stakeholders' ability to achieve their goals over time. The missing construct is therefore utility: the change in a stakeholder's capability induced through sustained interaction with an AI system within a deployment context. To operationalize this perspective, we propose SCU-GenEval, a four-stage evaluation framework consisting of stakeholder-goal mapping, construct-indicator specification, mechanism modeling, and longitudinal utility measurement. To make these stages practically deployable, we introduce three supporting instruments: structured deployment protocols, context-conditioned user simulators, and persona- and goal-conditioned proxy metrics. We conclude with domain-specific calls to action, arguing that progress in generative AI must be evaluated through measurable improvements in human outcomes rather than benchmark performance alone.

</details>


### [350] [Christoffel-DPS: Optimal sensor placement in diffusion posterior sampling for arbitrary distributions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06861)
*James Rowbottom,Nick Huang,Carola-Bibiane Schönlieb,Ben Adcock*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于Christoffel函数的无分布传感器放置框架Christoffel-DPS，结合扩散后验采样生成模型，在低传感器预算下实现最优状态估计，理论上有非渐近界限保证，实验优于高斯方法和现有生成模型方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典最优传感器放置（OSP）方法依赖高斯假设，无法处理现实系统中复杂非高斯分布；现有生成模型（如扩散后验采样DPS）虽能重建复杂分布，但传感器选择方法要么不切实际地需要过多传感器，要么沿用经典OSP思路，导致现代恢复模型与经典OSP工具不匹配。

Method: 提出基于Christoffel函数的无分布传感器放置框架，从数学上形式化任意传感器和信号分布下的最优采样与恢复保证，推导出具有非渐近传感器数量界限的OSP策略。据此开发Christoffel-DPS（含离线和在线变体），将Christoffel采样实例化到生成模型中。

Result: Christoffel-DPS在多个非高斯结构基准上优于高斯OSP基线和现有生成模型放置方法，在低传感器预算下表现出色，验证了无分布传感在理论和实践上的优越性。

Conclusion: 该框架是模型无关的，可应用于多种无条件DPS和流匹配模型，证明了基于Christoffel函数的无分布传感放置策略既理论严谨又实际有效。

Abstract: State estimation is a critical task in scientific, engineering and control applications. Since the reliability of reconstructions depends on the number and position of sensors, optimal sensor placement (OSP) is essential in scenarios where measurements are sparse and expensive. Classical OSP approaches rely on Gaussian assumptions and are consequently unable to account for the complex distributions encountered in many real-world systems. Generative-model-based reconstruction using sensor guided diffusion posterior sampling (DPS) has emerged as a promising technique for reconstructing states from highly complex distributions. However, existing sensor-selection methods either require unrealistically many sensors or emulate classical OSP, creating a mismatch between modern recovery models with classical OSP tools motivating the need for fundamentally new ideas towards OSP that match the recent advances made in powerful recovery models. We introduce a distribution-free sensor placement framework based on the Christoffel function: a mathematical formulation of optimal sampling and recovery guarantees for posterior sampling with arbitrary sensors and signal distributions, from which we derive a new OSP strategy with non-asymptotic bounds on the number of sensors needed for recovery. We develop Christoffel-DPS, with offline and online variants, instantiating Christoffel sampling for generative models. Christoffel-DPS outperforms Gaussian OSP baselines and existing generative-model placement methods, validating that distribution-free sensing is both theoretically principled and practically superior. The framework is model-agnostic; we demonstrate its application to a range of unconditional DPS and flow-matching models on structurally non-Gaussian benchmarks, showing the efficacy of Christoffel-DPS in low sensor budget regimes.

</details>


### [351] [Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Bandits: From Learning Efficiency to Fairness Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06864)
*John Wang,Mengfan Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了多目标多智能体多臂赌博机（MO-MA-MAB）在随机奖励下的学习问题，提出了分别针对效率（Pareto最优）和公平性（Nash社会福利）的两种算法，并证明了Pareto UCB1 Gossip可实现O(log T)或O(√T)遗憾界，Simulated NSW UCB Gossip可实现O(T^{3/4})遗憾界，实验显示性能提升约50%-100%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多智能体多臂赌博机研究多关注单一目标，而实际应用中(如分布式资源分配、联邦学习)涉及多个冲突目标的权衡，且需同时考虑效率（Pareto最优）和公平性（社会福利），现有方法无法同时处理这两种诉求。

Method: 1) Pareto UCB1 Gossip：设计新型探索半径，显式分离Pareto推理中的统计不确定性与共识误差；2) Simulated NSW UCB Gossip：基于偏好标量化奖励模拟Nash社会福利目标，结合gossip协议进行效用估计与UCB探索。

Result: Pareto UCB1 Gossip达到O(log T)遗憾界及实例无关的O(√T)界；Simulated NSW UCB Gossip达到实例无关的O(T^{3/4})遗憾界。实验显示效率场景性能提升约100%，公平场景提升约50%。

Conclusion: 公平性约束会限制信息聚合并减慢收敛速度，导致更高的遗憾界；两种算法分别有效解决了效率与公平性导向的MO-MA-MAB问题。

Abstract: We study multi-objective multi-agent multi-armed bandits (MO-MA-MAB) under stochastic rewards, where agents observe heterogeneous reward vectors and communicate over time-varying graphs. We formulate this emerging problem setting to address \emph{efficient learning}, measured by Pareto regret, and incorporate \emph{fair learning} as an additional goal, captured via social welfare. To measure efficiency, we formulate Pareto regret and develop \textsc{Pareto UCB1 Gossip}, whose novel exploration radius explicitly separates statistical uncertainty in Pareto-based inference from consensus error. To express the fairness constraint, we formulate a Nash Social Welfare objective over preference-scalarized rewards and propose \textsc{Simulated NSW UCB Gossip}, which integrates preference-based reward simulation, gossip-based utility estimation, and UCB-style exploration. We prove that \textsc{Pareto UCB1 Gossip} achieves \(\mathcal{O}(\log T)\) regret and an instance-independent rate of \(\mathcal{O}(\sqrt{T})\), while \textsc{Simulated NSW UCB Gossip} achieves an instance-independent regret bound of \(\mathcal{O}(T^{3/4})\). This separation reveals the cost of imposing the fairness constraint to our efficiency objective: fairness limits information aggregation and slows convergence. Experiments show that our methods consistently outperform baselines, improving performance by approximately \(100\%\) and \(50\%\) in the efficiency and fairness settings, respectively.

</details>


### [352] [Dataset Watermarking for Closed LLMs with Provable Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06865)
*Pengrun Huang,Kamalika Chaudhuri,Yu-Xiang Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次提出了针对闭源大语言模型的可证明数据集水印方法，通过增加随机词对的共现频率嵌入水印，并利用统计检验检测模型输出中的水印信号。实验表明，该方法在微调阶段可靠检测水印（p<0.01），即使水印数据仅占总微调token的1%仍有效，且不影响模型效用和语义完整性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大语言模型在大量未经严格筛选的数据上训练，可能包含专有数据集或评测基准，需要一种方法检测模型是否在特定数据集上训练过，以保护数据版权和评估完整性。

Method: 通过改写句子增加随机选择的词对共现频率，将水印嵌入数据集中；然后在模型生成输出中利用统计检验检测共现模式，从而判断模型是否在带水印的数据上训练过。

Result: 该方法在多个基座模型和基准数据集上均能可靠检测水印（p<0.01）；即使水印数据集仅占微调token总量的约1%，检测依然有效；同时模型效用和语义完整性未受影响。

Conclusion: 首次实现了闭源大语言模型的数据集水印可证明检测，为保护专有数据集和防止未授权训练提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are pre-trained and post-trained on vast amounts of loosely curated data, raising the possibility that these models may have been trained on proprietary datasets or the same benchmarks used for evaluation. This motivates the need for dataset watermarking: designing datasets such that training on them leaves detectable signatures in the resulting model. Prior work has explored this problem for open models. We introduce the first dataset watermarking method for closed LLMs with provable detection. In particular, we embed a dataset-level watermark signal by increasing the co-occurrence frequency of randomly selected word pairs through rephrasing, and detect it using a statistical test on co-occurrence patterns in model-generated outputs. We evaluate our method with multiple base models and benchmark datasets and show that it reliably detects the watermark ($p <0.01$) in the fine-tuning stage. Notably, our method remains effective in a data mixture setting where the watermarked dataset constitutes only approximately $1\%$ of the total fine-tuning tokens. Furthermore, we show that our method preserves the utility and semantic integrity of the benchmark.

</details>


### [353] [A Finite-Iteration Theory for Asynchronous Categorical Distributional Temporal-Difference Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06866)
*Ege C. Kaya,Abolfazl Hashemi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文弥合了分类时序差分学习在有限迭代理论与实际异步单状态更新实现之间的差距，为两种分类策略评估方法提供了有限迭代保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有分布策略评估的非渐近分析大多针对生成模型下的同步全状态更新、模型估计器或加速变体，而标准的分类时序差分学习通常以异步单状态更新方式运行，由马尔可夫轨迹驱动。这导致现有有限迭代理论与实际分类递归实现之间存在重要差距。

Method: 通过适当的等距嵌入，将两种分类策略评估方法（Cramér几何下的标量分类TD学习和最大均值差异几何下的多元符号分类TD学习）转化为异步单状态随机逼近递归形式，该递归在状态上确界范数下具有压缩性。

Result: 获得了在折扣问题中（i.i.d.和马尔可夫状态采样下）以及无折扣固定时域问题中（i.i.d.情节采样下）的有限迭代保证。

Conclusion: 成功填补了分类TD学习理论与实践之间的理论空白，证明了异步单状态更新机制下分类策略评估方法的收敛性。

Abstract: Recent non-asymptotic analyses have substantially advanced the theory of distributional policy evaluation, but they largely concern synchronous full-state updates under a generative model, model-based estimators, accelerated variants, or different approximation architectures. Standard categorical temporal-difference learning is typically used in a different regime. It asynchronously performs a single-state update at each iteration and, in online settings, is driven by a Markovian trajectory. This leaves an important gap between existing finite-iteration theory and the categorical recursions most closely aligned with practical distributional temporal-difference implementations. We bridge this gap for two categorical policy-evaluation methods: scalar categorical temporal-difference learning in the Cramér geometry and multivariate signed-categorical temporal-difference learning in the maximum mean discrepancy geometry. After suitable isometric embeddings, both algorithms take the form of asynchronous single-state stochastic-approximation recursions that contract in a statewise supremum norm. This permits finite-iteration guarantees in discounted problems under both i.i.d. and Markovian state sampling, and in undiscounted fixed-horizon problems under i.i.d. episodic sampling.

</details>


### [354] [When Descent Is Too Stable: Event-Triggered Hamiltonian Learning to Optimize](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06868)
*Yi Wang,Chandrajit Bajaj*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SHAPE，一种基于自适应端口-哈密顿系统的优化器，通过在增广相空间(q,p)中学习哈密顿向量场实现结构化局部下降，并通过事件触发机制在检测到局部均衡时切换端口与记忆，从而解决固定预算非凸优化中因过早收敛到局部最小值而导致性能瓶颈的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 固定预算非凸优化失败的原因并非局部下降不稳定，而是过于稳定：优化器在到达一个附近的驻点后，将剩余计算资源浪费在优化一个无信息量的局部最小值上。作者希望将这种失败模式形式化为一个关于优化器动力学的控制问题。

Method: SHAPE将优化提升至增广相空间(q,p)，其中q为原始状态（候选解），p为余切变量（方向敏感性），控制器u提供当前梯度信息。在每阶段内，学习的哈密顿向量场诱导结构化局部下降；跨阶段时，通过固定事件时钟在检测到局部均衡时更新端口与记忆。该方法保持无源性兼容结构，同时允许同一训练策略处理干净、随机或估计的梯度输入。

Result: 在固定预算非凸优化任务上，SHAPE相比固定策略优化器提升了"best-so-far"性能。

Conclusion: 自适应哈密顿能量整形为在困难优化景观中平衡下降、探索和预算分配提供了原则性机制。

Abstract: Fixed-budget nonconvex optimization can fail not because local descent is unstable, but because it is too stable: after reaching a nearby stationary point, an optimizer may spend the remaining evaluations refining an uninformative local minimum. We formulate this failure mode as a control problem over optimizer dynamics, where the learner must decide when to descend, when to exploit a promising basin, and when stagnation should trigger movement elsewhere. We introduce SHAPE, a structured adaptive port-Hamiltonian task-family optimizer for event-triggered minima hunting under local information. Starting from gradient-descent dynamics, SHAPE lifts optimization to an augmented phase space $(q, p)$, where the primal state $q$ represents the candidate solution, the cotangent variable $p$ carries directional sensitivity, and a controller $u$ provides processed information from current gradient oracle. Within each stage, a learned Hamiltonian vector field induces structured local descent; across stages, a fixed event clock in the implementation updates ports and memory when local equilibria are detected, with stage-dependent horizons treated in the analysis as a direct generalization. This design preserves a passivity-compatible structure while allowing the same trained policy to use clean, stochastic, or estimated gradient inputs. Experiments on fixed-budget nonconvex optimization tasks show that SHAPE improves best-so-far performance compared with fixed-policy optimizers. These results suggest that adaptive Hamiltonian energy shaping provides a principled mechanism for balancing descent, exploration, and budget allocation in difficult optimization landscapes.

</details>


### [355] [Continuous First, Discrete Later: VQ-VAEs Without Dimensional Collapse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06870)
*Xinyu Zhao,Nikita Karagodin,Hamed Hassani,Sinan Hersek,Paul Pu Liang,Yury Polyanskiy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了VQ-VAE中维度坍塌问题（表示仅占据1-2%的有效维度），从理论和实验上证明该问题导致难以突破的损失下界，并提出一种简单有效的解决方案：在引入VQ之前先用未量化的自编码器进行"预热训练"。该方案在图像和音频VQ-VAE上均显著提升了编码本有效维度（从3-5提升至17-19）并降低了重构损失和感知损失。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有VQ-VAE改进方法多聚焦于编码本大小和利用率，但忽略了维度坍塌问题——训练后的VQ-VAE表示仅存在于极低维子空间中（仅全秩的1-2%）。作者希望从理论和实践上解决这一被忽视的关键问题。

Method: 1) 理论分析：结合Saxe等人的序列学习效应与率失真理论，解释VQ如何通过抑制低方差方向导致潜在表示坍缩；2) 提出AE Warm-Up方案：在引入VQ量化之前，先训练模型作为未量化的自编码器进行预热；3) 实验验证：在合成数据、图像（VQGAN）和音频（WavTokenizer）VQ-VAE上进行评估，并分析预热时长对最终损失的影响。

Result: 在多个编码本大小K∈{2^10,2^14,2^16}下，AE预热将VQGAN编码本有效维度从3-5提升至17-19，rFID降低17-35%；在WavTokenizer上（K∈{2^13,2^14}），编码本维度从4提升至17-19，PESQ提升11-14%。理论预测与实验结果一致，可基于预热时长自适应切换训练阶段。

Conclusion: 维度坍塌是VQ-VAE中一个根本性问题，简单的AE预热策略即可有效解决，且预热时长可作为下游性能的预测指标，从而支持自适应切换训练策略。

Abstract: While many approaches to improve VQ-VAE performance focus on codebook size and utilization, the effect of dimensional collapse, where trained VQ-VAE representations live in an extremely low-dimensional subspace (1-2% of full rank), remains unaddressed. We show theoretically and empirically that dimension collapse causes a hard loss lower bound that various codebook improvement techniques fail to surpass. Our analytic framework extends the sequential learning effect of Saxe et al. [2014] by introducing ideas from rate-distortion theory and explains how the latent collapse is caused by the VQ suppressing lower-variance directions. Our theory justifies a simple solution: a "warm-up phase" that trains the model as an (unquantized) autoencoder before introducing VQ. On both synthetic experiments and large-scale image (VQGAN) and audio (WavTokenizer) VQ-VAEs, we show that AE Warm-Up successfully restores representation dimension, leading to lower reconstruction and perceptual loss at the same training budget. Across codebook sizes $K \in$ {$2^{10}, 2^{14}, 2^{16}$}, AE warm-up raises VQGAN codebook effective dimension from 3-5 to 17-19 and reduces rFID by 17-35%; on WavTokenizer at $K \in$ {$2^{13}, 2^{14}$}, it raises codebook dimension from 4 to 17-19 and improves PESQ by 11-14%. We empirically characterize how warm-up duration governs the achievable final loss. In agreement with experiment, our theoretical analysis predicts downstream performance as a function of warm-up length, enabling an adaptive criterion for switching from AE Warm-up to VQ-VAE training.

</details>


### [356] [On the Divergence of Differential Temporal Difference Learning without Local Clocks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06874)
*David Antrobius,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现：在平均奖励强化学习中，使用局部时钟（基于状态访问次数）的学习率能保证收敛，但使用全局时钟（基于时间步）的学习率可能导致发散，这与折扣强化学习中的情况相反。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究全局时钟与局部时钟两种学习率在强化学习中的收敛性差异，特别是解决Wan et al. [2021]和Blaser et al. [2026]中留下的开放问题。

Method: 构造反例，证明在平均奖励RL中，差分时序差分学习（differential TD learning）使用局部时钟学习率时收敛，但使用全局时钟学习率时发散。

Result: 在平均奖励RL中，局部时钟与全局时钟的收敛性不再等价；存在反例表明局部时钟收敛而全局时钟发散。

Conclusion: 平均奖励RL中学习率的选择至关重要，局部时钟比全局时钟更安全；而折扣RL中两者等价。

Abstract: Learning rate is a critical component of reinforcement learning (RL). This work uses global and local clocks to distinguish two types of learning rates. The former is of the standard form $α_t$ that depends only on the time step $t$ (i.e., a global clock). The latter is of the form $α_{ν(S_t, t)}$, where $ν(s, t)$ counts the number of visits to state $s$ until time $t$ (i.e., a local clock). In discounted RL, an RL algorithm that is convergent with a local clock is always also convergent with a global clock, and vice versa. We are not aware of any counterexample. The key contribution of this work is to show that this nice correspondence breaks down in average-reward RL. Specifically, we construct a counterexample showing that although differential temporal difference learning is convergent with a local clock, it can diverge with a global clock. This counterexample closes the open problem in Wan et al. [2021], Blaser et al. [2026].

</details>


### [357] [Temporal Attention for Adaptive Control of Euler-Lagrange Systems with Unobservable Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06877)
*Giansalvo Cirrincione,Adriano Fagiolini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对具有不可观测有限时域内摩擦状态的Euler-Lagrange系统，提出一种元控制框架：用自注意力模块生成计算力矩控制器的增益，注意力头数通过增量秩追踪框架的代理分析预选，并在强化学习阶段进行屏蔽可容许性约束训练。在2-DOF机械臂上，短记忆与匹配记忆模式下单层注意力优于深层Transformer（跟踪误差降低12%和19%，效应量大），但长记忆模式下优势消失，提示需将秩追踪内化到强化学习循环中。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当摩擦由不可直接观测的有限时域内部状态支配时，标准确定性等价自适应律会失去收敛保证，现有方法难以处理此类非马尔可夫闭环状态问题。

Method: 提出元控制架构：自注意力块处理短期运动历史窗口以生成计算力矩控制器增益；通过增量秩追踪的时序改编代理分析选择注意力头数；在屏蔽可容许性约束下用强化学习训练策略。

Result: 短记忆与匹配记忆模式下，单层自注意力元控制器优于深层Transformer基线，跟踪误差分别降低12%和19%，效应量大（d≈-1.1和-2.1），Mann-Whitney p<0.05；长记忆模式下优势消失，40%训练出现发散或策略坍塌。

Conclusion: 静态预选头数策略在长记忆场景存在局限，建议将秩追踪内化到强化学习循环中，实现注意力头数的运行时剪枝或增长。

Abstract: Adaptive control of Euler-Lagrange systems is challenging when friction is governed by a finite-horizon internal state that is not directly observable from joint measurements. In this setting, the measured closed-loop state is no longer Markovian, and standard certainty-equivalence adaptive laws may lose their convergence guarantees.
  The paper proposes a meta-control architecture in which the gains of a computed-torque controller are generated by a self-attention block processing a short window of recent motion history. The number of attention heads is selected before policy training through a surrogate analysis of the autocovariance of the memory-state gradient along the temporal window. This surrogate is based on a temporal adaptation of an incremental rank-tracking framework previously developed by the authors. The selected head count is then fixed and used as an architectural hyperparameter in a reinforcement-learning stage, where the policy is trained under a shielded admissibility constraint.
  The approach is tested on a 2-DOF manipulator with nonlinear friction and variable payload. In the short and matched memory regimes, the single-layer attention-only meta-controller outperforms a deeper Transformer baseline, with tracking-error reductions of 12 and 19 percentage points, respectively. The reported effect sizes are large, with d approximately -1.1 and -2.1, and Mann-Whitney p < 0.05 in both cases.
  In the long memory regime, however, the advantage disappears. Four out of ten training runs show either divergence or payload-invariant policy collapse, revealing a weakness in the static Phase-1 head-count prescription. This motivates moving rank-tracking inside the reinforcement-learning loop, allowing attention heads to be pruned or grown at runtime instead of fixed before training.

</details>


### [358] [Better Protein Function Prediction by Modeling Survivorship Bias](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06879)
*Zhongmou Chao,Poompol Buathong,Ekaterina Selivanovitch,Susan Daniel,Peter I. Frazier*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Evo-PU框架，利用核苷酸突变机制对生存偏差建模，在单生物体均匀覆盖的序列数据上，相比标准PU学习、OCC和蛋白质语言模型，在流感病毒、RSV和SARS-CoV-2预测任务中表现更优。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 蛋白质序列数据存在生存偏差（仅观测到功能性序列），需从正样本（功能性序列）中学习，但现有PU学习方法忽略了进化过程中突变概率对序列可观测性的影响。

Method: 提出Evo-PU框架，利用核苷酸突变的生物学知识对生存偏差建模，区分因不功能性而缺失的序列与因突变概率低而缺失的序列。

Result: 在单生物体均匀覆盖数据上（流感病毒、RSV突变研究、SARS-CoV-2变异预测），Evo-PU优于标准PU学习、OCC和蛋白质语言模型。在多生物体ProteinGym数据集上识别了泛化机会。

Conclusion: 将进化先验知识融入PU学习框架能有效改善蛋白质功能预测，未来可扩展到多生物体异质覆盖场景。

Abstract: Protein sequence data from nature exhibits survivorship bias: we only observe data from those organisms that survive and reproduce, while non-functional protein mutations are eliminated by natural selection. Thus, predicting whether a protein sequence is functional often requires learning from positive examples alone. While positive-unlabeled (PU) learning frameworks offer a generic solution to this problem, existing PU methods ignore the evolutionary processes that shape sequence observability and cause survivorship bias. Consider a sequence that is one mutation away from a commonly-observed protein variant in a well-surveilled organism. If the sequence were functional, it would likely be observed. If it is not observed, this suggests non-functionality. In contrast, sequences that are unlikely to arise through mutation may be missing simply because they never arose. Thus, these two kinds of missing sequences should be treated differently when training models. In this work, we propose Evo-PU, a PU learning framework that uses a scientific understanding of nucleotide mutation to model survivorship bias for well-surveilled single-organism sequence data. On three prediction tasks using single-organism uniform-coverage surveillance data -- predicting results from held-out influenza and respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) mutagenesis studies, and predicting future SARS-CoV-2 variants -- Evo-PU outperforms standard PU learning, one-class classification (OCC), and protein language models (PLMs). On prediction tasks from multi-organism ProteinGym datasets with more heterogeneous surveillance coverage, we identify opportunities to generalize our approach.

</details>


### [359] [Don't Retrain, Align: Adapting Autoregressive LMs to Diffusion LMs via Representation Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06885)
*Fred Zhangzhi Peng,Alexis Fox,Anru R. Zhang,Alexander Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出REPR-ALIGN方法，通过表示对齐（余弦相似度）将预训练自回归语言模型的内部表示迁移到扩散语言模型中，在相同架构下实现4倍训练加速，尤其在低数据场景下效果显著。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AR模型转DLM的方法主要通过目标函数和注意力机制的修改，但能否显式保留预训练AR模型中学到的表示几何结构尚不清楚。作者假设AR预训练学到的语义结构可以跨生成顺序迁移，DLM训练本质上是重新学习解码路径而非重新学习语言表示。

Method: 提出REPR-ALIGN方法：在每一层将DLM的隐状态与冻结的AR模型的隐状态进行余弦相似度对齐，同时优化标准的掩码去噪目标。无需适配器，无需架构更改，仅需修改注意力掩码。

Result: 在相同架构下实现高达4倍的训练加速，在低数据场景下尤其有效。

Conclusion: 语言表示可以跨生成顺序迁移，表示对齐为训练扩散语言模型提供了一种简单有效的技术。

Abstract: Diffusion language models (DLMs) have recently demonstrated capabilities that complement standard autoregressive (AR) models, particularly in non-sequential generation and bidirectional editing. Although recent work has shown that pretrained autoregressive checkpoints can be converted into diffusion language models, existing recipes primarily transfer parameters through continued denoising training with objective- and attention-level modifications. We instead ask whether the internal representation geometry learned by next-token prediction can be explicitly preserved during AR-to-DLM conversion. We hypothesize that much of the semantic structure learned by AR pretraining can transfer across generation orders, and thus DLM training should be viewed as relearning the decoding path rather than relearning language representations. To investigate this, we introduce REPR-ALIGN, a representation alignment objective that adapts a bidirectional masked diffusion model to reuse representations from a pretrained AR model of identical architecture. Concretely, we align the hidden states of the DLM to the frozen AR model at every layer using cosine similarity, while optimizing the standard masked denoising objective. This simple alignment, with no adapters and no architectural changes beyond the attention mask, yields up to 4x training acceleration in our setting and is particularly effective in low-data regimes. Our results suggest that linguistic representations can transfer across generation order, and that representation alignment provides a simple and effective technique for training diffusion language models. Code is available at https://github.com/pengzhangzhi/Open-dLLM.

</details>


### [360] [Streaming Adversarial Robustness in Fuzzy ARTMAP: Mechanism-Aligned Evaluation, Progressive Training, and Interpretable Diagnostics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06902)
*Shane Cairns,Leonardo Enzo Brito da Silva,Sasha Petrenko,Donald C. Wunsch,Jian Liu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次系统研究了流式原型学习器（Fuzzy ARTMAP）的对抗鲁棒性，提出了机制对齐的白盒攻击方法WB-Softmax，发现了防御排序在不同评估协议下可能反转，并揭示了ART显式类别几何结构可解释诊断鲁棒性失效模式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 离线深度网络的对抗鲁棒性已被广泛研究，但严格单次通过的流式神经学习器的鲁棒性尚不清楚。Fuzzy ARTMAP作为一种基于自适应共振理论的架构，具有类别竞争、补码编码、匹配追踪和无回放原型更新等特性，其对抗鲁棒性缺乏系统性研究。

Method: 提出WB-Softmax攻击方法，一种与ARTMAP类别竞争和地图场预测机制对齐的可微白盒攻击代理；形式化流式评估原则，要求鲁棒性评估在最终部署模型上进行；在四个图像基准上实验；对比离线对抗训练、渐进两阶段选择性训练等防御策略。

Result: WB-Softmax在原始Fuzzy ARTMAP模型上达到89-100%攻击成功率；防御排序在不同评估协议下反转：离线对抗训练在迁移攻击下看似鲁棒，但在自适应白盒评估下崩溃；渐进两阶段选择性训练提供最强无回放鲁棒性；ART的类别几何结构可解释诊断分离崩溃和匹配分数反转。

Conclusion: 该工作为流式原型学习器提供了机制对齐、协议感知的对抗鲁棒性分析框架，揭示了评估协议的重要性以及ART架构在鲁棒性可解释性方面的独特优势。

Abstract: Adversarial robustness has been studied extensively for offline deep networks, but less is known about strict single-pass streaming neural learners. This paper studies adversarial robustness in Fuzzy ARTMAP, an Adaptive Resonance Theory architecture based on category competition, complement coding, match tracking, and replay-free prototype updates. We introduce WB-Softmax, a differentiable white-box attack surrogate aligned with ARTMAP's category-competition and map-field prediction mechanism, and formalize a streaming evaluation principle requiring robustness to be assessed on the final deployed model. Across four image benchmarks, WB-Softmax achieves 89-100% attack success on vanilla Fuzzy ARTMAP models. We show that defense rankings can reverse across protocols: offline adversarial training may appear strong under transfer attacks yet collapse under adaptive white-box evaluation, whereas progressive two-stage selective training provides the strongest overall replay-free robustness. We further show that ART's explicit category geometry enables interpretable diagnosis of separation collapse and match-score inversion. These results provide a mechanism-aligned, protocol-aware framework for adversarial robustness in streaming prototype-based learners.

</details>


### [361] [Conservative Flows: A New Paradigm of Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06905)
*Eshed Gal,Md Shahriar Rahim Siddiqui,Moshe Eliasof,Eldad Haber*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的生成范式，通过离散随机动力学直接从数据分布中采样，替代了传统的噪声先验传输方法，并利用预训练流模型实现了更优的生成效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统生成模型依赖从噪声到数据的传输过程，本文旨在探索一种替代范式，即直接从数据支持的初始状态出发，通过保持数据分布不变的随机动力学进行生成，以克服现有方法的局限性。

Method: 提出了两种概率保持的采样机制：1）带Metropolis调整的校正Langevin动力学；2）预测-校正流方法。这两种方法可直接在预训练流模型的检查点上运行，无需重新训练。

Result: 在合成Swiss-roll数据集、ImageNet-256和Oxford Flowers-102上验证，所提采样器一致优于原始生成过程。

Conclusion: 该框架提供了一种新的生成视角，能够利用任何预训练流模型并通过保持分布不变的动力学提升生成质量，具有较好的通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Modern generative modeling is dominated by transport from a noise prior to data. We propose an alternative paradigm in which generation is performed by a discrete stochastic dynamics that leaves the data distribution invariant, initialized from data-supported states rather than from noise. The framework can utilize any pretrained flow model. We develop two probability-preserving sampling mechanisms, a corrected Langevin dynamics with a Metropolis adjustment and a predictor-corrector flow, that operate directly on existing checkpoints. We validate the framework on a synthetic Swiss-roll target, ImageNet-256 and Oxford Flowers-102, where our samplers consistently improve over the original generation procedures.

</details>


### [362] [TraXion: Rethinking Pre-training Frameworks for Mobility and Beyond](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06906)
*Shang-Ling Hsu,Mark Tenzer,Cyrus Shahabi,Khurram Shafique*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出TraXion，一种针对多实体时空事件流（MESES）的预训练框架，通过三个公理设计目标和架构，在移动性、企业认证日志和ICU死亡率预测等多个领域均达到或超越现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预训练方法将移动性数据类比为自然语言（轨迹=句子，访问=词元），忽略了移动性的三个结构特性：1）访问是元组事件，含义取决于位置、时间、活动的联合分布；2）用户跨轨迹携带持久签名；3）用户间存在共现依赖。这些特性实际上定义了一类更广泛的数据——多实体时空事件流（MESES），需要专门设计的预训练框架。

Method: 提出三个公理作为MESES预训练框架应满足的条件，并据此设计TraXion，其目标和架构联合设计以满足这些公理。在六个公开移动性数据集上训练单一checkpoint，同时迁移到企业认证日志和ICU死亡率预测任务。

Result: 单checkpoint在六个移动性数据集的所有任务（异常检测、下一POI推荐、下次访问预测、社交链接预测）上超越任务特定基线；在认证日志和ICU死亡率预测上同样匹配或超越之前的最佳结果。

Conclusion: 来自移动性、安全、医疗等不同领域的复杂事件流可以在一个统一框架下建模，验证了MESES框架的通用性和有效性。

Abstract: Human mobility differs from text and from generic time series in three structural ways: visits are tuple-valued events whose meaning depends on the joint distribution over location, time, and activity; users carry persistent signatures across trajectories; and visits are not independent across users, since co-location at shared places is a primary signal. Existing pre-training recipes for mobility import objectives from language modeling, treating trajectories as sentences and visits as tokens, an analogy that fails against each of the three properties above. These properties define a broader class, multi-entity spatiotemporal event streams (MESES), spanning enterprise authentication logs, electronic health records, and other event-stream domains where entities share infrastructure, schedules, or contexts. We make the properties precise as three axioms that any pre-training framework for MESES should satisfy, and introduce TraXion, whose objectives and architecture are jointly designed to meet them. A single TraXion checkpoint per dataset beats task-specific baselines on every task across six public mobility datasets covering anomaly detection, next-POI recommendation, next-visit prediction, and social-link prediction. The same recipe, applied unchanged to enterprise authentication logs and ICU mortality prediction, matches or exceeds prior work on both, showing that event streams from domains as different as mobility, security, and healthcare can be modeled under a single framework.

</details>


### [363] [Same Signal, Opposite Meaning: Direction-Informed Adaptive Learning for LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.06908)
*Ziming Li,Jiatan Huang,Xiaoguang Guo,Guilin Wang,Chuxu Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG
