We instead ask whether a pretrained diffusion model can discover query-specific concepts from the time-indexed scores it learns for the noisy marginals $p_t(x_t)$ and compose them at test time. Given a single out-of-distribution query, our method performs gradient ascent on $s_θ(x_t,t) \approx \nabla_{x_t}\log p_t(x_t)$ at multiple noising timesteps to recover local density modes, maps these modes into clean-space Gaussians, greedily selects relevant prototypes with a submodular likelihood objective, and combines them into a product-of-experts (PoE) teacher model with an analytic score. This teacher model can be sampled directly through classifier-free guidance or used to generate a sample pool for training a new class embedding and low-rank adapter. On held-out composition benchmarks built from ColorMNIST and CelebA, both the analytic PoE sampler and the low-rank adapted model outperform query-only and nearest trained-class baselines. These results suggest that the time-indexed score geometry of the diffusion model contains reusable density-mode concepts that support test-time compositional generation without a predefined concept library.

</details>


### [400] [Actor-Critic with Active Importance Sampling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07094)
*Majid Molaei,Gabor Paczolay,Matteo Papini,Alberto Maria Metelli,Marcello Restelli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AISAC算法，通过优化行为策略降低策略梯度估计方差，在连续动作空间中使用高斯行为策略和交叉熵最小化，在倒立摆和半猎豹任务上提升了学习速度、样本效率和训练稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准Actor-Critic方法在策略梯度估计中存在高方差问题，影响学习效率和稳定性。现有方法缺乏对行为策略的系统优化来降低方差，因此需要一种能自适应调整数据采集分布以最小化梯度方差的无偏估计方法。

Method: 基于重要性采样原理，优化行为策略以最小化梯度方差，同时保持无偏梯度估计。对于连续动作空间，采用高斯行为策略并通过交叉熵最小化进行优化。理论分析证明了方差减少和无偏性。

Result: 在Inverted Pendulum和Half Cheetah任务上，AISAC相比标准Actor-Critic方法在学习速度、样本效率和训练稳定性方面均有提升。优化行为策略还改进了目标策略更新和评论家估计精度，且在不同超参数设置下表现稳健。

Conclusion: AISAC通过优化行为策略加速收敛并稳定强化学习训练，具有实际应用潜力。未来工作将考虑与SAC、TD3等先进算法集成以应对更复杂环境。

Abstract: This paper introduces the Active-Importance-Sampling Actor-Critic (AISAC) algorithm, an extension of the Actor-Critic framework for reducing variance in policy gradient estimation. AISAC optimizes the behavior policy to minimize gradient variance while preserving unbiased gradient estimates. Using importance sampling principles, the algorithm adapts the behavior policy toward efficient data collection distributions aligned with target policy gradients.
  For continuous action spaces, AISAC employs Gaussian behavior policies optimized through cross-entropy minimization. We provide theoretical analysis demonstrating variance reduction and unbiasedness. Experiments on Inverted Pendulum and Half Cheetah tasks show improved learning speed, sample efficiency, and training stability compared to standard Actor-Critic methods.
  Results indicate that optimizing the behavior policy improves both target policy updates and critic estimation accuracy across different hyperparameter settings. AISAC accelerates convergence and stabilizes reinforcement learning training, making it promising for real-world applications. Future work includes integration with advanced algorithms such as Soft Actor-Critic and TD3 for more complex environments.

</details>


### [401] [Query-efficient model evaluation using cached responses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07096)
*Hayden Helm,Ben Johnson,Carey Priebe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出基于数据核视角空间（DKPS）的方法，利用已评估模型的缓存响应来减少评估新模型所需的查询次数，在保持预测精度的同时显著降低查询预算。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代评估框架对所有查询生成和评估响应成本高昂，而已评估模型的缓存响应未被充分利用来减少新模型评估所需的查询量。

Method: 提出数据核视角空间（DKPS）方法量化黑盒模型间关系，利用缓存响应预测新模型在基准上的性能，并引入离线查询选择策略以最大化对参考模型的拟合优度。

Result: 理论上证明了DKPS方法在特定条件下的查询高效性；实验表明DKPS方法在均绝对误差与基线相同的情况下显著降低了查询预算。

Conclusion: DKPS方法能有效利用缓存信息减少新模型评估成本，且离线查询选择策略可进一步提升预测准确性。

Abstract: Evaluating a new model on an existing benchmark is often necessary to understand its behavior before deployment. For modern evaluation frameworks, generating and evaluating a response for all queries can be prohibitively expensive. In practice, responses from previously-evaluated models are often cached -- creating a potential opportunity to use this additional information to decrease the number of queries required to accurately evaluate a new model. In this paper, we introduce an approach for predicting benchmark performance that leverages cached model responses based on the Data Kernel Perspective Space (DKPS), a method for quantifying the relationship between models in the black-box setting. Theoretically, we show that DKPS-based methods are query-efficient under certain conditions. Empirically, we demonstrate that DKPS-based methods achieve the same mean absolute error as baselines with a substantially decreased query budget. We conclude by proposing an offline method for selecting a set of queries that maximizes the goodness-of-fit on reference models, improving prediction accuracy over random query selection.

</details>


### [402] [CarCrashNet: A Large-Scale Dataset and Hierarchical Neural Solver for Data-Driven Structural Crash Simulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07098)
*Mohamed Elrefaie,Dule Shu,Matthew Klenk,Faez Ahmed*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了 CarCrashNet，一个高保真开源的结构碰撞仿真基准数据集，包含超过14,000个部件级和825个整车级碰撞仿真，并配套提出了基于机器学习的 CrashSolver 模型，为数据驱动的碰撞仿真研究提供了可复现的基础平台。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 结构碰撞仿真在车辆开发中至关重要，但由于非线性接触、大变形、材料塑性、失效及复杂多体相互作用，建模极具挑战。现有研究缺乏大规模、高质量、开源的结构碰撞仿真基准，因此需要构建这样的公开数据集来推动可复现研究和AI驱动的碰撞仿真发展。

Method: 1）基于 OpenRadioss 构建开源有限元工作流，生成超过14,000个保险杠横梁 pole-impact 仿真和825个基于三种行业标准车辆模型（Dodge Neon、Toyota Yaris、Chevrolet Silverado）的全车碰撞仿真；2）通过实验碰撞数据和商用求解器 Ansys LS-DYNA 验证仿真可靠性；3）提出 CrashSolver 机器学习模型用于全车碰撞预测。

Result: 建立了 CarCrashNet 多模态数据集，验证了开源有限元工作流与实验数据和商业求解器的一致性，对 CrashSolver 进行了全面基准测试，并与最先进的几何深度学习和基于Transformer的神经求解器进行了比较，结果表明 CarCrashNet 可作为结构仿真和AI驱动碰撞测试的基础平台。

Conclusion: CarCrashNet 为结构碰撞仿真领域提供了一个可靠、可复现的开源基准，有望推动数据驱动结构仿真、耐撞性建模和AI虚拟碰撞测试的研究进展。

Abstract: Crash simulation is a cornerstone of modern vehicle development because it reduces the need for costly physical prototypes, accelerates safety-driven design iteration, and increasingly supports virtual testing workflows. At the same time, modeling structural crash mechanics remains exceptionally challenging: the response is governed by nonlinear contact, large deformation, material plasticity, failure, and complex multi-body interactions evolving over space and time on high-resolution finite-element meshes. In this work, we introduce \textsc{CarCrashNet}, a public high-fidelity open-source benchmark for data-driven structural crash simulation. \textsc{CarCrashNet} combines component-scale and full-vehicle simulations in a multi-modal format, including more than 14{,}000 bumper-beam pole-impact simulations with varying geometry, materials, and boundary conditions, together with 825 full-vehicle crash simulations built from three industry-standard vehicle models of increasing structural complexity: Dodge Neon, Toyota Yaris, and Chevrolet Silverado. To establish the reliability of the benchmark, we validate our open-source finite-element workflow based on OpenRadioss against both experimental crash data and the commercial solver Ansys LS-DYNA. We also introduce \textsc{CrashSolver}, a machine-learning model designed for full-vehicle crash prediction from high-resolution finite-element crash data. We further perform extensive benchmarking across the released datasets and evaluate \textsc{CrashSolver} against state-of-the-art geometric deep learning and transformer-based neural solvers. Our results position \textsc{CarCrashNet} as a foundation for reproducible research in structural simulation, crashworthiness modeling, and AI-driven virtual crash testing. The dataset is available at https://github.com/Mohamedelrefaie/CarCrashNet.

</details>


### [403] [Almost Sure Convergence Rates of Stochastic Approximation and Reinforcement Learning via a Poisson-Moreau Drift](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07104)
*Xinyu Liu,Zixuan Xie,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对马尔可夫噪声下的随机逼近和强化学习算法，证明了几乎必然收敛速度。对于幂律学习率$O(n^{-η})$ ($η\in (1/2, 1)$)，得到接近$o(n^{1 - 2η})$的收敛速度；对于调和学习率$O(n^{-1})$，得到接近$o(n^{-1})$的收敛速度。核心创新是基于泊松方程校正的Lyapunov漂移构造。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 建立马尔可夫噪声下随机逼近和强化学习算法的几乎必然收敛速度是一个基础性的理论挑战，现有理论尚不完善。

Method: 提出一种新颖的Lyapunov漂移构造方法，将基于泊松方程的马尔可夫噪声校正技术与收缩映射的Moreau-envelope平滑技术相结合。

Result: 对于幂律学习率$O(n^{-η})$ ($η\in (1/2, 1)$)，获得接近$o(n^{1 - 2η})$的几乎必然收敛速度；对于调和学习率$O(n^{-1})$，获得接近$o(n^{-1})$的几乎必然收敛速度，后者接近i.i.d.噪声下的最优率$O(n^{-1}\log\log n)$。

Conclusion: 本文为马尔可夫噪声下收缩类随机逼近算法的几乎必然收敛速度提供了理论保证，方法具有推广潜力。

Abstract: Establishing almost sure convergence rates for stochastic approximation and reinforcement learning under Markovian noise is a fundamental theoretical challenge. We make progress towards this challenge for a class of stochastic approximation algorithms whose expected updates are contractive, a setting that arises in many reinforcement learning algorithms such as $Q$-learning and linear temporal difference learning. Specifically, for a power-law learning rate $O(n^{-η})$ with $η\in (1/2, 1)$, we obtain an almost sure convergence rate arbitrarily close to $o(n^{1 - 2η})$. For a harmonic learning rate $O(n^{-1})$, we obtain an almost sure convergence rate arbitrarily close to $o(n^{-1})$, which we argue is a strong result because it is close to the optimal rate $O(n^{-1}\log\log n)$ given by the law of the iterated logarithm (for a special case of i.i.d. noise). Key to our analysis is a novel Lyapunov drift construction that applies a Poisson-equation based correction for Markovian noise to the well-established Moreau-envelope smoothing for the contractive mapping.

</details>


### [404] [Theoretical Limits of Language Model Alignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07105)
*Lucas Monteiro Paes,Natalie Mackraz,Barry-John Theobald,Federico Danieli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文信息论角度推导了KL正则化对齐的最优奖励改进极限，发现最优奖励由Jeffreys散度而非$\sqrt{\text{KL}}$决定，并证明best-of-N接近理论极限而PPO/GRPO存在显著次优性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管RL对齐和best-of-N对齐被广泛使用，但KL预算下奖励改进的基本极限仍不清楚，缺乏理论理解。

Method: 通过信息论推导得到最优奖励改进的闭式表达式；将表达式重写为基模型下的协方差形式得到可实践估计器；扩展到代理奖励场景分析奖励黑客问题；证明奖励集成可缓解奖励黑客。

Result: 最优奖励改进由Jeffreys散度控制（而非$\sqrt{\text{KL}}$）；代理奖励下奖励黑客随奖励误差增大和KL惩罚减小而加剧；奖励集成可理论上缓解奖励黑客；best-of-N接近理论最优，PPO和GRPO显著次优。

Conclusion: 现有对齐方法（PPO/GRPO）远未达到信息论极限，需要算法改进以实现无高推理成本的最优对齐。

Abstract: Language model (LM) alignment improves model outputs to reflect human preferences while preserving the capabilities of the base model. The most common alignment approaches are (i) reinforcement learning, which maximizes the expected reward under a KL-divergence constraint, and (ii) best-of-$N$ alignment, which selects the highest-reward output among $N$ independent samples. Despite their widespread use, the fundamental limits of reward improvement under a KL budget remain poorly understood. We characterize the information-theoretic limits of KL-regularized alignment by deriving the maximum achievable expected reward gain for a fixed KL-divergence budget. Our first result provides a closed-form expression for the optimal reward improvement, governed by a Jeffreys divergence term rather than the $\sqrt{\texttt{KL}}$ used in prior analyses. We further reformulate this expression as a covariance under the base model, yielding a practical estimator that predicts achievable alignment gains from base model samples alone. We extend our analysis to the proxy reward setting, showing that the gap between ideal and proxy alignment (reward hacking) grows with the magnitude of reward error and when the KL penalty factor decreases. We then prove that reward ensembling mitigates reward hacking, providing a theoretical justification for this technique used in practice. Empirically, we compute the KL-reward Pareto frontier for two tasks for LMs, safety and summarization, and show that best-of-$N$ closely approaches the theoretical limit, while PPO and GRPO remain substantially suboptimal. Our theoretical results shed light on several empirically observed phenomena in the alignment literature and suggest that algorithmic improvements are needed to achieve optimal alignment without high inference costs.

</details>


### [405] [Solving Max-Cut to Global Optimality via Feasibility-Preserving Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07113)
*Hao Chen,Chendi Qian,Christopher Morris,Andrea Lodi,Can Li*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种针对Max-Cut问题的图神经网络，作为半定规划（SDP）松弛的轻量级神经代理，可直接嵌入精确分支定界框架，在自监督训练下将边界计算成本降低最多10.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在精确求解Max-Cut等组合优化问题时，分支定界算法中反复求解SDP松弛的计算代价过高，亟需一种高效的替代方案来加速边界计算。

Method: 设计了一种专用于Max-Cut的图神经网络，其更新步骤复杂度为O(n²+ne)，能够同时预测原始可行和对偶可行的SDP解，并通过Goemans-Williamson算法获得可行的Max-Cut解；模型采用自监督训练，无需已求解的SDP松弛作为标签。

Result: 相比使用最先进的SDP求解器Mosek，该架构在精确Max-Cut求解中可将边界计算成本降低最多10.6倍。

Conclusion: 展示了学习驱动的、保持有效性的替代模型在加速结构化凸松弛精确优化中的巨大潜力。

Abstract: Exact solution of hard combinatorial optimization problems often relies on strong convex relaxations, but solving these relaxations repeatedly inside a branch-and-bound algorithm can be prohibitively expensive. Hence, we consider this challenge for Max-Cut, where branch and bound commonly uses semidefinite programming (SDP) relaxations to bound subproblems. We propose a Max-Cut-specific graph neural network that serves as a principled, lightweight neural proxy for these SDP solvers and can be plugged directly into an exact branch-and-bound framework. The proposed architecture has update steps of complexity $\mathcal{O}(n^2 + ne)$, and predicts both primal- and dual-feasible SDP solutions. The primal SDP solutions yield feasible Max-Cut solutions via the Goemans--Williamson algorithm. In addition, it is trained in a self-supervised fashion without requiring solved SDP relaxations as labels. Empirically, we show that our architecture can substantially reduce the cost of bounding in exact Max-Cut solving by up to $10.6 \times$ compared with using the state-of-the-art SDP solver Mosek. Our work highlights the potential of learned, validity-preserving surrogates for accelerating exact optimization over structured convex relaxations.

</details>


### [406] [Where to Spend Rollouts: Hit-Utility Optimal Rollout Allocation for Group-Based RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07114)
*Tao Wang,Shuo Li,Yan Sun,Dongsheng Ding,Edgar Dobriban*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HORA是一种无学习的自适性rollout分配策略，通过最大化后验命中效用，在数学推理任务中优于固定分配方法GRPO。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: GRPO等分组策略给每个提示固定数量的rollout，导致对已饱和的提示过度分配计算资源，而对可能有帮助的提示探索不足，效率低下。

Method: 提出hit utility（后验概率）概念，并设计HORA（Hit-Utility Optimal Rollout Allocation）策略，在每个批次中最大化总体后验命中效用，自适应地重新分配rollout预算，无需学习。

Result: 在四个数学推理基准、三种模型规模上，HORA在10/12配置下保持Pass@1并提升Pass@K，一次平局、一次饱和例外；与RLOO兼容；均匀先验与五种学习先验相当。

Conclusion: HORA是一种高效、即插即用的自适应rollout分配方法，能在不改变下游奖励评估和优势估计器的前提下提升分组策略的计算效率。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a central paradigm for improving the reasoning capabilities of large language models. Group-based policy optimization methods, such as GRPO, typically allocate a fixed number of rollouts to every prompt. This uniform allocation can be inefficient: it over-allocates compute to prompts whose sampled groups are already saturated while under-exploring prompts for which additional samples may reveal useful correct trajectories. To address this limitation, we introduce hit utility, the posterior probability that at least one rollout in a proposed additional allocation for a prompt will be correct. Building on this notion, we propose Hit-Utility Optimal Rollout Allocation (HORA), a learning-free rollout allocation policy that maximizes total posterior hit utility within each allocation batch. HORA adaptively reallocates rollout budgets while leaving the downstream reward evaluation and group-based advantage estimator unchanged. Across four mathematical reasoning benchmarks and three model scales, HORA preserves comparable Pass@1 and improves Pass@K over compute-matched GRPO in ten of twelve model--benchmark configurations, with one tie and one saturated exception. It is also drop-in compatible with other group-based estimators such as RLOO. Ablation studies indicate that the uniform prior used by HORA is competitive with five prompt-conditioned learned-prior alternatives.

</details>


### [407] [Conformal-Style Quantile Analyses for Stochastic Bandits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07115)
*Chengyu Du,Mengfan Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对传统随机赌博机算法基于均值准则的局限性，本文提出ACP-UCB1算法，采用保形推断方法估计分布上尾端点，实现对数级上分位数遗憾上界，并通过实验验证性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多实际问题更关注臂的上尾表现（高分位数），而非均值，传统均值准则与上尾目标存在不匹配，需要新的算法框架。

Method: 提出ACP-UCB1算法，结合自适应保形估计（估计上尾端点F_j^{-1}(1-α/2)）与UCB型乐观奖励，通过奖励分位数集中性、分数分位数扰动参数化、自适应水平的确定性局域化等技术控制估计误差。

Result: 实现对数级上分位数遗憾界，单臂贡献为O(log n / Δ_j^{ACP})；给出与UCB1的度量特定遗憾分解对比，数值实验验证有效性和改进。

Conclusion: ACP-UCB1有效解决了均值与上尾目标不匹配问题，为关注高分位数表现的决策场景提供了理论基础与实用算法。

Abstract: Stochastic bandit algorithms are usually analyzed under a mean-reward criterion, yet many problems favor arms with strong upper-tail performance, which we study herein. For a fixed miscoverage level \(α\), the natural upper-tail target of arm \(j\) is the upper endpoint \(F_j^{-1}(1-α/2)\) of a central prediction interval. This target can rank arms differently from their means, creating a central mismatch with the classical bandit objective. To this end, we propose ACP-UCB1, a conformal-style policy that combines an adaptive conformal estimate of the upper endpoint with a UCB-type optimism bonus. The technical challenge is that the conformity scores used by ACP-UCB1 are recomputed from evolving empirical quantile estimates and evaluated at an adaptive level. We control this endpoint through reward-quantile concentration, a perturbation argument for recomputed score quantiles, and deterministic localization of the adaptive level. ACP-UCB1 achieves logarithmic upper-quantile regret with per-arm contribution \(O(\nicefrac{\log n}{Δ_j^{\mathrm{ACP}}})\). We also provide metric-specific regret decompositions comparing ACP-UCB1 with UCB1 and use numerical experiments to validate performance and improvement.

</details>


### [408] [Stabilized neural Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman solvers: Error analysis and applications in model-based reinforcement learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07116)
*Minseok Kim,Yeongjong Kim,Namkyeong Cho,Yeoneung Kim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对物理信息神经求解器在连续时间强化学习中的应用，建立了一种混合范式（神经网络值函数+有限差分HJB策略评估+随机连续配置点）的误差理论，证明了策略评估步骤的L2稳定性估计，并提供了有限样本配点证书和多步传播结果。实验在多个基准上验证了理论预测的误差趋势。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的物理信息神经求解器在连续时间基于模型的强化学习中，实际实现既非经典网格方法也非连续PDE的PINN，处于一种混合范式，但缺乏相应的误差理论支撑。本文旨在为这一混合范式建立严格的误差分析框架。

Method: 将有限差分解释为作用于神经网络的位移算子，证明了一个策略评估步的总体L2稳定性估计，误差界将残差误差、初始/外边界不匹配、策略不匹配和模型辨识误差分离开来。进一步给出了有限样本配点证书和通过贪心策略改进的条件多步传播结果。

Result: 在紧凑控制LQR（最高64维）、Allen-Cahn控制、摆、Hopper和3D四旋翼基准上，与有代表性的基于模型和无模型RL基线对比，展示了预测的残差、策略不匹配和学习模型误差趋势。

Conclusion: 该混合范式在保持稳定有限差分策略评估结构的同时避免了基于网格的值函数未知量，误差理论揭示了各误差源对整体稳定性的影响，实验验证了理论预测的有效性。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural solvers offer a promising route to model-based reinforcement learning in continuous time, where optimal feedback synthesis is governed by Hamilton--Jacobi--Bellman (HJB) equations. Practical implementations often occupy a regime that is neither a classical grid method nor a continuous-PDE PINN: the value function is represented by a neural network, finite-difference HJB policy-evaluation operators are evaluated by network queries at shifted points, and residuals are minimized by random continuous collocation. This regime preserves the stabilized finite-difference policy-evaluation structure while avoiding grid-based value unknowns. We develop an error theory for this hybrid regime. Interpreting finite differences as shift operators acting on neural networks, we prove a population $L^2$ stability estimate for one policy-evaluation step with learned dynamics. The bound separates residual error, initial and exterior-collar mismatch, policy mismatch, and model-identification error, with an explicit gradient amplification factor for learned dynamics, while the underlying linear evaluation stability remains free of hidden inverse-viscosity blow-up. We further give a finite-sample collocation certificate and a conditional multi-step propagation result through greedy policy improvement. Experiments on compact-control LQR upto 64 dimensions, Allen--Cahn control, pendulum, Hopper, and 3D quadrotor benchmarks compare against representative model-based and model-free RL baselines, demonstrating the predicted residual, policy-mismatch, and learned-model error trends.

</details>


### [409] [When Symbol Names Should Not Matter: A Logistic Theory of Fresh-Symbol Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07120)
*Wenjie Guan,Jelena Bradic*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文在固定标签分类的模板任务中，研究了Transformer是否通过抽象符号而非具体token名称进行推理。通过正则化核逻辑分类在Transformer核机制下的分析，将学习到的预测器分解为理想模板级分类器和有限样本扰动，并通过有色碰撞图编码token重叠，证明了新符号分类的高概率间隔转移保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究Transformer在模板任务中是否真正进行抽象符号推理，而非依赖具体token名称的表面关联。现有模板任务研究多聚焦于下一token预测，本文转向固定标签分类版本，要求模型学习对符号重命名不变的决策规则。

Method: 采用正则化核逻辑分类在Transformer核机制下进行分析；将预测器分解为理想模板级分类器与有限样本扰动项；通过有色碰撞图编码训练数据中偶然的token重叠；推导新符号分类的高概率间隔转移保证。

Result: 词汇大小控制碰撞的平均速率，但碰撞几何决定理想分类间隔是否保留；提出间隔-碰撞准则，用于识别提示策略何时能改善新符号泛化；合成模板实验验证了正则化、样本大小和Transformer核结构的作用。

Conclusion: 该扰动框架可扩展到抽象增强输入，为模板分析提供了更精细的标量多样性条件，并给出了提示策略提升泛化能力的一般性判据。

Abstract: Template tasks have emerged as a clean testbed for asking whether transformers reason with abstract symbols rather than concrete token names. We study the fixed-label classification version of this problem, where train and test examples share latent templates but may use disjoint vocabularies. Unlike next-token prediction, the model need not emit unseen symbols; it must learn a decision rule invariant to symbol renaming. We analyze regularized kernel logistic classification in the transformer-kernel regime. Our main result decomposes the learned predictor into an ideal template-level classifier and a finite-sample perturbation caused by accidental token overlaps in the training data. We encode these overlaps by a colored collision graph and prove high-probability margin-transfer guarantees for fresh-symbol classification. This perspective extends template-based analyses to logistic classification and refines scalar diversity conditions: vocabulary size controls the average rate of collisions, but collision geometry controls whether the ideal classification margin is preserved. More broadly, the same perturbation framework applies to abstraction-augmented inputs, yielding a general margin-versus-collision criterion for identifying when prompting strategies improve fresh-symbol generalization. Synthetic template experiments illustrate the predicted roles of regularization, sample size, and transformer-kernel structure.

</details>


### [410] [Convergence and Emergence of In-Context Reinforcement Learning with Chain of Thought](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07123)
*Zixuan Xie,Xinyu Liu,Rohan Chandra,Shangtong Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文首次理论上证明，在线性Transformer和策略评估设定下，Chain-of-Thought (CoT)生成过程等价于重复执行时序差分学习更新，且策略评估误差随CoT长度几何级衰减，最终饱和于上下文长度决定的统计下限。同时证明所需Transformer参数是预训练损失的全局最小值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近期实证表明CoT能增强上下文强化学习（ICRL）能力，但缺乏理论理解。本文旨在从理论上揭示CoT如何与ICRL相互作用。

Method: 在策略评估设定下，使用线性Transformer进行分析。通过数学推导证明CoT生成过程等价于重复执行TD学习更新；提供有限样本收敛分析；证明所需Transformer参数是预训练损失的全局最小化器。

Result: 1) CoT生成等价于重复执行TD更新；2) 策略评估误差随CoT长度几何衰减，最终饱和于上下文长度决定的下限；3) 所需Transformer参数是预训练损失的全局最小值。

Conclusion: 为CoT增强ICRL提供了理论支撑，解释了CoT通过重复执行TD更新来实现自适应，并证明了相应参数可以从预训练中自然涌现。

Abstract: In-context reinforcement learning (ICRL) refers to the ability of RL agents to adapt to new tasks at inference time without parameter updates by conditioning on additional context. Recent empirical studies further demonstrate that Chain-of-Thought (CoT) generation can amplify this ICRL capability. This paper is the first to provide a theoretical understanding on how CoT interacts with ICRL. We conduct our analysis in a policy evaluation setup with linear Transformer. We prove that with specific Transformer parameters, the CoT generation process is equivalent to repeatedly executing temporal difference learning updates. Additionally, we provide finite sample convergence analysis showing that the policy evaluation error decreases geometrically with CoT length and eventually saturates at a statistical floor determined by the context length. We also prove that the desired Transformer parameters are a global minimizer of the pretraining loss, providing a theoretical understanding on the empirical emergence of those parameters.

</details>


### [411] [The Position Curse: LLMs Struggle to Locate the Last Few Items in a List](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07127)
*Zhanqi Zhang,Hua-Dong Xiong,Robert C. Wilson,Mikio Aoi,Marcelo G. Mattar,Li Ji-An*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: LLM在长文本中寻找单一事实表现优秀，但在短列表中检索最后几个项目时表现糟糕（位置诅咒）。研究发现后向检索能力远低于前向检索，LoRA微调可改善但远未饱和。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 发现并系统表征LLM在短列表位置检索中的"位置诅咒"现象，即模型能在大海捞针（长文本中找单一事实）中表现优异，却在简单短列表的后向检索中反复失败。

Method: 设计了两类互补查询任务：给定位置（正向或反向偏移）检索对应项目，以及给定项目返回其位置。构建了专门的位置训练数据集PosBench，并通过LoRA微调进行能力评估。

Result: 所有模型的后向检索能力显著落后于前向检索；LoRA微调虽能同时改善前后向检索能力并泛化到代码理解基准PyIndex，但绝对性能远未饱和。

Conclusion: 基于位置的检索能力是当前LLM的关键短板，随着编码智能体处理大型代码库的需求增加，这应成为未来预训练目标和模型设计的核心关注点。

Abstract: Modern large language models (LLMs) can find a needle in a haystack (locating a single relevant fact buried among hundreds of thousands of irrelevant tokens) with near-saturated accuracy, yet fail to retrieve the last few items in a short list. We call this failure the Position Curse. For instance, even in a two-line code snippet, Claude Opus 4.6 misidentifies the second-to-last line most of the time. To characterize this failure, we evaluated two complementary queries: given a position in a sequence (of letters or words), retrieve the corresponding item; and given an item, return its position. Each position is specified as a forward or backward offset from an anchor, either an endpoint of the list (its start or end) or another item in the list. Across both open-source and frontier closed-source models, backward retrieval substantially lags forward retrieval. To test whether this capability can be rescued by post-training, we constructed PosBench, a position-focused training dataset. LoRA fine-tuning improves both forward and backward retrieval and generalizes to a held-out code-understanding benchmark (PyIndex), yet absolute performance remains far from saturated. As LLM coding agents increasingly operate over large codebases where precise indexing becomes essential for code understanding and editing, position-based retrieval emerges as a key capability for future pretraining objectives and model design.

</details>


### [412] [Simple KNN-Based Outlier Detection Achieves Robust Clustering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07130)
*Tianle Jiang,Yufa Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明，在最优聚类大小满足实际假设的条件下，简单地移除具有较大K近邻距离的点，即可实现鲁棒k-Means到标准k-Means的常数因子约简，性能可与更复杂的方法媲美。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 鲁棒k-Means（带离群点的k-Means）在实际应用中至关重要，但经典离群点检测启发式方法在鲁棒k-Means中的效果缺乏理论与实践的理解。

Method: 基于K近邻距离移除离群点，将鲁棒k-Means问题约简为标准k-Means问题，无需引入额外中心或丢弃多余离群点。

Result: 理论：在最优聚类大小满足假设下，该方法实现常数因子近似保证；实验：在真实数据集上，聚类代价和运行时间优于或匹配多种更复杂的算法。

Conclusion: 简单的KNN启发式方法在鲁棒聚类中出人意料地有效，为连接离群点检测与聚类技术提供了新机会。

Abstract: Being robust to the presence of outliers is crucial for applying clustering algorithms in practice. In the $\textit{robust $k$-Means}$ problem (i.e., $k$-Means with outliers), the goal is to remove $z$ outliers and minimize the $k$-Means cost on the remaining points. Despite the close connection between robust $k$-Means and outlier detection, both theoretical and empirical understanding of the effectiveness of $\textit{classic outlier detection heuristics}$ for robust $k$-Means remains limited. In this paper, we prove that under a practical assumption on the optimal cluster sizes, simply removing points with large $K$-Nearest-Neighbor distances achieves performance comparable to prior work in terms of approximation guarantees: it yields a constant-factor reduction from robust $k$-Means to standard $k$-Means, without introducing additional centers or discarding extra outliers, as is commonly required by existing approaches. Empirically, experiments on real-world datasets show that our method outperforms or matches several more sophisticated algorithms in terms of clustering cost and runtime. These results demonstrate that simple KNN-based heuristics can be surprisingly effective for robust clustering, highlighting new opportunities to bridge techniques from outlier detection and clustering.

</details>


### [413] [GAD in the Wild: Benchmarking Graph Anomaly Detection under Realistic Deployment Challenges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07133)
*Jingjing Zhou,Shiyu Huang,Qing Qing,Zuquan Yuan,Huafei Huang,Ziqi Xu,Mingliang Hou,Xikun Zhang,Renqiang Luo,Ivan Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个多维度的图异常检测（GAD）基准测试，系统评估了GAD模型在百万级规模、极端异常稀疏和缺失节点属性三种实际部署挑战下的表现，发现现有模型在实验室环境下的强性能无法保证生产环境中的鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GAD基准测试局限于小规模、异常比例相对平衡的图数据，与真实部署场景之间存在巨大差距，缺乏对大规模、极端异常稀疏和属性缺失等实际挑战的系统评估。

Method: 从5个多样化图数据（含两个原生工业级数据集，节点超370万）衍生出一系列可控基准变体，系统评估9种代表性GAD模型在百万级规模、极端异常稀疏（如0.1%异常率）和缺失节点属性三种挑战下的表现。

Result: 三大主要发现：(1)大多数GNN方法因内存需求过大无法扩展到百万节点图；(2)在真实异常比例（如0.1%）下检测性能急剧下降，常导致零召回率；(3)基于重构的模型对属性填充策略高度敏感。

Conclusion: 实验室环境下的强性能不能保证生产环境的鲁棒性，该基准测试可作为诊断平台，促进面向大规模、不完美图的鲁棒且可扩展的GAD系统发展。

Abstract: Graph Anomaly Detection (GAD) is a critical task in graph machine learning with vital applications in financial fraud detection and social platform governance. However, existing GAD benchmarks are often restricted to small-scale, curated graphs with relatively balanced anomaly ratios, leaving a substantial gap between academic evaluation and real-world deployment. To bridge this gap, we present a multi-dimensional benchmark that systematically evaluates GAD models under three deployment-relevant challenges: million-scale graphs, extreme anomaly scarcity, and missing node attributes. We derive a family of controlled benchmark variants from five diverse graphs, including two native industrial-scale datasets with over 3.7 million nodes. Our extensive evaluation of nine representative GAD models reveals three major limitations: (1) most GNN-based methods fail to scale to million-node graphs due to prohibitive memory requirements; (2) detection performance drops sharply under realistic anomaly ratios (e.g., 0.1\%), often resulting in zero recall; and (3) reconstruction-based models are highly sensitive to attribute imputation strategies. Our findings suggest that strong performance in laboratory settings does not guarantee robustness in production environments. We release this benchmark and empirical evaluation as a diagnostic testbed to promote the development of robust and scalable GAD systems for large-scale, imperfect graphs encountered in practice. Code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/Benchmark_GAD-E7A3.

</details>


### [414] [Adaptive Negative Reinforcement for LLM Reasoning:Dynamically Balancing Correction and Diversity in RLVR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07137)
*Yash Ingle,Jaival Chauhan,Ankit Yadav,Sudhakar Mishra*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两种负样本强化扩展方法：A-NSR（自适应时间调度负强化）和CW-NSR（置信度加权负强化），通过动态调整错误惩罚力度来提升大语言模型的推理能力，在MATH、AIME 2025和AMC23等推理数据集上验证了有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有负样本强化（NSR）方法在整个训练过程中使用固定惩罚，且对所有错误回答一视同仁，缺乏对错误重要性的差异化处理，限制了模型推理能力的进一步提升。

Method: 提出两种扩展：1）A-NSR：基于时间依赖的调度函数，初期重点纠正错误以稳定模型，后期转向更精细的更新；2）CW-NSR：基于模型归一化序列似然性分配惩罚权重，对高置信度的错误路径施以更大惩罚，对探索性不确定错误减轻惩罚。

Result: 在MATH、AIME 2025和AMC23等困难推理数据集上，使用Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B架构进行评估，展示了所提方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 这两种机制通过先验引导的概率重分布实现token级更新，同时提供了对过拟合的自然防御，在推理任务上优于固定惩罚的NSR方法。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a highly effective method for improving the reasoning abilities of Large Language Models (LLMs). Recent research shows that Negative Sample Reinforcement (NSR) -- which focuses on penalizing incorrect steps rather than simply rewarding correct ones -- can match or even exceed the performance of more complex frameworks like PPO and GRPO across the entire Pass@k spectrum. However, current NSR techniques usually apply a fixed penalty throughout the training process and treat every incorrect response with the same weight.
  To address these limitations, we propose two extensions to the NSR framework: Adaptive Negative Sample Reinforcement. Rather than using a fixed update rule, A-NSR uses time-dependent scheduling functions. In the initial training phases, the system focuses heavily on correcting errors to stabilize the model. As training continues, it shifts toward more subtle and controlled updates. We also introduce Confidence-Weighted Negative Reinforcement, which operates on the principle that different mistakes carry different levels of importance. CW-NSR assigns specific penalty weights based on the model's normalized sequence likelihood. If the model is highly confident in a wrong path, it receives a larger penalty and for uncertain errors -- where the model is effectively exploring -- are penalized less strictly. Our formal analysis shows how these mechanisms govern token-level updates, allowing the model to leverage prior-guided probability redistribution while providing a natural defense against overfitting. We evaluated these methods on difficult reasoning datasets, including MATH, AIME 2025, and AMC23, using the Qwen2.5-Math-1.5B architecture.

</details>


### [415] [Regret-Oracle Complexity Tradeoffs in Agnostic Online Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07155)
*Idan Attias,Steve Hanneke,Arvind Ramaswami*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于弱一致性预言机（weak-consistency oracle）的自适应在线学习算法，通过动态剪枝非可实现标签序列，将预言机复杂度从双指数级降低到 O(T^{d_VC+1})，同时保持近最优的预期遗憾，并形式化了遗憾-预言机复杂度之间的权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典agnostic在线学习依赖于Littlestone的SOA算法，但SOA计算上不可行。现有oracle-efficient方法虽然实现了近最优遗憾，但预言机复杂度高达双指数级 O(T^{2^{O(d_LD)}})，亟需降低复杂度。

Method: 提出一种自适应动态的agnostic-to-realizable归约方法，利用VC维（d_VC）限制动态维护的活动路径数量，通过弱一致性预言机（仅判断数据集是否可实现）在线剪枝非可实现标签序列，从而大幅降低查询复杂度。

Result: 预言机复杂度从双指数级 O(T^{2^{O(d_LD)}}) 降至 O(T^{d_VC+1})，同时保持近最优预期遗憾；给出了遗憾-预言机复杂度的上界和下界，证明当查询预算 Q = o(√T) 时，遗憾下界为 Ω(T/Q)。

Conclusion: 该方法在理论上显著改进了oracle-efficient在线学习的效率，首次将弱一致性预言机引入agnostic学习并取得突破，同时揭示了遗憾与查询复杂度之间的本质权衡。

Abstract: Agnostic online learning is classically solved via a reduction to the realizable setting, utilizing Littlestone's Standard Optimal Algorithm (SOA) as a base learner. However, the SOA is computationally intractable to execute even for a single round. To overcome this barrier, recent work in oracle-efficient online learning replaces the SOA with a realizable base learner that accesses the concept class exclusively through an offline empirical risk minimization (ERM) oracle. While such agnostic learners achieve near-optimal expected regret, they suffer from a doubly-exponential oracle complexity of $O\big(T^{2^{O(d_\mathrm{LD})}}\big)$, where $d_\mathrm{LD}$ is the Littlestone dimension and $T$ is the number of rounds. In this work, we significantly improve this oracle complexity while relying on an even weaker primitive: a weak-consistency oracle, which merely decides whether a given labeled dataset is realizable. At the core of our approach is an adaptive and dynamic agnostic-to-realizable reduction that actively prunes non-realizable label sequences on the fly. By using the VC dimension ($d_\mathrm{VC}$) to bound the number of dynamically maintained active paths, our algorithm reduces the total query complexity down to $O(T^{d_\mathrm{VC}+1})$ while perfectly preserving near-optimal expected regret. Crucially, this dynamic pruning also yields a memory reduction over the standard reduction. Furthermore, we formally quantify the regret--oracle complexity tradeoff, providing upper bounds that smoothly interpolate between restricted query budgets and attainable expected regret. We complement these with lower bounds proving that any learner restricted to $Q = o(\sqrt{T})$ queries must suffer an expected regret of $Ω(T/Q)$.

</details>


### [416] [Learned Lagrangian Models of PDEs via Euler-Lagrange Residual Minimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07157)
*Lyra Zhornyak,Eric Forgoston,M. Ani Hsieh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种利用学习到的连续拉格朗日量直接预测偏微分方程动力学的方法，通过基于优化的近辛积分器实现稳定长程预测，无需重新训练即可推广到空间变化动力学和任意边界条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数值积分器用于解析模型时，模型误差（相位误差）与积分误差（守恒误差）耦合在一起。对于学习模型，需要解耦这两种误差以实现稳定长程预测。此外，固定离散化方式的全局耦合减慢了时空步进并增加了学习难度。

Method: 开发了一种基于优化的积分器，通过最小化平方欧拉-拉格朗日残差，在局部时空斑块上构建无网格近辛结构。采用雅可比迭代实现域大小线性扩展，对学习网络无结构要求，可结合现有物理引导机器学习方法。

Result: 在双摆、一维波动方程和二维波动方程上验证，该方法在误差上与经典辛方法相当，且能泛化到空间变化动力学和任意边界条件而无需重新训练。

Conclusion: 该方法实现了学习模型与辛积分解耦，为利用保守结构进行稳定长程预测提供了可行方案，且具有良好的可扩展性和泛化能力。

Abstract: We present the first method to directly use a learned continuous Lagrangian to forecast the dynamics of systems governed by partial differential equations, exploiting the inherent conservative structure to achieve stable long-range predictions. We develop an optimization-based integrator that minimizes the squared Euler--Lagrange residual via a mesh-free near-symplectic construction on local space-time patches. Different from integrators for analytical models, integrators for learned models should decouple model error (phase error) from integration error (conservation error). By relying on optimization rather than time-stepping, we bypass the global coupling inherent to fixed discretizations, which slows time- and space-stepping and complicates learning. Our method scales linearly with domain size via Jacobi iteration, and places no structural requirements on the learned network, allowing it to be coupled with existing physics-guided machine learning (ML) methods. We validate our approach on a learned representation of a double pendulum, a one-dimensional wave equation, and a two-dimensional wave equation. Our method achieves error comparable to classical symplectic methods while generalizing to spatially varying dynamics and arbitrary boundary conditions without retraining.

</details>


### [417] [Neurosymbolic Imitation Learning with Human Guidance: A Privileged Information Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07166)
*Nikhilesh Prabhakar,Varun Balaji,Athresh Karanam,Kristian Kersting,Sriraam Natarajan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种神经符号方法，结合神经网络处理高维数据的优势和符号方法泛化能力强的特点，并利用训练时可用的特权信息（如视线数据）来提升模仿学习效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 纯神经网络方法需要大量样本且容易过拟合，纯符号方法无法有效处理高维数据，现有方法各有局限。

Method: 提出神经符号（neuro-symbolic）方法，融合神经网络与符号推理，并在训练阶段利用特权信息（视线数据）来增强学习效果。

Result: 实验验证了该方法在有效性、效率和泛化能力上的优势。

Conclusion: 神经符号方法能够同时处理高维数据并实现良好泛化，且能有效利用训练时的额外信息。

Abstract: Imitation learning is widely used for learning to act in complex environments. While pure neural-based methods handle high dimensional data effectively, they suffer from the requirement of large number of samples and are prone to overfitting. Pure symbolic approaches, while generalize well, do not handle high-dimensional data effectively. We propose a neurosymbolic approach that achieves the best of both worlds, i.e, handling high-dimensional data while achieving generalization. The key advantage of our approach is that it can effectively exploit additional privileged information that is available only during training (in our case, gaze data). Our empirical evaluations demonstrate the effectiveness, efficiency and the generalization capability of our proposed approach.

</details>


### [418] [Cost-Ordered Feasibility for Multi-Armed Bandits with Cost Subsidy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07171)
*Ishank Juneja,Carlee Joe-Wong,Osman Yağan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究带成本补贴的多臂老虎机问题(MAB-CS)，目标是在保证最低奖励质量约束的前提下最小化成本。提出COF算法，通过智能组合所有臂的样本来评估廉价臂的可行性，并给出了实例依赖的上下界分析，在MovieLens和Goodreads数据集上验证了优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MAB追求最大化累积奖励，但在许多实际应用中，目标是在满足最小奖励约束的条件下最小化成本。现有方法未能有效处理奖励约束相对于未知最优奖励的设定，缺乏对问题结构（成本已知）的深入利用。

Method: 提出Cost-Ordered Feasibility (COF)算法，核心思想是智能组合来自所有臂的样本来评估廉价臂是否可行（满足奖励约束），利用已知成本信息进行有序探索。

Result: 理论上证明了实例依赖的下界，严格泛化了现有界限；给出了COF在期望累积成本和奖励遗憾上的上界；在MovieLens、Goodreads数据集及合成实例上，COF优于基线方法。

Conclusion: COF不仅在理论上实现了更优的遗憾上界，也在实证上展示了更优异的性能，有效解决了带质量约束的成本最小化MAB问题。

Abstract: The classic multi-armed bandit (MAB) problem tackles the challenge of accruing maximum reward while making decisions under uncertainty. However, in applications, often the goal is to minimize cost subject to a constraint on the minimum permissible reward, an objective captured by multi-armed bandits with cost-subsidy (MAB-CS). Of interest to this paper is the setting where the quality (reward) constraint is specified relative to the unknown best reward and the cost of each arm is known. We characterize the expected sub-optimal samples required by any policy by proving instance-dependent lower bounds that offer new insight into the problem and are a strict generalization of prior bounds. Then, we propose an algorithm called Cost-Ordered Feasibility (COF) that leverages our insight and intelligently combine samples from all arms to gauge the feasibility of a cheap arm. Thereafter, we analyze COF to establish instance-dependent upper bounds on its expected cumulative cost and quality regret, i.e., relative to the cheapest feasible arm. Finally, we empirically validate the merits of COF, comparing it to baselines from the literature through extensive simulation experiments on the MovieLens and Goodreads datasets as well as representative synthetic instances. Not only does our paper develop qualitatively better theoretical regret upper bounds, but COF also convincingly demonstrates improved empirical performance.

</details>


### [419] [Learning Multi-Relational Graph Representations for DNA Methylation-Based Biological Age Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07175)
*Qing Qing,Xikun Zhang,Zhongyuan Zhang,Jiarui Liu,Xingtong Yu,Xiaotao Shen,Ziqi Xu,Qixin Zhang,Zhe Wang,Renqiang Luo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RelAge-GNN，一个多关系图神经网络框架，利用DNA甲基化数据预测生物年龄。该方法构建三种互补图（共甲基化、基因组共定位、基因级关联），通过可学习门控机制融合各GNN分支的表征，在大型数据集上取得竞争性结果，并能更好地检测疾病队列中的年龄加速现象。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于DNA甲基化的年龄预测方法大多将CpG位点视为独立特征，忽略了它们之间复杂的生物学关系。作者认为建模这些关系可以提升预测性能并提供生物学洞察。

Method: 1) 构建三种互补图：共甲基化图、基因组共定位图、基因级关联图；2) 每种图由独立的GNN分支建模；3) 使用可学习门控机制自适应融合各分支的表征；4) 在大型数据集上进行训练和评估。

Result: 在大型数据集上达到竞争性精度，与真实年龄的相关性强于现有方法；在多种疾病队列中对年龄加速现象具有更好的检测灵敏度。

Conclusion: RelAge-GNN通过显式建模CpG位点间的多关系结构，不仅提升了年龄预测的准确性和相关性，还增强了对疾病相关年龄加速的敏感性，并通过可解释性分析提供了生物学上有意义的见解。

Abstract: Aging clocks aim to estimate biological age, a measure of physiological state distinct from chronological age, from observable biomarkers, and are widely used for health assessment and disease analysis. DNA methylation is a particularly informative biomarker due to its stability and strong association with aging, and recent learning-based approaches have improved predictive performance. However, most existing methods treat CpG sites as independent features, overlooking the complex and heterogeneous biological relationships among them. We propose RelAge-GNN, a multi-relational graph neural network framework for DNA methylation-based age prediction. Our method constructs three complementary graphs capturing co-methylation patterns, genomic co-localization, and gene-level associations among CpG sites. Each graph is modeled by an independent GNN branch, and a learnable gating mechanism adaptively fuses the resulting representations. Experiments on large-scale datasets show that RelAge-GNN achieves competitive accuracy and stronger correlation with chronological age compared to state-of-the-art methods. Moreover, the model exhibits improved sensitivity in detecting age acceleration across diverse disease cohorts, highlighting its potential utility for disease characterization. Finally, through post hoc interpretability analyses, we quantify the contributions of different relational structures and CpG sites, providing biologically meaningful insights and suggesting potential directions for aging-related research. Our code is available at: https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RelAge-GNN-F1E3/.

</details>


### [420] [HyperEyes: Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parallel Multimodal Search Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07177)
*Guankai Li,Jiabin Chen,Yi Xu,Xichen Zhang,Yuan Lu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出HyperEyes，一种并行多模态搜索智能体，通过并行化多实体搜索、双粒度效率感知强化学习框架(TRACE宏级奖励+On-Policy Distillation微级信号)以及新基准IMEB，在保持高准确率的同时大幅减少工具调用轮次(5.3x)。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多模态搜索智能体顺序处理目标实体，每个实体需一次工具调用，当查询分解为独立子检索时积累冗余交互轮次。作者认为有效智能体应"搜索更广而非更长"——在一轮中并发调度多个基于实体的查询。

Method: 两阶段训练：(1) 冷启动阶段——并行适配数据合成管道(Parallel-Amenable Data Synthesis Pipeline)生成视觉多实体和文本多约束查询轨迹，通过渐进式拒绝采样(Progressive Rejection Sampling)筛选；(2) 核心贡献——双粒度效率感知强化学习框架(Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware RL)：宏观层面提出TRACE(轨迹级奖励，参考值随训练单调收紧以抑制冗余工具调用)；微观层面采用On-Policy Distillation(从外部教师模型注入密集token级纠正信号，缓解稀疏结果奖励的信用分配问题)。

Result: 在6个基准上，HyperEyes-30B超越最强可比开源智能体9.9%准确率，同时工具调用轮次平均减少5.3倍。引入新基准IMEB(300例人工标注实例)联合评估搜索能力与效率。

Conclusion: 并行化多实体搜索+效率感知强化学习可显著提升多模态智能体的准确率和推理效率，验证了"搜索更广而非更长"的核心论点。

Abstract: Existing multimodal search agents process target entities sequentially, issuing one tool call per entity and accumulating redundant interaction rounds whenever a query decomposes into independent sub-retrievals. We argue that effective multimodal agents should search wider rather than longer: dispatching multiple grounded queries concurrently within a round. To this end, we present HyperEyes, a parallel multimodal search agent that fuses visual grounding and retrieval into a single atomic action, enabling concurrent search across multiple entities while treating inference efficiency as a first-class training objective. HyperEyes is trained in two stages. For cold-start supervision, we develop a Parallel-Amenable Data Synthesis Pipeline covering visual multi-entity and textual multi-constraint queries, curating efficiency-oriented trajectories via Progressive Rejection Sampling. Building on this, our central contribution, a Dual-Grained Efficiency-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework, operates at two levels. At the macro level, we propose TRACE (Tool-use Reference-Adaptive Cost Efficiency), a trajectory-level reward whose reference is monotonically tightened during training to suppress superfluous tool calls without restricting genuine multi-hop search. At the micro level, we adapt On-Policy Distillation to inject dense token-level corrective signals from an external teacher on failed rollouts, mitigating the credit-assignment deficiency of sparse outcome rewards. Since existing benchmarks evaluate accuracy as the sole metric, omitting inference cost, we introduce IMEB, a human-curated benchmark of 300 instances that jointly evaluates search capability and efficiency. Across six benchmarks, HyperEyes-30B surpasses the strongest comparable open-source agent by 9.9% in accuracy with 5.3x fewer tool-call rounds on average.

</details>


### [421] [Star Elastic: Many-in-One Reasoning LLMs with Efficient Budget Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07182)
*Ali Taghibakhshi,Ruisi Cai,Saurav Muralidharan,Sharath Turuvekere Sreenivas,Aditya Vavre,Ameya Sunil Mahabaleshwarkar,Bilal Kartal,Sheldon Liang,Marcin Chochowski,Zijia Chen,Akhiad Bercovich,Ran Zilberstein,Ran El-Yaniv,Yonatan Geifman,Daniel Korzekwa,Yoshi Suhara,Oluwatobi Olabiyi,Ashwath Aithal,Nima Tajbakhsh,Pavlo Molchanov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Star Elastic 是一种高效的后训练方法，能在一次训练中为父模型生成多个嵌套子模型，并通过弹性预算控制支持推理阶段动态选择子模型，显著降低成本并提升精度-延迟权衡。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM家族训练（从头训练或迭代压缩）成本高昂且效率低下，每个模型需要单独训练；同时静态架构在推理时无法根据token难度动态分配计算资源，导致资源浪费。

Method: Star Elastic 在单个后训练流程中向父推理模型添加N个嵌套子模型，支持沿SSM、嵌入通道、MoE、FFN四个轴进行嵌套；通过端到端可训练路由器学习嵌套子模型，并采用基于课程的知识蒸馏。此外还扩展到量化感知蒸馏（QAD）以支持量化场景。

Result: 在Nemotron Nano v3 (30B/3.6A)上生成23B (2.8A)和12B (2.0A)变体，仅用160B训练token。嵌套模型性能与独立训练基线相当或更优，相比从头预训练降低360倍成本，相比SOTA压缩降低7倍。弹性预算控制在精度-延迟帕累托前沿上提升16%精度和1.9倍延迟降低。

Conclusion: Star Elastic 通过一次性后训练生成弹性嵌套模型家族，在显著降低训练成本的同时，通过动态阶段模型选择实现了更好的精度-延迟权衡，并支持量化部署。

Abstract: Training a family of large language models (LLMs), either from scratch or via iterative compression, is prohibitively expensive and inefficient, requiring separate training runs for each model in the family. In this paper, we introduce Star Elastic, a novel LLM post-training method that adds N nested submodels to a given parent reasoning model using the compute of one run (N-fold savings) via a single post-training job. Beyond reducing training costs, Star Elastic also addresses a fundamental limitation of efficient reasoning: the rigidity of static architectures, which forces the allocation of constant resources regardless of token difficulty. By unlocking elastic budget control, Star Elastic enables a novel inference scheme that uses different submodels for each reasoning phase (thinking and answering). Star Elastic supports (1) nesting along the SSM, embedding channel, MoE, and FFN axes, (2) learning nested submodels via an end-to-end trainable router, and (3) curriculum-based knowledge distillation. Building on the Nemotron Elastic framework, we apply Star Elastic to the NVIDIA Nemotron Nano models, with a particular focus on hybrid Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures: from Nemotron Nano v3 (30B/3.6A), we generate 23B (2.8A) and 12B (2.0A) variants with 160B training tokens. All nested models match or outperform independently trained baselines of comparable size and achieve a 360x reduction versus pretraining from scratch and a 7x reduction over state-of-the-art compression. Crucially, elastic budget control advances the accuracy-latency Pareto frontier, achieving up to 16% higher accuracy and 1.9x lower latency via dynamic per-phase model selection. We further extend Star Elastic to quantized regimes via Quantization-Aware Distillation (QAD), producing nested NVFP4 and FP8 elastic checkpoints that preserve zero-shot slicing while delivering smaller deployment footprints.

</details>


### [422] [Coupling Models for One-Step Discrete Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07193)
*Fred Zhangzhi Peng,Avishek Joey Bose,Anru R. Zhang,Alexander Tong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Coupling Models，一种一步离散生成模型，通过学习离散序列与高斯潜变量之间的直接耦合，在文本生成、生物序列设计和图像生成任务上显著优于现有一步基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散结构生成模型多依赖自回归解码或迭代精炼，效率较低，且已有的蒸馏方法需要预训练多步模型，连续流方法复杂且需手动指定数据-噪声耦合方式。作者希望设计一种高效的一步生成方法。

Method: 提出Coupling Models，构建离散序列与高斯潜变量之间的直接耦合，训练一个专用的解码器来逆转该耦合，实现单步生成样本，无需依赖预训练多步模型或复杂连续流。

Result: 在LM1B文本生成困惑度降低33%，Fly Brain增强子设计FBD降低18%，MNIST-Binary FID降低46%，均超越同领域最强一步基线方法。

Conclusion: 一步离散生成的有效性强烈依赖于解码前数据与噪声的耦合方式，Coupling Models证明了设计良好耦合的重要性。

Abstract: Generative modeling over discrete structures underpins applications across deep learning, from biological sequence design and code generation to large language models, yet generation often remains sequential, relying on autoregressive decoding or iterative refinement. In this work, we introduce Coupling Models(Coupling Models), a one-step discrete generative model that learns a direct coupling between discrete sequences and Gaussian latents. Unlike recent distillation methods that compress a pretrained multi-step sampler into a few steps, Coupling Model trains a purpose-built decoder to invert this coupling and generate samples in a single step. The model also avoids complex continuous flows over the simplex and hand-specified data-to-noise couplings. Empirically,Coupling Model improves the strongest one-step baselines in each domain: it reduces LM1B text-generation perplexity by 33% at its lowest-perplexity operating point, Fly Brain enhancer-design FBD by 18%, and MNIST-Binary FID by 46%. These results suggest that effective one-step discrete generation depends strongly on how data and noise are coupled before decoding. Code is available at https://github.com/pengzhangzhi/Coupling-Models.

</details>


### [423] [Arrow: A Foundation Model for Causal Discovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07204)
*Ryan Thompson,He Zhao,Daniel M. Steinberg,Edwin V. Bonilla*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Arrow，一个基于Transformer的零样本因果发现基础模型，通过将有向无环图分解为无向骨架和拓扑排序来保证无环性，在多样化的合成数据上大规模预训练后，能在新数据集上实现快速、准确的零样本因果发现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的因果发现方法通常需要针对每个新数据集重新运行优化过程，计算成本高且难以泛化。作者希望开发一个可复用的预训练模型，能够在新数据集上直接进行零样本因果发现，无需重新训练。

Method: Arrow将有向无环图(DAG)分解为无向骨架和拓扑排序两部分（保证无环性），使用Transformer架构对变量进行上下文编码，分别预测骨架边的概率和节点顺序分数，并通过端到端可微的有向边复合似然进行监督训练。

Result: 在多种分布内/分布外合成、半合成和真实数据集上，Arrow匹配或超越了现有因果发现方法，且推理成本远低于竞争方法。

Conclusion: 大规模预训练于多样化合成数据可以产生零样本因果发现模型，具有快速、准确、可复用的优势，表明预训练范式在因果发现领域具有巨大潜力。

Abstract: We introduce Arrow, a foundation model for zero-shot causal discovery on observational tabular data. Arrow factorizes a directed acyclic graph into an undirected skeleton and a topological order, guaranteeing acyclicity by construction. Given a new dataset, it uses a transformer-based architecture to contextualize variables within and across observations, then predicts skeleton edge probabilities and node order scores that together define a graph. Arrow is trained in a supervised fashion on synthetic datasets with ground-truth graphs, using an end-to-end differentiable directed edge composite likelihood induced by the skeleton-order factorization. The training distribution spans diverse graph families, functional forms, noise models, and dataset shapes. Across in- and out-of-distribution synthetic, semi-synthetic, and real datasets, Arrow matches or outperforms existing causal discovery methods at substantially lower inference cost than competitive alternatives. Our results demonstrate that large-scale pretraining on diverse synthetic data can yield zero-shot causal discovery models that are fast, accurate, and reusable on new datasets.

</details>


### [424] [FAME: Forecasting Academic Impact via Continuous-Time Manifold Evolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07208)
*Jianrong Ding,Jianyuan Zhong,Zhengyan Shi,Qiang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FAME框架，通过动态时空建模预测学术论文影响力，实验表明该方法显著优于现有LLM评估器。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: LLM在评估研究想法时存在根本性困难，因为想法的真正影响需要多年才能显现。作者通过预测手稿影响力这一可验证的代理任务来评估LLM的判断能力。

Method: 提出FAME框架，将论文映射到由文本特征和知识流图驱动的动态潜在空间中，通过学习几何约束使高影响力手稿与其领域的前沿方向对齐。

Result: 在3200篇arXiv论文上的实验表明，FAME在多维影响力预测上持续且显著优于最先进的LLM评估器。将FAME的动态几何信号整合到LLM中也显著提升了其预测性能。

Conclusion: 手稿影响力预测可作为有用的可量化代理基准，FAME作为面向轨迹的自动化科学评估基础框架具有强大潜力。

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly used to brainstorm and evaluate research ideas, yet assessing such judgments is fundamentally difficult because the true impact of a new idea may take years to emerge. We address this challenge by using the impact forecasting of human-authored manuscripts as a verifiable proxy task. In a prospective forecasting study, we find that frontier LLMs fail to reliably distinguish high-impact papers from ordinary publications, suggesting that static text-based judging is insufficient for scientific evaluation. To address this limitation, we propose $\textbf{FAME}$ ($\underline{\text{F}}$orecasting $\underline{\text{A}}$cademic Impact via Continuous-Time $\underline{\text{M}}$anifold $\underline{\text{E}}$volution), a spatiotemporal framework for modeling the dynamic trajectories of scientific topics. FAME projects papers into a dynamic latent space informed by textual features and a verified knowledge-flow graph, learning geometric constraints that align impactful manuscripts with the forward momentum of their fields. Experiments on 3,200 arXiv papers across three fast-evolving subfields show that FAME consistently and substantially outperforms state-of-the-art LLM evaluators in prospective multidimensional impact forecasting. Furthermore, integrating FAME's dynamic geometric signals into LLMs significantly improves their forecasting performance. These results support manuscript impact forecasting as a useful, measurable proxy benchmark and position FAME as a strong, trajectory-aware foundation for automated scientific evaluation.

</details>


### [425] [Experience Sharing in Mutual Reinforcement Learning for Heterogeneous Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07244)
*Xiaoze Liu,Dhananjay Ram,Yuting Zhang,Zhaoyang Zhang,Wei Xia,Stefano Soatto*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了多智能体强化学习后训练框架Mutual Reinforcement Learning，允许多种异构LLM策略在保持各自参数、目标和分词器的同时交换经验，并通过三种探针实验（PRP、XGRPO、SGT）分析了不同经验共享方式在稳定性-支持度权衡上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RL后训练方法通常假设单一同质策略，无法有效利用不同LLM家族间的异构经验共享。作者希望设计一个框架，让具有不同分词器、目标和参数的LLM策略能够互相对齐并交换经验，以提升后训练效果。

Method: 提出Mutual Reinforcement Learning框架，包含三个关键组件：Shared Experience Exchange (SEE)、Multi-Worker Resource Allocation (MWRA)、Tokenizer Heterogeneity Layer (THL)。在GRPO基础上设计三种探针：数据级共享PRP、价值级共享XGRPO、结果级共享SGT，并用contextual-bandit分析其稳定性-支持度权衡。

Result: 三种共享方式在稳定性-支持度权衡上位于不同位置：PRP面临密度比方差和THL残差成本，XGRPO保持on-policy支持度但改变标量基线，SGT提供朝向已验证同伴成功的rescue-set分数方向。在评估范围内，结果级共享（SGT）位于该权衡的有利位置。

Conclusion: Mutual Reinforcement Learning框架有效实现了异构LLM策略间的经验共享，其中结果级共享（SGT）在稳定性-支持度权衡中表现最优。

Abstract: We introduce Mutual Reinforcement Learning, a framework for concurrent RL post-training in which heterogeneous LLM policies exchange typed experience while keeping separate parameters, objectives, and tokenizers. The framework combines a Shared Experience Exchange (SEE), Multi-Worker Resource Allocation (MWRA), and a Tokenizer Heterogeneity Layer (THL) that retokenizes text and aligns token-level traces across incompatible vocabularies. This substrate makes the experience-sharing design question operational across model families. We instantiate three controlled probes on top of GRPO: data-level rollout sharing via Peer Rollout Pooling (PRP), value-level advantage sharing via Cross-Policy GRPO Advantage Sharing (XGRPO), and outcome-level success transfer via Success-Gated Transfer (SGT). A contextual-bandit analysis characterizes their structural positions on a stability-support trade-off: PRP pays density-ratio variance and THL residual costs, XGRPO preserves on-policy actor support while changing scalar baselines, and SGT supplies a rescue-set score direction toward verified peer successes. In the evaluated regime, outcome-level sharing occupies the favorable point of this trade-off.

</details>


### [426] [HARMONY: Bridging the Personalization-Generalization Gap by Mitigating Representation Skew in Heterogeneous Split Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07211)
*Jiseok Youn,You Rim Choi,Goodsol Lee,Sangtae Ha,Hyung-Sin Kim,Saewoong Bahk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HARMONY提出了一种支持异构客户端架构的混合分割联邦学习框架，通过元学习模拟不同提取器、结合对比学习对齐特征，解决表示偏斜问题，在保持可接受延迟的同时显著提升测试准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有混合SFL在面对客户端架构异构性时，存在表示偏斜问题，即来自不同定制化特征提取器的特征无法在共享空间中对齐，导致负责OOD预测的服务器模型性能严重下降。

Method: 1) 修改元学习以模拟不同参数和架构的多样化提取器，学习个性化；2) 在服务端进行对比学习以对齐提取的特征，既不牺牲客户端个性化，也不共享原始标签。

Result: 在多个数据集和模型族上，相比现有最优方法，HARMONY在无/有OOD情况下测试准确率分别提升最高43.0%/28.3%，同时保持可接受延迟。

Conclusion: HARMONY是首个支持异构客户端架构的混合SFL框架，有效解决了表示偏斜问题，兼顾了准确率、延迟和隐私保护。

Abstract: Mobile devices face diverse resource constraints and non-IID data class distributions, requiring fast on-device inference for local in-distribution (ID) classes and on-demand remote support for client-specific out-of-distribution (OOD) classes. Hybrid split federated learning (Hybrid SFL) couples personalized client-side front ends (supporting early exit) with a generalized server-side backend for fallback inference, balancing accuracy and cost. However, under client architectural heterogeneity, the existing hybrid SFL suffers from representation skew, where features from customized extractors fail to align in the shared space, leading to a sharp degradation in the server model responsible for OOD prediction. We propose HARMONY, the first hybrid SFL framework to support heterogeneous client architectures. HARMONY modifies meta-learning to simulate diverse extractors across parameters and architectures, and to learn to personalize. To mitigate representation skew, HARMONY conducts server-side contrastive learning to align extracted features, neither sacrificing clients' personalization nor sharing raw labels. Compared to the state of the art across multiple datasets and model families, HARMONY improves test accuracy by up to 43.0%/28.3% without/with OOD, respectively, while maintaining acceptable latency.

</details>


### [427] [When Are Experts Misrouted? Counterfactual Routing Analysis in Mixture-of-Experts Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07260)
*Youngsik Yoon,Siwei Wang,Wei Chen,Jungseul Ok*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MoE语言模型的Top-k路由器在推理关键token时存在次优路由问题：标准路由在高置信度token上表现良好，但在复杂推理所需的脆弱token上，模型内存在更低损失的等计算量路由路径却未被选择。仅更新最终层路由器即可提升推理性能，表明该问题部分源于路由器本身的分配错误。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: MoE模型虽然广泛使用Top-k路由机制，但训练好的路由器所选路径是否最优很少被直接评估。作者希望系统性地检验标准路由的质量。

Method: 固定模型参数，比较每个token的标准路由与随机采样的等计算量替代路由，以验证推理轨迹中下一个token的预测概率为评分标准。随后进行仅路由器的最小更新实验。

Result: 标准路由在高置信度token上表现良好，但在复杂推理的脆弱token上表现不佳——模型内存在更低损失的替代路由。该现象在Qwen3-30B-A3B、GPT-OSS-20B、DeepSeek-V2-Lite和OLMoE-1B-7B四个模型中一致出现。

Conclusion: 标准Top-k训练方式（仅评估执行路径的损失、负载均衡仅依赖聚合统计）导致路由器在关键推理token上分配不当。仅更新最终层路由器即可提升推理性能，表明问题部分源于路由器自身而非专家容量限制。

Abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models route each token to a small subset of experts, but whether the routes selected by a trained top-$k$ router are good ones is rarely evaluated directly. Holding the model fixed, we compare each standard route against sampled equal-compute alternatives for the same token and score each by the next-token probability it assigns to the realized token in a verified reasoning trajectory. The result is sharply token-conditional: the standard router is well-aligned with route utility on confident tokens but uninformative on the fragile tokens that drive hard reasoning, where lower-loss equal-compute routes consistently exist inside the frozen model but are not selected. The same pattern holds across Qwen3-30B-A3B, GPT-OSS-20B, DeepSeek-V2-Lite, and OLMoE-1B-7B, and follows structurally from how standard top-$k$ training evaluates routing decisions: the language modeling loss scores only the executed route, and load balancing depends only on aggregate routing statistics. A minimal router-only update to the final-layer router, leaving every expert and every other router frozen, is sufficient to shift pass@K on AIME 2024+2025 and HMMT 2025 for both Qwen3-30B-A3B and GPT-OSS-20B, suggesting that at least part of the failure reflects router-reachable misallocation rather than expert capacity alone.

</details>


### [428] [Unsolvability Ceiling in Multi-LLM Routing: An Empirical Study of Evaluation Artifacts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07395)
*Saloni Garg,Amit Sagtani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过大规模实验（206,000个查询-模型对，6个基准）发现，多LLM路由中所谓的"不可解性"很大程度源于评估伪影（评判偏见、截断、格式不匹配），而非模型能力不足，导致路由性能估计被高估13-17个百分点，并提出双评判验证等改进建议。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 先前研究认为多LLM路由存在"不可解性天花板"（即池中所有模型都无法解决某些查询），但这一结论的可靠性存疑。作者希望通过大规模系统化研究，检验"不可解性"是否真的来源于模型能力不足，还是评估方法的缺陷。

Method: 使用Gemma 4和Llama 3.1系列模型，在MMLU、MedQA、HumanEval、MBPP、Alpaca、ShareGPT六个基准上收集206,000个查询-模型对。采用LLM-as-a-judge和精确匹配两种评估指标，通过双评判验证和精确匹配锚定来识别并校正评估伪影，并引入分解框架归因失败原因。

Result: 1) 大量"不可解"查询实际上是评估伪影造成的：评判偏见偏向冗长而非正确、固定生成长度截断、输出格式不匹配。2) 这些伪影使路由器训练信号失真，标准路由器退化到多数类预测（约79%选择最小模型），导致13-17个百分点的机会成本。

Conclusion: 现有路由性能估算被显著高估，需要更可靠的评估协议。建议采用双评判验证、精确匹配锚定和成本敏感目标函数来改进多LLM系统的评估。

Abstract: Efficient routing across multiple LLMs enables cost-quality tradeoffs by directing queries to the cheapest capable model. Prior work attributes routing headroom to an "unsolvability ceiling", queries no model in the pool can solve. We present a large-scale study of multi-tier LLM routing with 206,000 query-model pairs across six benchmarks (MMLU, MedQA, HumanEval, MBPP, Alpaca, ShareGPT) using the Gemma 4 and Llama 3.1 families. Evaluating with both LLM-as-a-judge and exact-match metrics, we show that a substantial portion of reported unsolvability stems from evaluation artifacts: (i) systematic judge biases favoring verbosity over correctness, (ii) truncation under fixed generation budgets, and (iii) output format mismatches. Through dual-judge validation and exact-match grounding, we reduce measured unsolvability across tasks. We introduce a decomposition framework attributing failures to these artifacts, revealing consistent patterns across domains and model families. These artifacts also distort router training signals: standard routers collapse to majority-class prediction (~79% smallest-tier optimal), confirmed via random-feature and shuffled-label controls, incurring a 13-17 percentage point opportunity cost. We provide actionable recommendations including dual-judge validation, exact-match anchoring, and cost-sensitive objectives. Our findings suggest existing routing headroom estimates are substantially inflated, underscoring the need for reliable evaluation protocols in multi-LLM systems.

</details>


### [429] [Improved Model-based Reinforcement Learning with Smooth Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07218)
*Kun Long,Yuqiang Li,Xianyi Wu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于核平滑的在线强化学习方法，通过引入伯恩斯坦式探索奖励，在Lipschitz连续MDP假设下实现了更优的遗憾界，其理论分析依赖于一个新的鞅浓度不等式。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 经典强化学习理论主要依赖低秩MDP的结构性假设，而核平滑方法提供了利用MDP平滑性的替代范式。本文旨在改进现有核平滑方法的遗憾界，特别是消除其对时间步长的过度依赖。

Method: 在有限时域设置下，基于Lipschitz连续性假设，采用非参数核平滑估计转移动力学，并设计伯恩斯坦式探索奖励（exploration bonus），通过新的鞅浓度不等式进行理论分析。

Result: 所提出的方法在遗憾界上优于当前最优结果，尤其是在对时间步长（horizon）的依赖方面取得了改进。

Conclusion: 伯恩斯坦式奖励与核平滑框架的有效结合可以显著提升在线强化学习的理论保证，新建立的鞅浓度不等式具有独立的研究价值。

Abstract: For continuous state-action space scenarios, classical reinforcement learning (RL) theory predominantly focuses on low-rank Markov decision processes (MDPs), which provide sample-efficient guarantees at the expense of restrictive structural assumptions. Kernel smoothing model-based approaches offer a promising alternative paradigm that instead leverages the smoothness of the MDP and employs non-parametric kernel smoothing estimates of transition dynamics. This paper proposes a new kernel-smoothing model-based approach for online reinforcement learning in finite-horizon settings under Lipschitz continuity assumptions on the MDP. By incorporating a Bernstein-style exploration bonus into the kernel smoothing framework, our method achieves a regret bound which improves upon the state-of-the-art regret bound in its dependence on the horizon. The theoretical advancement relies on a delicate analysis of the synergy between Bernstein-style bonuses and kernel smoothing, where a new tight Bernstein-type concentration inequality for martingales may be of independent interest.

</details>


### [430] [On the Robustness of Distribution Support under Diffusion Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07220)
*Ruijia Cao,Yuchen Wu,Nisha Chadramoorthy*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过建立"支持鲁棒性"理论性质，解释了扩散指导（Diffusion Guidance）为何能产生高质量样本。研究表明，在精确访问得分函数的情况下，引导扩散过程几乎总能生成接近目标支持的样本。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 扩散指导技术虽已广泛成功应用，但其理论基础尚不明确，缺乏对其一致产生高质量样本原因的理论解释。

Method: 提出"支持鲁棒性"（robustness of support）概念，理论上证明在精确得分函数条件下，引导扩散过程生成的样本会保持在目标支持附近。分析覆盖DDIM和DDPM，并适用于多种指数积分器离散化方案。

Result: 建立了扩散指导的理论基础，证明其具有支持鲁棒性，即生成的样本几乎总是落在目标数据分布的支撑集附近。

Conclusion: 为扩散指导产生物理上有意义、结构上合理的样本提供了严谨的理论依据，解释了该技术的有效性根源。

Abstract: Diffusion guidance is a powerful technique that enables controllable and high-fidelity sample generation with diffusion models. At a high level, it modifies the score function by incorporating a guidance term that steers the generative process toward a desired condition. Despite its empirical success, the theoretical properties of diffusion guidance remain largely unexplored, and it is not well understood why it consistently produces high-quality samples.
  In this work, we explain the effectiveness of diffusion guidance by establishing a \emph{robustness of support} property. Specifically, we show that, given exact access to the score functions, guided diffusion processes almost always generate samples that remain close to the target support. This property is particularly desirable, as samples that lie off the support are often structurally implausible and may adversely affect downstream tasks. Our analysis covers both Denoising Diffusion Implicit Models (DDIM) and Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPM), and applies to a wide range of discretization schemes induced by exponential integrators. Our results provide a rigorous foundation for understanding why diffusion guidance produces physically meaningful and structurally plausible samples.

</details>


### [431] [Don't Learn the Shape: Forecasting Periodic Time Series by Rank-1 Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07222)
*Takato Honda*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发现周期性时间序列（如电力数据）本质上是低秩结构（rank-1占比82%），提出极简方法FLAIR：仅需28-57个标量参数，通过SVD和Ridge回归即可达到甚至超越复杂深度学习模型（如PatchTST）的性能，证明在该场景下额外复杂性只会带来估计噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 质疑并检验在具有高秩-1、多周期特性的时间序列预测中，是否真的需要复杂的参数化模型，简单的低秩方法是否已足够。

Method: 将每小时电力数据重塑为24行×天数列矩阵，利用其近似秩-1特性；通过一次SVD分解、GCV平均Ridge回归进行预测，仅需学习每日形状和每日水平两个成分（共28-57个标量参数）。

Result: 在GIFT-Eval全部97个配置上，8种替代方法（Fourier、EWMA、James-Stein、秩r SVD等）均未能显著超越简单K=2周期平均基线（经Holm校正），FLAIR在聚合指标上匹配PatchTST（relMASE 0.838 vs 0.849）。

Conclusion: 在高秩-1、多周期的周期性时间序列预测场景中，简单低秩方法已足够，额外模型灵活性反而成为估计噪声；FLAIR以极简参数实现了有效、紧凑、快速、闭式且无需调参的预测。

Abstract: How few parameters do we really need to forecast a periodic time series? An hourly electricity series, reshaped as a 24-row matrix with one column per day, is approximately rank-1: a daily shape modulated by a daily level (median centered rank-1 energy 0.82 on GIFT-Eval). Should we learn the shape? Smoothing, shrinkage, and low-rank fits all seem like obvious upgrades over the simple average of the last K=2 cycles. On all 97 GIFT-Eval configurations, we tested 8 such alternatives (e.g., Fourier, EWMA, James-Stein, rank-r SVD): none significantly beats the frozen baseline under Holm correction; two are significantly worse. The resulting method, FLAIR, is (a) Effective: matches PatchTST on aggregate GIFT-Eval (relMASE 0.838 vs 0.849); (b) Compact: 28 scalars for hourly, 57 for weekly; (c) Fast: 22 minutes on one CPU core of a MacBook Pro; (d) Closed-form & Hands-Off: one SVD per period candidate, GCV-averaged Ridge, no GPU, no pre-training, no per-task tuning. In the high-rank-1, many-cycle regime, extra flexibility is estimation noise.

</details>


### [432] [ExpThink: Experience-Guided Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive Chain-of-Thought Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07501)
*Tingcheng Bian,Yuzhe Zhang,Jing Jin,Jinchang Luo,MingQuan Cheng,Haiwei Wang,Wenyuan Jiang,Miaohui Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ExpThink是一个强化学习框架，通过经验引导奖励整形和难度自适应优势两种机制，在压缩推理链长度的同时提升准确性，实现了高达77%的长度缩减和3倍的准确率-效率比提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的大推理模型（LRMs）虽然通过扩展思维链（CoT）推理取得了强性能，但存在严重的token消耗和推理延迟问题。已有的RL压缩方法使用统一、静态的长度惩罚，忽略了模型能力动态变化和问题难度差异，导致压缩效果不佳。

Method: 提出ExpThink框架，包含两大机制：(1) 经验引导奖励整形——追踪每个问题已知的最短正确解，设三级奖励（简洁正确满分、冗长正确折扣分、错误零分），阈值随模型改进自动收紧；(2) 难度自适应优势——用正确计数归一化替代标准差归一化，生成单调难度缩放梯度，对难题放大梯度以保持准确率，对简单题抑制梯度以鼓励简洁。

Result: 在多个数学推理基准上，平均响应长度减少高达77%，同时准确性提升，准确率-效率比（准确率除以平均token数）相比原始基线提升最多3倍，且在两项指标上均优于现有RL压缩方法。

Conclusion: ExpThink通过自适应动态奖励与难度感知的梯度调整，成功实现了"准确性优先、压缩其次"的训练目标，证明了在保持甚至提升推理质量的同时大幅压缩推理链长度的可行性。

Abstract: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong performance via extended chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet suffer from excessive token consumption and high inference latency. Existing reinforcement learning (RL) approaches for CoT compression rely on uniform, static length penalties that neglect model capability dynamics and problem-level difficulty variation. We propose \textbf{ExpThink}\xspace, an RL framework that addresses both dimensions through two complementary mechanisms. First, \emph{experience-guided reward shaping} tracks the shortest correct solution found so far for each problem and applies a three-tier reward: full credit for concise correct responses, discounted credit for verbose correct ones, and zero for incorrect ones. The threshold tightens automatically with model improvement, forming a self-evolving curriculum that requires no manual scheduling. Second, \emph{difficulty-adaptive advantage} replaces standard deviation normalization with correct-count normalization, yielding monotonically difficulty-scaled gradients that amplify learning on hard problems to preserve accuracy while suppressing gradients on easy ones to encourage brevity. Together, these mechanisms enforce an accuracy-first, compression-second training objective. Experiments on multiple mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that \textbf{ExpThink}\xspace reduces average response length by up to 77\% while simultaneously improving accuracy, achieving up to $3\times$ higher accuracy-efficiency ratio (accuracy divided by average token count) than the vanilla baseline and outperforming existing RL-based compression methods on both metrics.

</details>


### [433] [Modulated learning for private and distributed regression with just a single sample per client device](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07233)
*Praneeth Vepakomma,Amirhossein Reisizadeh,Samuel Horváth,Munther Dahleh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种针对每客户端仅有一个样本的联邦学习场景的方法，通过对单样本添加精心校准的噪声扰动并共享后处理表示，实现无偏梯度更新，在保护数据隐私的同时使极有限数据的设备协作学习全局模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 标准联邦学习在每客户端仅有一个数据样本时失效，因为单点局部更新在早期轮次对模型系数估计帮助甚微，加上每轮隐私噪声进一步削弱效用。现实中有大量场景（如健身追踪器、身体传感设备等）存在这种"每客户端单样本"限制，需要专门方法解决。

Method: 每个客户端对单个样本注入一次精心校准的噪声扰动，并进行后处理得到表示，将该表示发送给服务器。服务器聚合这些表示后，计算无偏梯度更新，该更新在期望上与非隐私集中式梯度一致，同时保护数据隐私。

Result: 该方法使仅有一个样本的客户端能够协作学习准确的隐私保护模型，无需大量本地数据集，且梯度更新在期望上匹配非隐私集中式梯度。

Conclusion: 该方法不同于传统隐私联邦学习（通信负载为模型系数），而是传输经隐私变换的数据表示，使得数据极度有限的设备也能有效参与联邦学习，在隐私保护和模型精度之间取得良好平衡。

Abstract: This work focuses on the question of learning from a large number of devices with each device holding only a single sample of data. Several real-world applications exist to this one sample per client setup up including learning from fitness trackers, data/app usage aggregators, body-worn sensing devices, and daily event monitors to name a few. When a client has only one sample, the standard federated learning paradigm breaks down as a local update based on that single point is far from being useful, especially in the earlier rounds for estimation of the model coefficients. This utility is further weakened by the privacy-inducing noise applied at every round. This work caters to this problem to enable such clients to collaboratively contribute to effectively learn a global model without leaking the privacy of their data. The proposed approach injects a single, carefully calibrated noisy perturbation to transform the sample at each client, followed by a post-processed representation which is shared with the server. These representations aggregated at the server are processed to obtain an unbiased gradient update that in expectation matches the non-private centralized gradient while preserving data privacy. This approach is different than traditional private federated learning, where the communication payloads involve model coefficients as opposed to privately transformed data samples. This method enables devices with extremely limited data to collaborate and learn accurate, privacy-preserving models without requiring large local datasets or sacrificing individual privacy.

</details>


### [434] [Sample Complexity of Stochastic Optimization with Integer Variables](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07239)
*Hongyu Cheng,Yinghao Zheng,Marco Molinaro,Amitabh Basu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了整数随机优化的样本复杂度，发现其与连续优化相比可能更高或更低，取决于目标函数和约束条件的具体结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 理解整数随机优化相对于连续随机优化的统计复杂度差异，填补该领域理论空白。

Method: 通过理论分析，分别针对Lipschitz目标（ℓ∞球和ℓ2球子集）以及强凸光滑目标，建立了整数优化的样本复杂度上下界，并与连续优化进行对比。

Result: 1. ℓ∞球上：整数混合非线性非凸优化与线性优化的样本复杂度相同；2. ℓ2球上：整数优化在某些情况下样本需求更少；3. 强凸光滑目标：整数优化需要Ω(1/ε²)样本，而连续优化仅需O(1/ε)。

Conclusion: 整数优化的统计复杂度与连续优化有本质差异，不能简单类推，需根据问题结构具体分析。

Abstract: We establish sample complexity results for stochastic optimization over the integers, especially with a view to understand the complexity with respect to the corresponding continuous optimization problem. We show that integer optimization can sometimes require strictly more samples and sometimes strictly smaller number of samples, depending on the structure of the objective and constraints. 1. For Lipschitz objectives over subsets of the $\ell_\infty$ ball, the statistical complexity of general stochastic mixed-integer, nonlinear, nonconvex optimization is exactly the same as stochastic linear optimization with just bound constraints. 2. For Lipschitz objectives over subsets of the $\ell_2$ ball, we show that integer optimization can require strictly *smaller* sample size compared to the continuous setting in a certain regime. To get to this result, we also establish tight sample complexity results for nonconvex continuous stochastic optimization which, to the best of our knowledge, do not appear in prior work. 3. For strongly convex, smooth objectives, integer optimization has high statistical complexity compared to the continuous setting. In particular, we show that integer optimization requires $Ω(1/ε^2)$ samples to report an $ε$-approximate solution, compared to the well-known $O(1/ε)$ sample complexity from the continuous optimization literature.

</details>


### [435] [Your Language Model is Its Own Critic: Reinforcement Learning with Value Estimation from Actor's Internal States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07579)
*Yunho Choi,Jongwon Lim,Woojin Ahn,Minjae Oh,Jeonghoon Shim,Yohan Jo*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: POISE是一种利用策略模型内部状态进行价值估计的强化学习方法，通过轻量级探针预测可验证奖励，实现更稳定高效的大语言模型策略优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有RLVR方法存在高计算开销：PPO需要策略规模的critic模型，GRPO需多次采样以稳定均值。旨在以极小成本获得baseline，降低方差。

Method: 利用策略模型前向传播中已有的内部隐藏状态，训练轻量级探针预测可验证奖励；采用跨rollout构造避免梯度偏差；仅需单次采样即可估计prompt价值。

Result: 在Qwen3-4B和DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B上，POISE匹配DAPO性能但计算量更小；价值估计器性能接近独立LLM规模的价值模型，且泛化到多种可验证任务。

Conclusion: 通过利用模型自身的内部表征，POISE实现了更稳定高效的策略优化，消除了额外采样开销，支持更高的prompt多样性。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) for Large Reasoning Models hinges on baseline estimation for variance reduction, but existing approaches pay a heavy price: PPO requires a policy-model scale critic, while GRPO needs multiple rollouts per prompt to keep its empirical group mean stable. We introduce Policy Optimization with Internal State Value Estimation), which obtains a baseline at negligible cost by using the policy model's internal signals already computed during the policy forward pass. A lightweight probe predicts the expected verifiable reward from the hidden states of the prompt and generated trajectory, as well as token-entropy statistics, and is trained online alongside the policy. To preserve gradient unbiasedness despite using trajectory-conditioned features, we introduce a cross-rollout construction that predicts each rollout's value from an independent rollout's internal states. Because POISE estimates prompt value using only a single rollout, it enables higher prompt diversity for a fixed compute budget during training. This reduces gradient variance for more stable learning and also eliminates the compute overhead of sampling costs for detecting zero-advantage prompts. On Qwen3-4B and DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B across math reasoning benchmarks, POISE matches DAPO while requiring less compute. Moreover, its value estimator shows similar performance to a separate LLM-scale value model and generalizes to various verifiable tasks. By leveraging the model's own internal representations, POISE enables more stable and efficient policy optimization.

</details>


### [436] [Mathematical Reasoning via Intervention-Based Time-Series Causal Discovery Using LLMs as Concept Mastery Simulators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07600)
*Tsuyoshi Okita*
