Tuning these weights with random search or Bayesian optimization is computationally expensive, as it requires many independent training runs. To address this, we propose a gradient-based bilevel method that learns pretraining loss weights online by aligning the composite pretraining gradient with a downstream objective. By exploiting the structure of the loss, the method avoids the multiple backward passes typically required by truncated backpropagation through the full model, reducing the overhead of hyperparameter tuning to approximately 30% above a single training run. We evaluate the approach on event-sequence modeling and self-supervised computer vision, where it matches or improves upon carefully tuned baselines while substantially reducing the cost of hyperparameter tuning compared to random or Bayesian search.

</details>


### [512] [Efficient Verification of Neural Control Barrier Functions with Smooth Nonlinear Activations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07757)
*Jun Zhang,Haibo Zhang,Chun Liu,Xiaofan Wang,Liang Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 针对非线性激活函数神经CBF的形式化验证难题，提出LightCROWN方法，通过利用激活函数解析性质计算更紧的Jacobian界，在倒立摆、Dubins车、平面四旋翼等系统中将验证成功率提升至100%，同时提高速度和可扩展性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CROWN方法对tanh等非线性激活函数的神经CBF形式化验证过于保守，线性松弛导致Jacobian界不够紧，限制了可扩展性。

Method: 提出LightCROWN，通过利用激活函数的解析性质来计算更紧的Jacobian边界，替代传统CROWN中保守的线性松弛方法。

Result: 在倒立摆、Dubins车、平面四旋翼等非线性控制系统中，验证成功率提升高达100%，速度和可扩展性也得到增强。

Conclusion: LightCROWN为CROWN框架提供了一种通用可迁移的改进方案，能更高效地验证复杂的神经CBF。

Abstract: Formal verification of neural control barrier functions (NCBFs) remains challenging, especially for neural networks with nonlinear activations like \(\tanh\). Existing CROWN-based methods rely on conservative linear relaxations for Jacobian bounds, limiting scalability. We propose LightCROWN, which computes tighter Jacobian bounds by exploiting the analytical properties of activation functions. Experiments on nonlinear control systems including the inverted pendulum, Dubins car, and planar quadrotor demonstrate that LightCROWN improves verification success rates up to 100\%, while enhancing speed and scalability. Our approach provides a generalizable improvement for CROWN-based frameworks, enabling more efficient verification of complex NCBFs. The code can be found at github.com/Autonomous-Systems-and-Control-Lab/verify-neural-CBF.

</details>


### [513] [Pre-trained Tabular Foundation Models as Versatile Summary Networks for Neural Posterior Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07765)
*Elliot Pickens,Chiraag Gohel,Sidharth Satya*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出PFN-NPE方法，利用预训练的TabPFN作为固定摘要网络提取模拟数据的摘要，再搭配下游推理头（如归一化流）进行基于模拟的贝叶斯推断，实验表明该方法在多种SBI场景下表现有效，但存在难以捕捉联合后验结构的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 将预训练的表格基础模型TabPFN作为一种无需训练的模块化摘要网络，用于模拟贝叶斯推断，以解决传统SBI中需要学习模拟观测摘要的问题。

Method: 提出PFN-NPE框架：使用预训练的TabPFN编码器作为固定摘要网络，提取模拟器输出数据的摘要信息，再搭配任务相关的下游推理头（默认使用归一化流）进行后验估计。

Result: PFN-NPE与已有的后验近似方法性能相当甚至更优；诊断探针显示TabPFN摘要能保留后验位置和边缘信息，但难以表征联合后验结构。

Conclusion: TabPFN可作为多种SBI场景中有效的摘要网络，推理头保持模块化和任务相关，但TabPFN摘要对后验联合结构的表征能力存在局限。

Abstract: In this work, we study TabPFN as a training-free, modular summary network for simulation-based Bayesian inference (SBI). Tabular foundation models such as TabPFN are pretrained on broad families of synthetic tabular data-generating processes and adapt at test time through in-context learning, making them natural candidates for SBI, where posterior estimation often depends on learning informative summaries of simulated observations. We propose PFN-NPE: a general recipe that uses a pretrained TabPFN encoder as a fixed summary network for simulator outputs, then pairs the resulting summaries with a downstream inference head chosen for the problem. With normalizing flows as the default inference head, PFN-NPE matches established posterior approximation methods and sometimes outperforms them. More importantly, diagnostic probes show that the TabPFN-derived summaries often preserve useful posterior location and marginal information. These analyses also reveal a limitation in that TabPFN-derived summaries may struggle to represent the joint posterior structure even when the marginals are well recovered. Still, our experiments show that TabPFN can serve as an effective summary network across a diverse set of SBI settings, with the inference network left modular and task-dependent.

</details>


### [514] [Training-Induced Escape from Token Clustering in a Mean-Field Formulation of Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07772)
*Noboru Isobe,Daisuke Inoue,Masaaki Imaizumi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了带噪声的平均场Transformer中，仅训练参数线性FFN（带L2正则化）时，训练如何重塑注意力驱动的聚类动力学。发现了一个训练诱导的相变：初始阶段令牌分布遵循注意力驱动的聚类，但在接近最后一层时可能离开聚类状态。数学分析基于熵正则化交互能量，指向了一种训练感知的平均场理论。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有平均场理论主要分析预定义参数下的Transformer动力学，但训练如何重塑注意力驱动的聚类行为尚未被充分研究。本文旨在填补这一空白。

Method: 在带噪声的平均场Transformer中，仅训练参数线性FFN（带L2正则化），通过熵正则化交互能量分析训练诱导的相变现象。

Result: 发现了训练诱导的相：初始阶段遵循注意力驱动的聚类，但在最后几层令牌分布可能离开聚类状态。

Conclusion: 研究结果指向一种训练感知的平均场Transformer动力学理论，将训练与推理动力学统一处理。

Abstract: Transformers perform inference by iteratively transforming token representations across layers. This layerwise computation has been studied empirically, and recent mean-field theories of Transformer dynamics explain how attention can drive token distributions toward clustering. However, existing mean-field analyses largely treat model parameters as prescribed, leaving open how training reshapes this clustering picture. We study this question in a noisy mean-field Transformer in which only a parameter-linear FFN is trained under $L^2$ regularization. We find and analyze a training-induced phase in the dynamics: after initially following attention-driven clustering, the token distribution can leave the clustered regime near the final layers. Our mathematical analysis is based on an entropy-regularized interaction energy that captures the clustering bias of attention. More broadly, our results point toward a training-aware mean-field theory of Transformer dynamics, in which training and inference dynamics are treated together.

</details>


### [515] [POETS: Uncertainty-Aware LLM Optimization via Compute-Efficient Policy Ensembles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07775)
*Nicolas Menet,Andreas Krause,Abbas Rahimi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出POETS框架，通过共享预训练骨干网络与独立LoRA分支的策略集成，隐式执行KL正则化的Thompson采样，在蛋白质搜索、量子电路设计等科学发现任务中达到SOTA样本效率，并具备次线性累积遗憾界。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索与利用的平衡是序列决策和黑盒优化的核心挑战。现有方法需要复杂的嵌套过程（先训练不确定性感知的奖励模型，再单独拟合策略），计算效率低。作者希望绕过这一复杂流程，并解决LLM集成时巨大的计算和内存开销问题。

Method: POETS基于"KL正则化训练的策略隐式编码了底层奖励函数"这一洞察，直接训练策略集成来匹配在线自助采样数据，从而捕获认知不确定性。架构上，集成共享预训练骨干网络，通过独立的LoRA分支保持多样性，避免了完整LLM集成的高昂开销。

Result: 理论证明POETS隐式执行KL正则化的Thompson采样，具有O(√T γ_T)的强累积遗憾界。实验上，在蛋白质搜索、量子电路设计等科学发现领域达到SOTA样本效率，在强化学习的离策略设定和小数据集场景下表现鲁棒。

Conclusion: POETS通过高效集成架构桥接了不确定性量化与策略优化，在计算效率、理论基础和实验效果上均展现出优势，为大规模策略优化提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Balancing exploration and exploitation is a core challenge in sequential decision-making and black-box optimization. We introduce POETS ($\textbf{Po}$licy $\textbf{E}$nsembles for $\textbf{T}$hompson $\textbf{S}$ampling), a novel framework that bridges uncertainty quantification and policy optimization. Our approach is grounded in the insight that policies trained with Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization implicitly encode an underlying reward function. Building on this, POETS bypasses the complex, nested process of training an uncertainty-aware reward model and separately fitting a policy to this model. Instead, we directly train a policy ensemble to capture epistemic uncertainty by matching implicitly encoded reward functions to online, bootstrapped data. To overcome the prohibitive compute and memory constraints of ensembling Large Language Models (LLMs), POETS utilizes an efficient architecture: the ensemble shares a pre-trained backbone while maintaining diversity through independent Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) branches. Theoretically, we prove that POETS implicitly conducts KL-regularized Thompson sampling and thus inherits strong cumulative regret bounds of ${\mathcal O}(\sqrt{T γ_T})$. Empirically, we demonstrate that POETS achieves state-of-the-art sample efficiency across diverse scientific discovery domains, including protein search and quantum circuit design. Furthermore, it improves the optimization trajectories of reinforcement learning, proving particularly robust in off-policy settings with experience replay or in small dataset regimes.

</details>


### [516] [Neural Operators as Efficient Function Interpolators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07792)
*Vasilis Niarchos,Angelos Sirbu,Sokratis Trifinopoulos*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出将神经算子（Neural Operators）重新用于有限维函数插值，通过引入辅助基空间将有限维函数视为算子。实验表明，NOs在精度上可匹配甚至超越MLP和KAN，同时参数更少、训练更快。在核质量模型修正任务中，TFNO集成达到198.2 keV的优异误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统上神经算子被设计用于无限维函数空间之间的映射，本文试图探索其在有限维函数插值任务中的潜力，以克服MLP和KAN等模型在参数效率和训练速度方面的局限。

Method: 通过引入辅助基空间（auxiliary base-space），将任意有限维函数重新表述为作用于基空间函数的算子（通过组合操作）。采用Tensorized Fourier Neural Operator（TFNO）作为具体实现，并应用于核质量图的残差修正。

Result: 在解析函数基准测试中，NOs在精度上匹配或超越MLP和KAN，且参数更少、训练更快。在核质量模型修正任务中，TFNO集成在测试集上达到198.2 keV的均方根误差。

Conclusion: 神经算子可以作为一种可扩展的框架用于有限维函数插值，从解析基准到结构化科学数据均表现优异。该方法兼具高参数效率和短训练时间，在核物理等科学计算领域具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Neural operators (NOs) are designed to learn maps between infinite-dimensional function spaces. We propose a novel reframing of their use. By introducing an auxiliary base-space, any finite-dimensional function can be viewed as an operator acting by composition on functions of the base-space. Through a range of benchmarks on analytic functions of increasing complexity and dimensionality, we demonstrate that NOs can match or outperform standard multilayer perceptrons and Kolmogorov--Arnold Networks in accuracy while requiring significantly fewer parameters and training time. As a real-world application, we apply a two-dimensional Tensorized Fourier Neural Operator (TFNO) to the nuclear chart, learning a correction to state-of-the-art nuclear mass models as a partially observed residual field. A TFNO ensemble reaches a held-out root-mean-square error of 198.2 keV, placing it among the best recent neural-network approaches while retaining high parameter efficiency and short training times. More broadly, these results introduce NOs as a scalable framework for finite-dimensional function interpolation, from analytic benchmarks to structured scientific data.

</details>


### [517] [Toward Privileged Foundation Models:LUPI for Accelerated and Improved Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07799)
*Xueying Ding,Leman Akoglu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PIQL是首个系统性地将特权信息(PI)集成到表格基础模型(TFM)中的框架，通过聚合数据集统计信息和数据生成程序编码两种形式的PI，加速学习并提升泛化能力，减少数据和计算资源需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 训练基础模型计算量大且收敛速度慢，现有方法缺乏系统性地利用特权信息来同时加速学习和提升泛化能力的手段。

Method: 构建两种互补的PI：(i)聚合数据集级别统计信息；(ii)底层数据生成程序的编码。设计能从训练时的PI中学习并在推理时从观测上下文重建的架构。

Result: PIQL实现了更快的收敛、更低的最终损失和更好的泛化能力，有效降低了数据和计算需求。

Conclusion: PI引导的预训练是提高基础模型效率和性能的原则性且实用的新范式。

Abstract: Training foundation models is computationally intensive and often slow to converge.We introduce PIQL,Privileged Information for Quick and Quality Learning, the first framework to systematically integrate privileged information (PI) to simultaneously accelerate learning and improve generalization in tabular foundation models (TFMs). We construct two complementary forms of PI: (i) aggregate dataset-level statistics that reduce the burden on in-context learning, and (ii) encodings of the underlying data-generating program, providing knowledge beyond observable data. We further design an architecture that effectively transfers the train-time-only PI by learning to reconstruct it from observed context at inference. We provide a theoretical analysis characterizing conditions under which PI reduces the population-level approximation gap and accelerates convergence in finite-data regimes. Empirical evidence shows that PIQL enables TFMs to achieve faster convergence, lower final loss, and better generalization, in effect, reducing data and compute requirements. Our work establishes PI-guided pretraining as a principled and practical paradigm for improving the efficiency and performance of foundation models.

</details>


### [518] [Prune-OPD: Efficient and Reliable On-Policy Distillation for Long-Horizon Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07804)
*Zhicheng Yang,Zhijiang Guo,Yifan Song,Minrui Xu,Yongxin Wang,Yiwei Wang,Xiaodan Liang,Jing Tang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Prune-OPD通过动态检测学生与教师推理轨迹的偏离程度，在奖励不可靠时自动截断训练序列，从而在不牺牲（甚至提升）性能的前提下，减少37.6%-68.0%的训练时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的On-policy Distillation（OPD）在长序列推理任务中，学生生成的prefix一旦偏离教师轨迹，教师的密集奖励就会失去局部可剥削性，继续在该轨迹上生成和评估token不仅奖励质量下降，而且造成大量计算浪费。

Method: 提出Prune-OPD框架，通过持续监控学生与教师预测的局部兼容性（如top-k重叠度），实时检测前缀漂移事件；一旦检测到严重漂移，则对后续不可靠奖励进行单调降权，并触发动态序列截断，将计算重新分配到可靠的教师监督上。

Result: 在多个教师-学生组合上，Prune-OPD在AMC、AIME、HMMT等挑战性基准上保持甚至提升性能，同时减少37.6%-68.0%的训练时间；当学生-教师兼容性高时，自动保留长上下文监督。

Conclusion: Prune-OPD改进OPD的关键不是盲目缩短序列，而是将计算重新分配到局部可剥削的教师奖励上，实现了训练预算与监督质量的动态对齐。

Abstract: On-policy distillation (OPD) leverages dense teacher rewards to enhance reasoning models. However, scaling OPD to long-horizon tasks exposes a critical flaw: as the student's generated prefix inevitably diverges from the teacher's thought process, the teacher's dense reward loses local exploitability. Continuing to generate and evaluate tokens on these ``drifted'' trajectories not only degrades reward quality but also incurs massive computational waste. To address this, we introduce \textbf{Prune-OPD}, a framework that dynamically aligns training budgets with supervision quality. By continuously monitoring the local compatibility between student and teacher predictions (e.g., via top-$k$ overlap), Prune-OPD detects prefix-drift events in real time. Upon detecting severe drift, it monotonically down-weights subsequent unreliable rewards and triggers dynamic rollout truncation. This allows the training process to halt futile generation and reallocate compute strictly to reliable teacher supervision. Across diverse teacher-student combinations, Prune-OPD consistently aligns computation with supervision reliability. When prefix drift makes dense teacher rewards unreliable, it reduces training time by 37.6\%--68.0\% while preserving, and often improving, performance on challenging benchmarks (AMC, AIME, HMMT). When student-teacher compatibility remains high, it automatically preserves long-context supervision by expanding the training window. These results suggest that Prune-OPD improves OPD not by blindly shortening rollouts, but by reallocating computation toward locally exploitable teacher rewards.

</details>


### [519] [Flexible Routing via Uncertainty Decomposition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07805)
*Charlotte Peale,Siddartha Devic,Parikshit Gopalan,Udi Wieder,Aravind Gollakota*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于不确定性分解的模型路由方法，通过将总不确定性分解为可约和不可约两部分，实现自适应路由（低不确定性→弱模型、高可约不确定性→调用Oracle、高不可约不确定性→弃权），无需重新训练即可通过超参数调整适应不同损失函数和成本参数，并提供了理论保证和实验验证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在机器学习系统中，需要在性能与成本之间取得平衡，现有模型路由方法未能有效处理本质模糊的查询（不可约不确定性），且难以灵活适应不同损失函数和成本参数。

Method: 基于高阶预测器将总不确定性分解为不可约不确定性和可约不确定性，构建统一的路由与弃权框架：不确定性低时用弱模型预测，可约不确定性高时路由到Oracle，不可约不确定性高时弃权。通过简单超参数调整适配不同损失和成本。

Result: 在合成和真实数据集上验证了方法的有效性，特别是在可约不确定性与不可约不确定性相关性较低的场景下表现优异；提供了与最优任务特定路由器相比的遗憾界理论保证。

Conclusion: 该方法为模型路由提供了一种理论严谨、灵活可调的解决方案，能够避免不必要的Oracle调用，并统一处理路由与弃权问题。

Abstract: A key strategy for balancing performance and cost in modern machine learning systems is to dynamically route queries to either a low-cost model or a more expensive oracle (such as a large pretrained model or human expert), an approach known as model routing. In this work we present a new uncertainty-aware router that (1) avoids unnecessary oracle calls on inherently ambiguous queries, and (2) adapts dynamically to different loss functions and cost parameters through simple hyperparameter changes, without retraining. Our method, applicable to any classification setting where multiple independent annotations per input are available, is based on decomposing total uncertainty into irreducible and reducible components using higher-order predictors [Ahdritz et al., 2025]. This enables a unified approach to both routing and abstention: predict with the weak model when uncertainty is low, route to the oracle when reducible uncertainty is high, and abstain when irreducible uncertainty is high. Our router comes with strong theoretical guarantees bounding regret relative to optimal task-specific routers. We conduct experiments on both synthetic and real-world datasets that demonstrate the benefits of our approach in suitable regimes -- in particular, whenever reducible and irreducible uncertainty are not too correlated.

</details>


### [520] [The Minimax Rate of Second-Order Calibration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07808)
*Kamil Ciosek,Banafsheh Rafiee,Sina Ghiassian,Nicolò Felicioni*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文刻画了二分类中二阶校准误差的极小极大估计率，利用sech扰动核使校准函数解析化，通过多项式回归实现$\tilde{O}(1/\sqrt{n})$的估计率，优于传统的$O(n^{-1/4})$，并给出了二阶Platt缩放的首次有限样本保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有二阶校准误差估计方法（分桶法、核平滑法）仅能达到$O(n^{-1/4})$的收敛率，效率较低。本文旨在通过理论分析找到更优的估计方法，并给出二阶校准的严格定义及其与现有分桶定义的定量关系。

Method: 利用sech扰动核使校准函数在宽度为$hπ/2$的条带内解析，进而采用多项式回归进行估计。同时提出了无分桶的二阶校准定义，并与Ahdritz等人的分桶定义建立定量联系。

Result: 多项式回归达到$\tilde{O}(1/\sqrt{n})$的估计率（含显式常数），匹配$\Omega(1/\sqrt{n})$下界，证明极小极大最优性（至多对数因子）。此外，首次给出了二阶Platt缩放的有限样本保证。

Conclusion: sech扰动核不仅用于平滑校准函数，其解析性使得更高效的估计成为可能。实验结果验证了理论收敛率和重校准后的不确定性质量。

Abstract: We characterize the minimax rate of estimating the second-order calibration error for binary classification, which quantifies whether a higher-order predictor's epistemic-uncertainty estimate matches the conditional variance of the label probability on its level sets. Our key observation is that the sech perturbation kernel, previously used only to enforce smoothness of calibration functions, in fact makes them analytic in a strip of half-width $hπ/2$. Polynomial regression then estimates the calibration error at rate $\tilde{O}(1/\sqrt{n})$, with explicit constants, a qualitative improvement over the $O(n^{-1/4})$ rate achievable by bucketing or kernel smoothing. A matching $Ω(1/\sqrt{n})$ lower bound establishes minimax optimality up to logarithmic factors. As a corollary, we give the first finite-sample guarantee for second-order Platt scaling, yielding a post-hoc procedure that recalibrates both the mean prediction and the epistemic-variance estimate of any higher-order predictor. Along the way, we provide a bucket-free definition of second-order calibration and relate it quantitatively to the bucketed formulation of Ahdritz et al. [2025]. Our experiments confirm the predicted rate and the quality of the recalibrated uncertainties.

</details>


### [521] [Scaling Categorical Flow Maps](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07820)
*Oscar Davis,Anastasiia Filippova,Pierre Ablin,Victor Turrisi,Amitis Shidani,Marco Cuturi,Louis Béthune*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文训练了一个17亿参数的连续流匹配语言模型，通过自蒸馏实现仅需4步推理即可生成高质量文本，并提出了半离散设置下的似然界方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探索连续扩散和流匹配模型在语言建模中的可扩展性，验证其能否在大规模参数和数据集下保持competitive性能。

Method: 训练1.7B参数的流模型（2.1T tokens），通过自蒸馏得到分类流映射（CFM），并提出半离散似然界用于评分。

Result: 4步推理即可生成多样高质量文本，保持接近数据级别的token熵，在LM基准上达到与离散扩散方法相当的性能。

Conclusion: 证明了连续流匹配模型在语言建模中具有良好的可扩展性，同时揭示了大规模训练中的挑战并给出了优化建议。

Abstract: Continuous diffusion and flow matching models could represent a powerful alternative to autoregressive approaches for language modelling (LM), as they unlock a host of advantages currently reserved for continuous modalities, including accelerated sampling and tilting. Recently, several works have demonstrated the possibility of generating discrete data continuously by a simple flow matching process between a Gaussian and the one-hot encoded data distribution. They have further shown the feasibility of accelerated sampling via Categorical Flow Maps (CFMs), resulting in competitive sample quality in the few-step regime. However, this method had only been evaluated at relatively modest scales ($<1$B), leaving the question of its scalability completely open. In this article, we train a $1.7$B-parameter base flow model on $2.1$T tokens and self-distill it into a CFM that generates diverse, high-quality text in as few as $4$ inference steps while maintaining near-data-level token entropy. Furthermore, we introduce a likelihood bound for CFMs in the semi-discrete setting, and show that they can be used to score the model on standard LM benchmarks, achieving results in the same range as discrete diffusion methods. Finally, we uncover some of the challenges that arise from training these models at scale, and we provide prescriptive insights on loss weighting and time scheduling.

</details>


### [522] [Approximation-Free Differentiable Oblique Decision Trees](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07837)
*Subrat Prasad Panda,Blaise Genest,Arvind Easwaran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出DTSemNet，一种将硬斜决策树语义等效且可逆地表示为神经网络的方法，通过标准梯度下降实现端到端训练，无需近似。引入退火Top-k方法解决回归中的梯度问题，在分类、回归和强化学习任务中优于现有可微决策树方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可微决策树方法依赖概率软化（软DT）或量化梯度（STE）等近似手段，导致训练不精确。斜决策树在回归任务中面临复杂优化和过拟合挑战，需要一种无需近似的端到端训练方法。

Method: 1) 提出DTSemNet，将硬斜DT语义等效地映射为神经网络结构，支持标准梯度下降训练；2) 分析STE在回归中的局限性，引入退火Top-k方法以提供精确梯度信号；3) 在分类、回归基准以及强化学习环境中进行实验验证。

Result: DTSemNet训练的斜决策树在分类和回归基准上优于现有最先进的可微决策树；在强化学习环境中可作为程序化DT策略，拓展了应用范围。

Conclusion: DTSemNet提供了一种无需近似的可微决策树训练框架，在多个任务上取得优越性能，并为决策树在更广泛领域的应用开辟了新途径。

Abstract: Decision Trees (DTs) are widely used in safety-critical domains such as medical diagnosis, valued for their interpretability and effectiveness on tabular data. However, training accurate oblique DTs is challenging due to complex optimization landscapes and overfitting risks, particularly in regression. Recent advances have introduced differentiable formulations that enable gradient-based training and joint optimization of decision boundaries and leaf regressors. Yet, existing approaches typically rely on approximations, either through probabilistic softening of boundaries (soft DTs) or quantized gradients such as the Straight-Through Estimator (STE). To overcome these limitations, we propose DTSemNet, a novel, semantically equivalent, and invertible representation of hard oblique DTs as neural networks. DTSemNet enables end-to-end training with standard gradient descent, eliminating the need for approximations in both classification and regression. While classification aligns naturally with this formulation, regression remains challenging due to the joint optimization of internal nodes and leaf regressors. To address this, we analyze the limitations of STE and introduce an annealed Top-k method that provides accurate gradient signals without approximation. Extensive experiments on classification and regression benchmarks show that DTSemNet-trained oblique DTs outperform state-of-the-art differentiable DTs. Furthermore, we demonstrate that DTSemNet can serve as programmatic DT policies in reinforcement learning environments, thereby broadening their applicability.

</details>


### [523] [RelAgent: LLM Agents as Data Scientists for Relational Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07840)
*Xingyue Huang,Louis Tichelman,Jinwoo Kim,Krzysztof Olejniczak,İsmail İlkan Ceylan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RelAgent 是一个基于 LLM 的自主数据科学家框架，通过两阶段流程（搜索阶段：LLM 代理使用工具构建 SQL 特征程序并选择模型；推理阶段：执行程序无需 LLM 调用）实现关系学习，最终预测器由 SQL 查询和经典模型组成，具有快速、确定性和内在可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 关系学习是一个挑战性问题，现有方法（图模型、表格方法、序列方法）各有优缺点，缺乏一个统一且可解释的高效解决方案。

Method: 提出 RelAgent 两阶段框架：搜索阶段利用 LLM 代理通过数据库、验证和评估工具构建 SQL 特征程序并选择预测模型；推理阶段直接执行程序而无需 LLM 调用。

Result: 预测器由 SQL 查询和经典模型组成，实现快速、确定性且内在可解释的预测，特征为人类可读的查询，预测仅依赖于查询定义的特征映射。

Conclusion: RelAgent 能够利用标准数据库系统进行可扩展部署，结合 LLM 的搜索能力与经典模型的推理效率，为关系学习提供了一种可解释、高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Relational learning is a challenging problem that has motivated a wide range of approaches, including graph-based models (e.g., graph neural networks, graph transformers), tabular methods (e.g., tabular foundation models), and sequence-based approaches (e.g., large language models), each with its own advantages and limitations. We propose RelAgent, an LLM-based autonomous data scientist for relational learning, which operates in two phases. In the search phase, an LLM agent uses database, validation, and evaluation workspace tools to construct SQL feature programs and select a predictive model. In the inference phase, the resulting program is executed without further LLM calls. The final predictor consists of SQL queries and a classical model, enabling fast, deterministic, and intrinsically interpretable predictions: features are human-readable queries, and predictions depend only on the resulting query-defined feature map, enabling scalable deployment using standard database systems.

</details>


### [524] [\mathsf{VISTA}: Decentralized Machine Learning in Adversary Dominated Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07841)
*Hanzaleh Akbari Nodehi,Parsa Moradi,Soheil Mohajer,Mohammad Ali Maddah-Ali*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出VISTA算法，通过自适应调整接受阈值，在多数节点被对手控制的情况下，仍能通过激励兼容机制实现去中心化学习的渐进收敛。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒聚合方法在诚实多数假设下有效，但当对手控制多数节点时失效。本文希望在对手主导的极端场景下，通过激励机制而非信任假设来保证学习效果。

Method: 提出VISTA自适应算法：基于优化历史动态调整一致性接受阈值，在宽松（加速早期进展但允许更多腐败）与严格（提高估计精度但造成频繁拒绝）之间权衡，将对手从纯粹破坏者转变为理性权衡收益的参与方。

Result: 数值实验表明VISTA相比静态阈值方法收敛更快；理论分析证明在激励感知的自适应机制下，即使没有诚实多数，仍可保持标准SGD的渐进收敛行为。

Conclusion: 通过激励设计而非信任假设，可在对手主导的去中心化学习中实现稳健收敛，为去中心化机器学习的安全聚合提供了新范式。

Abstract: Decentralized machine learning often relies on outsourcing computations, such as gradient evaluations, to untrusted worker nodes. Existing robust aggregation methods can mitigate malicious behavior under honest-majority assumptions, but may fail when adversaries control a majority of the workers. We study this adversary-dominated setting through an incentive-oriented framework in which reports are accepted and rewarded only when they are mutually consistent up to a threshold. This turns the adversary from a pure saboteur into a rational agent that trades off increasing estimation error against the risk of rejection and loss of reward.
  We consider iterative optimization under this model. Unlike one-shot computation, iterative learning requires long-horizon decisions: permissive acceptance rules enable faster early progress but admit more adversarial corruption, while strict rules improve estimation accuracy but cause frequent rejections. We propose \mathsf{VISTA}, an adaptive algorithm that tunes the acceptance threshold using the optimization history. Numerical results show that \mathsf{VISTA} improves convergence over static thresholds. We also provide a rigorous convergence analysis showing that, with suitable incentive-aware adaptation, adversary-dominated decentralized learning can retain the asymptotic convergence behavior of standard SGD without relying on an honest majority.

</details>


### [525] [Distributional simplicity bias and effective convexity in Energy Based Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07844)
*Aurélien Decelle,Alfonso de Jesús Navas Gómez,Beatriz Seoane*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文从动力学视角分析了基于能量的学习（EBM），通过有效模型（可视为广义Ising模型或能量傅里叶展开）揭示了训练过程中的不动点类型（数据一致点与伪点）、稳定性特性，以及梯度动力学导致的低阶交互先于高阶交互学习的层级结构，解释了分布简单性偏好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 能量学习框架训练存在非凸优化问题，导致对初始化敏感、易陷入局部最优和梯度不稳定。作者希望通过动力学分析揭示这些问题的内在机制。

Method: 引入有效模型（广义Ising模型/傅里叶展开），分析二元变量上严格正分布学习的梯度流，分类不动点（数据一致点 vs 伪点），并分析其稳定性与学习层级。

Result: 1) 梯度流存在两类不动点：数据一致点（精确复现目标分布）和伪点（满足平稳性但不匹配目标分布）；2) 数据一致点附近的扰动是稳定或中性的；3) 梯度动力学产生层级结构：低阶交互先于高阶交互被学习。

Conclusion: 该分析提供了分布简单性偏好的机制解释，并解释了为何实践中观察不到低阶非数据一致的固定点。

Abstract: Energy-based learning is a powerful framework for generative modelling, but its training is inherently non-convex, leading potentially to sensitivity to initialisation, poor local optima, and unstable gradient dynamics. We present a dynamical analysis of energy-based learning through the lens of the effective model, which can be interpreted as either a generalised Ising model with higher-order interactions or the Fourier expansion of the energy. Under sufficient expressivity, we show that the gradient flow induced by learning strictly positive distributions over binary variables admits two types of fixed points: data-consistent points, which exactly reproduce the target distribution, and spurious points, which satisfy stationarity without matching the target distribution. Around data-consistent points, we show that perturbations are either stable or neutral, with neutral directions leaving the effective model invariant. Finally, we show that gradient dynamics induce a hierarchy in which lower-order interactions are learned before higher-order ones. This provides a mechanistic explanation for the distributional simplicity bias and clarifies why fixed points that are not data-consistent at low orders are not observed in practice.

</details>


### [526] [Actor-Critic Algorithm for Dynamic Expectile and CVaR](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07857)
*Yudong Luo,Erick Delage*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需转移扰动的代理策略梯度方法，结合可引出的无模型价值学习，构建了离策略演员-评论家算法，在风险规避任务上优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动态风险优化中，策略更新通常需要转移扰动，价值学习常依赖模型，这两方面都存在挑战。

Method: 基于softmax策略参数化提出无需转移扰动的代理策略梯度；利用可引出性（elicitability）开发动态expectile和条件风险价值的无模型价值学习方法；受Expected SARSA和Expected Policy Gradient启发，构建无模型离策略演员-评论家算法。

Result: 在可验证风险规避行为的领域，所提算法能学习到风险规避策略，且一致优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了动态风险优化中策略更新和价值学习的难题，实现无模型且无需转移扰动的风险敏感强化学习。

Abstract: Optimizing dynamic risk with stochastic policies is challenging in both policy updates and value learning. The former typically requires transition perturbation, while the latter may rely on model-based approaches. To address these challenges, we propose a surrogate policy gradient without transition perturbation under softmax policy parameterization. We further develop model-free value learning methods for dynamic expectile and conditional value-at-risk by leveraging elicitability. Finally, inspired by Expected SARSA and Expected Policy Gradient, a model-free off-policy actor-critic algorithm is constructed. Empirical results in domains with verifiable risk-averse behavior show that our algorithm can learn risk-averse policy and consistently outperforms other existing methods.

</details>


### [527] [On the Tradeoffs of On-Device Generative Models in Federated Predictive Maintenance Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07860)
*Usevalad Milasheuski,Piero Baraldi,Enrico Zio,Stefano Savazzi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统比较了VAE、GAN和扩散模型在联邦预测性维护中的应用，提出了一种基于部分组件共享的联邦生成模型分类法，并发现部分联邦（尤其是解码器共享）在带宽受限和非IID场景下可优于完全联邦。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有联邦学习主要聚焦判别模型，而生成模型在时序异常检测（如预测性维护）中的联邦化研究不足，尤其缺乏对不同生成模型在部分联邦设置下性能与通信开销的系统比较。

Method: 对VAE、GAN和扩散模型在完全联邦和部分联邦（仅共享部分模型组件）两种设置下进行实验对比，提出形式化部分组件共享的分类法，并在真实工业时序数据集上评估模型效用、稳定性和可扩展性。

Result: 1) GAN在完全联邦下训练稳定性优于独立本地训练，但仍不如VAE和扩散模型。2) 扩散模型在部分联邦（尤其解码器共享）下，在带宽受限和非IID场景中表现优于完全联邦。3) 不同生成模型在效用、稳定性和可扩展性方面存在明显权衡。

Conclusion: 部分组件共享可作为联邦生成模型个性化的原则性机制，扩散模型的解码器共享策略在现实工业部署中具有实际优势。

Abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising paradigm for preserving client data ownership and control over distributed Internet of Things (IoT) environments. While discriminative models dominate most FL use cases, recent advances in generative models -- such as Variational Autoencoders (VAE), Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN), and Diffusion Models (DM) -- offer new opportunities for unsupervised anomaly detection in time series analysis, with relevant applications in predictive maintenance (PdM) in critical industrial infrastructures. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of VAEs, GANs, and DMs in the context of federated PdM. We analyze their performance and communication overhead under both full and partial federation setups, where only subsets of model components are shared. Building on this analysis, the paper proposes a novel taxonomy for federated generative models that formalizes partial component sharing as a principled mechanism for model personalization. Our experiments over a real-world time series dataset reveal distinct trade-offs in model utility, stability, and scalability, especially in heterogeneous and bandwidth-constrained FL settings. For the evaluated GAN-based configurations, full federation improves training stability relative to independent local training, although the model remains less robust than the VAE- and DDPM-based alternatives. For DMs, however, partial federation -- especially decoder sharing -- can outperform full federation in bandwidth-constrained, non-IID settings.

</details>


### [528] [ADKO: Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07863)
*Lucas Nerone Rillo,Zhanhong Jiang,Nastaran Saadati,Aditya Balu,Baskar Ganapathysubramanian,Chinmay Hegde,Soumik Sarkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种去中心化知识优化框架(ADKO)，让多个智能体通过知识令牌（压缩的摘要信息）协作进行黑箱优化，无需共享原始数据，并在理论上证明了亚线性遗憾的充要条件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有贝叶斯优化和去中心化学习在隐私保护、异构目标处理、通信效率等方面存在不足，尤其是在智能体间共享原始数据或模型参数会带来隐私风险。

Method: 各智能体维护私有GP代理模型，通过知识令牌（含方向信号、优势分数及可选的LM见解）进行通信；融合GP-UCB、并行贝叶斯优化、去中心化学习和LM引导发现；提出双重信息损失理论分析（令牌压缩损失+LM近似误差），并设计保真度感知的令牌剪枝策略。

Result: 在神经架构搜索和科学发现任务上，ADKO一致优于强基线方法，验证了理论的有效性。

Conclusion: ADKO在样本效率、隐私保护、异构目标处理和通信效率方面表现优异，提供了首个双重信息损失的正式理论分析，并给出了亚线性遗憾的充要条件。

Abstract: We present Agentic Decentralized Knowledge Optimization (ADKO), a framework for collaborative black-box optimization across autonomous agents that achieves sample efficiency, privacy preservation, heterogeneous-objective handling, and communication efficiency. Each agent maintains a private Gaussian Process (GP) surrogate trained on local data and communicates only through knowledge tokens-compact, lossy summaries containing directional signals, advantage scores, and optional language-model (LM) insights-without sharing raw data or model parameters. ADKO unifies GP-Upper Confidence Bound (GP-UCB), parallel Bayesian optimization, decentralized learning, and LM-guided discovery. We provide the first formal analysis of dual information loss: token compression, quantified via mutual-information-based fidelity, and LM approximation error, decomposed into bias and stochastic noise. Our main result shows cumulative regret decomposes into GP error, LM bias, LM noise, and compression loss, with necessary and sufficient conditions for sublinear regret. We also propose fidelity-aware token pruning to preserve high-information tokens under memory budget. Experiments on neural architecture search and scientific discovery validate the theory and show consistent improvements over strong baselines.

</details>


### [529] [Black-box model classification under the discriminative factorization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07878)
*Hayden Helm,Merrick Ohata,Carey Priebe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出判别式分解（discriminative factorization）框架，用于在黑盒模型分类中区分高质量与低质量查询集，证明随机分类概率随查询预算指数衰减，并通过实验验证了该框架的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有黑盒模型表征方法对查询集质量高度敏感，但缺乏理论指导如何选择高质量查询集，亟需一个能区分查询集优劣的理论框架。

Method: 提出判别式分解（discriminative factorization）框架，从理论上证明机会级分类概率随查询预算指数衰减，并通过三个审计任务估计分解参数来预测经验性能衰减率。

Result: 估计的分解参数能预测经验性能衰减率；基于判别式场选择的查询集能够复现Oracle查询集的经验排序。

Conclusion: 判别式分解为黑盒模型级分类中的查询集选择提供了理论依据和实用方法，有助于提升模型审计的可靠性和效率。

Abstract: Access to modern generative systems is often restricted to querying an API (the ``black-box" setting) and many properties of the system are unknown to the user at inference time. While recent work has shown that low-dimensional representations of models based on the relationship between their embedded responses to a set of queries are useful for inferring model-level properties, the quality of these representations is highly sensitive to the query set. We introduce the \emph{discriminative factorization} to distinguish between high- and low-quality query sets in the context of black-box model-level classification. Under this framework, the probability of chance-level classification decays exponentially in the query budget. On three auditing tasks, estimated factorization parameters predict the empirical performance decay rate. We conclude by showing that query sets selected using the estimated discriminative field reproduce the empirical ordering of oracle query sets.

</details>


### [530] [Adaptive Regularization for Sparsity Control in Bregman-Based Optimizers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07892)
*Ahmad Aloradi,Tim Roith,Emanuël A. P. Habets,Daniel Tenbrinck*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种自适应正则化方案，通过动态调整λ值来精确控制稀疏训练中的目标稀疏度，解决了Bregman优化器对λ参数敏感的问题，在说话人验证任务上实现了75%-99%的可靠稀疏度控制，且收敛更快、性能不逊于精心调参的非自适应基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏训练中，Bregman优化器（如LinBreg和AdaBreg）对正则化参数λ高度敏感，相同稀疏度下λ值可相差两个数量级，传统方法需昂贵的试错调参才能达到用户指定的稀疏度。

Method: 提出自适应正则化方案：根据模型当前稀疏度与目标稀疏度的差值动态更新λ值，从而直接控制稀疏度而非间接调节λ。

Result: 在VoxCeleb和CNCeleb数据集上使用ECAPA-TDNN和ResNet34进行自动说话人验证，自适应方法可靠地实现了75%-99%的目标稀疏度，收敛速度快于精心调参的非自适应基线，最终等错误率相当或更优，且继承了非自适应方案的OOD鲁棒性优势。

Conclusion: 自适应λ调节方案有效解决了Bregman优化器对参数敏感的问题，实现了精确的稀疏度控制，同时保持了收敛速度和性能优势。

Abstract: Sparse training reduces the memory and computational costs of deep neural networks. However, sparse optimization methods, e.g., those adding an $\ell_1$ penalty, often control sparsity only indirectly through a regularization parameter $λ$, whose mapping to the final sparsity rate is non-trivial. In our experiments, we found this parameter sensitivity to be particularly pronounced for Bregman-based optimizers. Specifically, the two variants LinBreg and AdaBreg reach the same sparsity at $λ$ values that differ by up to two orders of magnitude, requiring expensive trial-and-error sweeps to achieve a user-specified sparsity. To address this, we propose an adaptive regularization scheme that updates $λ$ based on the difference between the model's current sparsity and the target sparsity. We analyze the resulting algorithm and evaluate it on automatic speaker verification with ECAPA-TDNN and ResNet34 on VoxCeleb and CNCeleb. The proposed method reliably achieves sparsity targets ranging between 75% and 99%. It also converges faster than the oracle-tuned non-adaptive baseline during early training and matches or surpasses its final performance in equal error rate. We further show that the adaptive scheme inherits key properties from its non-adaptive counterpart, including improved out-of-distribution robustness over the dense baselines.

</details>


### [531] [Curvature Beyond Positivity: Greedy Guarantees for Arbitrary Submodular Functions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07902)
*Yixin Chen,Alan Kuhnle*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文将曲率（curvature）概念推广至所有子模函数（包括负值和非单调情形），并提出了带剪枝的贪心算法，首次在非单调、非负性假设之外给出了乘法近似保证。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统子模优化的贪心算法需要非负性来保证乘法近似比，但实际应用中的目标函数常因引入成本而出现负值，且现有工作仅针对可分解函数或通过部分单调性参数孤立处理这些问题，缺乏统一的理论框架。

Method: 将曲率参数从单调非负子模函数推广到任意子模函数，设计带剪枝的贪心算法；并基于多线性扩展方法将框架推广到一般组合约束。

Result: 对于非单调情形（曲率c_g在1到2.2之间），近似比严格优于已知最优统一比0.401；单调情形下恢复经典的(1-e^{-c_g})/c_g保证。实验验证了在带成本惩罚的实验设计、覆盖、特征选择和多新闻摘要选择上的有效性。

Conclusion: 通过单一经典概念（曲率）统一处理了子模函数中的非单调性和负值问题，拓展了子模优化的结构理论，并提供了首个超越单调非负假设的乘法近似保证。

Abstract: Submodular functions -- functions exhibiting diminishing returns -- are central to machine learning. When the objective is monotone and non-negative, the greedy algorithm achieves a tight $63\%$ approximation. But many practical objectives incorporate costs that make them negative on some inputs, and all existing multiplicative guarantees require non-negativity. Prior work handles negativity through additive bounds for the special class of decomposable functions and non-monotonicity through partial-monotonicity parameters, but these address each difficulty in isolation and neither extends the classical structural theory. We extend \emph{curvature} -- a parameter measuring how far a function deviates from linearity -- to all submodular functions, handling both non-monotonicity and negativity through a single classical concept. A greedy algorithm with pruning achieves a curvature-controlled multiplicative ratio for \emph{any} submodular function, including those taking negative values -- the first such guarantee beyond monotonicity and non-negativity. In the non-monotone regime $1 \le c_g < 2.2$, the bound strictly beats the best known uniform ratio of $0.401$ (for non-negative $f$), and it recovers the classical $(1-e^{-c_g})/c_g$ guarantee for monotone functions. A multilinear-extension variant extends the framework to general combinatorial constraints via multilinear relaxation. Experiments on cost-penalized experimental design, coverage, feature selection, and a curvature sweep on Multi-News passage selection support the theory.

</details>


### [532] [Tree SAE: Learning Hierarchical Feature Structures in Sparse Autoencoders](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07922)
*Tue M. Cao,Hoang X. Nhat,Raed Alharbi,My T. Thai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Tree SAE，通过结合激活覆盖和重建约束来学习稀疏自编码器中的层次特征结构，解决了现有方法仅依赖激活覆盖导致的误报问题，在多个基准测试中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有SAE学习方法仅依赖激活覆盖假设（子特征应在父特征激活时才激活）来识别层次关系，但这会产生大量误报，导致父概念与子概念在语义上不相关。

Method: 提出Tree SAE模型，在传统激活覆盖约束基础上引入重建约束，强制层次级别之间建立更深的函数链接，从而直接从特征集中学习层次结构。

Result: Tree SAE在学习层次对方面显著超越现有SAE方法，同时在多个关键基准测试中保持与最先进方法竞争的性能；并展示了在映射子特征子空间几何结构和揭示大语言模型中复杂层次概念结构的实用价值。

Conclusion: 激活覆盖条件不足以可靠识别层次关系，结合重建约束能有效解决误报问题；Tree SAE为理解和解释大语言模型内部层次化概念结构提供了有效工具。

Abstract: Learning hierarchical features in Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) is essential for capturing the structured nature of real-world data and mitigating issues like feature absorption or splitting. Existing works attempt to identify hierarchical relationships within independent feature sets by relying on activation coverage, the assumption that child feature should only activate when its parent feature activates. However, we demonstrate that this condition alone is insufficient; that is, it often produces false positives where parent and child concepts are semantically unrelated. To address this, we introduce a novel reconstruction condition that enforces a deeper functional link between hierarchical levels. By combining both activation and reconstruction constraints, we propose the Tree SAE, a model designed to learn hierarchical structures directly from within the feature set. Our results demonstrate that Tree SAEs significantly surpass the existing SAEs at learning hierarchical pairs while maintaining competitive performance to the state-of-the-art on several key benchmarks. Finally, we demonstrate the practical utility of our Tree SAE in mapping the geometry of child feature subspaces and uncovering the complex hierarchical concept structures encoded within large language models.

</details>


### [533] [INO-SGD: Addressing Utility Imbalance under Individualized Differential Privacy](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07930)
*Xiao Tian,Jue Fan,Rachael Hwee Ling Sim,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对个性化差分隐私（IDP）中存在的效用不平衡问题，提出INO-SGD算法，通过批次内数据自适应降权来改善高隐私需求数据的模型表现，并满足IDP约束。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有IDP算法存在严重的效用不平衡：高隐私需求的数据（如敏感疾病阳性病例）在训练中代表性不足，导致模型对同类数据的后续用户表现较差。

Method: 提出INO-SGD算法，在每个批次内策略性地降低部分数据的权重，以提升高隐私需求数据在所有迭代中的性能表现，同时满足个性化差分隐私约束。

Result: 实验验证了INO-SGD算法的可行性。

Conclusion: INO-SGD算法有效解决了IDP场景下的效用不平衡问题，且现有技术无法直接适配该场景。

Abstract: Differential privacy (DP) is widely employed in machine learning to protect confidential or sensitive training data from being revealed. As data owners gain greater control over their data due to personal data ownership, they are more likely to set their own privacy requirements, necessitating individualized DP (IDP) to fulfil such requests. In particular, owners of data from more sensitive subsets, such as positive cases of stigmatized diseases, likely set stronger privacy requirements, as leakage of such data could incur more serious societal impact. However, existing IDP algorithms induce a critical utility imbalance problem: Data from owners with stronger privacy requirements may be severely underrepresented in the trained model, resulting in poorer performance on similar data from subsequent users during deployment. In this paper, we analyze this problem and propose the INO-SGD algorithm, which strategically down-weights data within each batch to improve performance on the more private data across all iterations. Notably, our algorithm is specially designed to satisfy IDP, while existing techniques addressing utility imbalance neither satisfy IDP nor can be easily adapted to do so. Lastly, we demonstrate the empirical feasibility of our approach.

</details>


### [534] [Prototype Guided Post-pretraining for Single-Cell Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07938)
*Sachini Weerasekara,Natasha Darras,Sagar Kamarthi,Colles Price,Jacqueline Isaacs*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CellRefine是一种在单细胞基础模型预训练与微调之间插入的后预训练方法，通过引入标记基因集作为结构先验来优化细胞潜在嵌入空间，在多个生物计算任务中实现最高15%的性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单细胞预训练模型受限于细胞类型分布的长尾特性，且在基因表达数据的协变量偏移下泛化能力差，传统微调方法的效果存在瓶颈。

Method: 提出CellRefine框架，在预训练和微调之间引入后预训练阶段，使用包含标记基因集作为结构先验的多目标函数来优化细胞的潜在嵌入流形。

Result: 在多个计算生物学任务上，CellRefine持续提升下游任务性能，最高提升幅度达15%。

Conclusion: 通过在预训练与微调之间加入结构化先验引导的后预训练，能有效突破单细胞基础模型的性能瓶颈。

Abstract: Single-cell representation learning (SCRL) from gene expression data offers a way to uncover the complex regulatory logic underlying cellular function. Inspired by large language models in natural language modeling, several single-cell pretrained models have recently been proposed that treat genes as tokens and cells as sentences. However, these models are fundamentally limited by the long-tailed nature of cell-type distributions and struggle to generalize under covariate shifts in gene expression data. While fine-tuning is often used to mitigate these issues, we observe that performance remains bounded. To address this challenge, we introduce CellRefine, a post-pretraining method that operates between the pretraining and fine-tuning stages of a single-cell foundation model. CellRefine uses a multi-faceted objective that incorporates marker-gene sets as structural priors to guide post-pretraining and refine the latent embedding manifold of cells. Across multiple computational biology tasks, empirical results show that CellRefine consistently improves downstream performance, yielding gains up to 15%.

</details>


### [535] [Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics: Theory and Applications to Training-Free Guided Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07950)
*Atsushi Nitanda,Dake Bu,Yueming Lyu,Tanya Veeravalli*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了缓慢退火朗之万动力学（SALD）采样器及其变体VA-SALD，用于跟踪移动目标分布并通过时间减速近似终端目标，建立了非渐近收敛保证，并应用于无训练引导生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有朗之万动力学方法在跟踪移动目标分布时缺乏收敛保证，且无训练引导生成场景下存在引导偏差需要修正。

Method: 提出SALD框架，利用KL散度微分不等式建立非渐近收敛理论；进一步引入VA-SALD，显式结合预训练模型的边际分布并使用时间减速修正引导偏差。

Result: 建立了SALD的非渐近收敛保证，证明了减速通过中间目标收缩和路径复杂度改进跟踪效果；VA-SALD为扩散模型及其相关生成族提供了无训练引导生成的统一框架。

Conclusion: 该工作为基于得分的生成模型提供了一种具有理论保证的无训练引导生成方法，澄清了中间函数不等式和引导偏差的作用。

Abstract: We study Slowly Annealed Langevin Dynamics (SALD), a sampler for tracking a path of moving target distributions and approximating the terminal target through time slowdown. We establish non-asymptotic convergence guarantees via a KL differential inequality, showing that slowdown improves tracking through contraction of intermediate targets and the complexity of the path. Motivated by training-free guided generation with pretrained score-based generative models, we further introduce Velocity-Aware SALD (VA-SALD), which explicitly incorporates the underlying marginal distributions of the pretrained model and uses slowdown to correct the additional deviation induced by guidance. This yields a principled framework for training-free guided generation for diffusion-based and related generative model families, together with convergence guarantees that clarify the roles of intermediate functional inequalities and guidance bias. Code is available at https://github.com/anitan0925/sald.

</details>


### [536] [Convergent Stochastic Training of Attention and Understanding LoRA](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07959)
*Zhengkai Sun,Dibyakanti Kumar,Alejandro F Frangi,Anirbit Mukherjee,Mingfei Sun*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文通过统一框架严格证明了注意力层和浅层神经网络上的LoRA（低秩适应）在随机优化方法下的可训练性，证明了在温和正则化条件下，这两种模型的经验回归损失对应的吉布斯测度满足庞加莱不等式，进而可通过随机微分方程（类似SGD）最小化损失。研究结果不依赖于数据或架构规模的任何假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究虽广泛采用注意力机制和LoRA，但缺乏对这些模型在随机优化方法下可训练性的严格理论保证。本文旨在填补这一理论空白，建立注意力层和LoRA在随机梯度方法下的可训练性理论框架。

Method: 本文提出统一的理论框架：首先证明在温和正则化条件下，注意力层和浅层神经网络上LoRA的经验回归损失对应的吉布斯测度满足庞加莱不等式；进而利用近期研究成果，证明模拟SGD的随机微分方程能够最小化相应损失。

Result: 首次获得了注意力层和LoRA在随机优化方法下的可训练性理论结果，且该结果不依赖于数据分布或架构规模的任何假设。

Conclusion: 本文为注意力机制和LoRA的可训练性提供了严格的数学基础，证明了这些模型在随机梯度方法下理论上能够收敛到最优解，为相关应用提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: Transformers have revolutionized machine learning and deploying attention layers in the model is increasingly standard across a myriad of applications. Further, for large models, it is common to implement Low Rank Adaptation (LoRA), whereby a factorized parameterization of them is trained, to achieve a surprisingly beneficial accuracy-size trade-off. In this work, via a unified framework we rigorously establish trainability of such models under stochastic methods. We prove that for any mild regularization, the empirical regression loss on a attention layer and LoRA on a shallow neural net, both induce Poincaré inequality for the corresponding Gibbs' measure. Then it follows via invoking recent results that a certain SDE, which mimics the SGD, minimizes the corresponding losses. In both the cases, our first-of-its-kind results of trainability on attention and nets, do not rely on any assumptions on the data or the size of the architecture.

</details>


### [537] [Graph Representation Learning Augmented Model Manipulation on Federated Fine-Tuning of LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07961)
*Hanlin Cai,Kai Li,Houtianfu Wang,Haofan Dong,Yichen Li,Falko Dressler,Ozgur B. Akan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出AugMP（增强型模型操控）策略，针对联邦微调（FFT）的大语言模型（LLM），通过图表示学习和增广拉格朗日对偶优化生成恶意更新，在保持与良性更新统计/几何一致性的同时，大幅降低全局和本地LLM准确率（分别降低26%和22%），并绕过传统防御方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦微调（FFT）虽能在不共享原始数据的情况下协同微调大语言模型（LLM），但现有FFT框架容易受到模型操控攻击——恶意参与者上传篡改的模型更新，破坏聚合过程并降低全局LLM性能。现有防御方法尚不足以应对此类威胁。

Method: 1）设计图表示学习框架，捕捉良性LLM更新之间的特征相关性，用于指导恶意更新生成；2）基于增广拉格朗日对偶公式，开发迭代操控算法，优化恶意更新以嵌入对抗目标，同时保留类似良性更新的参数特征，兼顾攻击有效性与隐蔽性。

Result: 在多个LLM骨干网络上，AugMP在所有基线中实现最强操控性能：全局LLM准确率降低高达26%，本地LLM代理平均准确率降低高达22%。同时，AugMP与良性更新保持高度统计和几何一致性，能够规避基于距离和相似度的传统防御方法。

Conclusion: 提出的AugMP策略有效证明了FFT框架下LLM面临的严重模型操控威胁，现有防御方法难以抵御此类攻击，亟需开发更鲁棒的安全机制。

Abstract: Federated fine-tuning (FFT) has emerged as a privacy-preserving paradigm for collaboratively adapting large language models (LLMs). Built upon federated learning, FFT enables distributed agents to jointly refine a shared pretrained LLM by aggregating local LLM updates without sharing local raw data. However, FFT-based LLMs remain vulnerable to model manipulation threats, in which adversarial participants upload manipulated LLM updates that corrupt the aggregation process and degrade the performance of the global LLM. In this paper, we propose an Augmented Model maniPulation (AugMP) strategy against FFT-based LLMs. Specifically, we design a novel graph representation learning framework that captures feature correlations among benign LLM updates to guide the generation of malicious updates. To enhance manipulation effectiveness and stealthiness, we develop an iterative manipulation algorithm based on an augmented Lagrangian dual formulation. Through this formulation, malicious updates are optimized to embed adversarial objectives while preserving benign-like parameter characteristics. Experimental results across multiple LLM backbones demonstrate that the AugMP strategy achieves the strongest manipulation performance among all competing baselines, reducing the global LLM accuracy by up to 26% and degrading the average accuracy of local LLM agents by up to 22%. Meanwhile, AugMP maintains high statistical and geometric consistency with benign updates, enabling it to evade conventional distance- and similarity-based defense methods.

</details>


### [538] [FLAM: Evaluating Model Performance with Aggregatable Measures in Federated Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07962)
*Fabian Stricker,Jose A. Peregrina,David Bermbach,Christian Zirpins*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出FLAM方法，通过可聚合度量实现在联邦学习中无需全局测试集即可获得与集中式评估一致的结果，解决了传统加权平均聚合策略在非准确率指标上产生评估偏差的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 联邦学习中常见的加权平均聚合策略（基于各参与方本地样本数）在评估非准确率指标时，无法产生与集中式评估一致的结果，导致评估不一致，违背了联邦学习的目标。

Method: 提出FLAM（Federated Learning Aggregatable Measures），一种基于可聚合度量的性能评估方法，能够在无需全局测试数据集的前提下，产生与集中式评估相同的结果。

Result: FLAM方法在联邦学习环境下实现了与集中式评估一致的性能度量结果，解决了传统聚合策略在非准确率指标上的不一致问题。

Conclusion: FLAM为联邦学习提供了一种通用的、与集中式评估一致的性能评估方法，适用于各类评估指标，无需依赖全局测试数据集。

Abstract: Performance evaluation is essential for assessing the quality of machine learning (ML) models and guiding deployment decisions. In federated learning (FL), assessing the performance is challenging because data are distributed across participants. Consequently, the coordinator must rely on locally computed evaluation metrics and aggregate them to assess the global model. A key challenge is that common aggregation strategies, such as weighted averaging based on the local samples per participant, do not always produce the same results as centralized evaluation. Existing definitions of performance evaluation are largely tailored to accuracy and do not generalize to other metrics, leading to inconsistencies between participant-based and centralized evaluation. However, such discrepancies are inconsistent with the FL objective and lead to a wrong calculation of the metric.
  To address this issue, we examine the underlying reasons for these discrepancies and propose FLAM, a performance evaluation method based on aggregatable measures that yields the same results as centralized evaluation without the need for a global test dataset.

</details>


### [539] [Aggregation in conformal e-classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07963)
*Vladimir Vovk*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文实验研究了交叉共形e-预测器聚合方法及其改进版本，该方法能更简单地平衡预测效率、计算效率和有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 共形预测器的聚合需要在预测效率、计算效率和有效性之间取得平衡。共形e-预测器因其易于聚合且不牺牲有效性的优势而受到关注，但现有聚合方法（交叉共形e-预测）仍存在可简化和改进的空间。

Method: 论文对交叉共形e-预测（一种已有的共形e-预测器聚合方法）进行了实验研究，并提出了概念上更简单、更灵活的改进版本。

Result: 实验结果表明改进的聚合方法在保持有效性的同时，在预测和计算效率方面表现良好。

Conclusion: 共形e-预测器的聚合方法可以设计得更简单灵活，而不牺牲其有效性和效率优势。

Abstract: Aggregating conformal predictors is a standard way of balancing their predictive and computational efficiency while retaining their validity, at least approximately. An important advantage of conformal e-predictors is that they are easier to aggregate without sacrificing their validity. This paper studies experimentally cross-conformal e-prediction, which is an existing method of aggregating conformal e-predictors, and its modifications that are conceptually simpler and more flexible.

</details>


### [540] [When Diffusion Model Can Ignore Dimension: An Entropy-Based Theory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07969)
*Ahmad Aghapour,Erhan Bayraktar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文证明扩散模型的采样误差由潜在表示的香农熵控制，而非数据维度，因此在高维但具有紧凑潜在结构的数据上仍能保持高效。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散模型收敛理论无法解释为何在仅有少量反向步数时，高维数据采样仍保持高效——许多KL界依赖于环境维度，不能反映实际成功。

Method: 从信息论角度分析扩散采样器收敛性；对高斯混合目标证明离散化误差由潜在混合成分的香农熵控制；扩展至离散目标分布，复杂度由目标熵决定。

Result: 步数复杂度与潜在熵成线性关系，与数据二阶矩仅成对数关系；对于离散目标，复杂度取决于目标熵而非嵌入空间维度。

Conclusion: 扩散采样在数据分布具有紧凑潜在表示的高维空间中仍能保持高效，这解释了其在实际应用（如自然图像）中的成功。

Abstract: Diffusion models perform remarkably well on high-dimensional data such as images, often using only a modest number of reverse-time steps. Despite this practical success, existing convergence theory does not fully explain why such samplers remain efficient in high dimensions. Many prior KL guarantees bound the discretization error in terms of the ambient dimension, while other improved results replace this dependence using intrinsic-dimensional or geometric structure assumptions. In this work, we develop an alternative information-theoretic perspective on diffusion sampler convergence. We prove that, for Gaussian mixture targets, the discretization error is controlled by the Shannon entropy of the latent mixture component rather than by the ambient dimension. Consequently, the leading step complexity scales linearly with latent entropy and depends only logarithmically on the second moment of the data. Our analysis also extends to discrete target distributions, where the relevant complexity is the entropy of the target rather than the dimension of the embedding space. These results suggest that diffusion sampling can remain efficient in high-dimensional spaces when the data distribution admits a compact latent representation, as is widely believed to be the case for natural images.

</details>


### [541] [It Just Takes Two: Scaling Amortized Inference to Large Sets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07972)
*Antoine Wehenkel,Michael Kagan,Lukas Heinrich,Chris Pollard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种解耦表示学习与后验建模的策略，通过训练最大集合大小为2的均值池化Deep Set编码器，使其泛化到任意集合大小，推理头在预聚合嵌入上微调，使训练成本与部署集合大小N无关，在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成基准上匹配或超越基线且计算成本大幅降低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经后验估计在科学和应用领域广泛应用，但现有方法需要在部署集合大小下训练估计器，内存和计算成本随集合大小快速增长，难以应对大规模集合的联合推理需求。

Method: 提出解耦策略：(1) 训练一个均值池化Deep Set编码器，最大集合大小仅为2，使其学习可泛化到任意集合大小的表示；(2) 推理头在预聚合的嵌入上进行微调，使训练成本与部署集合大小N基本无关。

Result: 在标量、图像、多视图3D、分子和高维条件生成等多个基准上，在N达到数千的情况下，方法匹配或超越标准基线，同时计算成本大幅降低。

Conclusion: 该理论支撑的简单策略有效解决了神经后验估计中集合大小带来的计算瓶颈，实现了计算效率与推理性能的良好平衡。

Abstract: Neural posterior estimation has emerged as a powerful tool for amortized inference, with growing adoption across scientific and applied domains. In many of these applications, the conditioning variable is a set of observations whose elements depend not only on the target but also on unknown factors shared across the set. Optimal inference therefore requires treating the set jointly, which in turn requires training the estimator at the deployment set size -- a regime where memory and compute quickly become prohibitive. We introduce a simple, theoretically grounded strategy that decouples representation learning from posterior modeling. Our method trains a mean-pool Deep Set on sets of size at most two, producing an encoder that generalizes to arbitrary set sizes. The inference head is then finetuned on pre-aggregated embeddings, making training cost essentially independent of the deployment set size N. Across scalar, image, multi-view 3D, molecular, and high-dimensional conditional generation benchmarks with N in the thousands, our approach matches or outperforms standard baselines at a fraction of the compute.

</details>


### [542] [Self-Play Enhancement via Advantage-Weighted Refinement in Online Federated LLM Fine-Tuning with Real-Time Feedback](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07977)
*Seohyun Lee,Wenzhi Fang,Dong-Jun Han,Seyyedali Hosseinalipour,Christopher G. Brinton*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出SPEAR，一种面向联邦LLM微调的在线高效学习算法，通过反馈引导的自我对弈循环，利用置信度加权的非似然训练，无需昂贵的大规模生成和真实标注上下文，即可在资源受限设备上实现高效在线训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于反馈的自我改进方法受限于离线设置、需要特权真实上下文，且缺乏对联邦学习的考虑，难以在资源受限的边缘设备上高效运行。

Method: SPEAR采用反馈引导的自我对弈循环，为每个提示构建自然的对比对，分别进行：(i) 对正确补全的标准最大似然训练；(ii) 对错误补全尾词的置信度加权非似然训练，无需大规模生成和真实标注上下文。

Result: 在多个基准数据集上，SPEAR的性能优于现有最先进基线方法。

Conclusion: SPEAR证明了在线、资源高效的联邦LLM微调是可行的，为反馈驱动的自改进学习系统提供了新的方向。

Abstract: Recent works have advanced feedback-based learning systems, whereby a foundation model is able to intake incoming feedback (e.g., a user) to self-improve, creating a self-loop system of training. However, existing works are limited in needing to consider an offline setup to allow for such feedback-based methods, and are further limited in the need of requiring privileged ground-truth contexts for training. Moreover, there is limited consideration of federated learning (FL), which is particularly well-suited for incorporating external feedback across large networks of end users, for example, but requires methods to be efficient for training on resource-constrained edge devices. Therefore, we introduce SPEAR (Self-Play Enhancement via Advantage-Weighted Refinement), an efficient online learning algorithm for federated LLM fine-tuning. SPEAR utilizes a feedback-guided self-play loop to construct naturally contrastive pairs per prompt which are utilized to be trained on (i) standard maximum likelihood on correct completions and (ii) confidence-weighted unlikelihood on tail tokens of incorrect completions. Without the need of expensive group generations and ground-truth contexts for training (i.e., only partial, non-answer feedback), in contrast with existing works, SPEAR can be trained both online and in a resource-efficient manner. We validate SPEAR across various benchmark datasets, demonstrating its superior performance in comparison to state-of-the-art baselines. The implementation code is publicly available at https://github.com/lee3296/SPEAR.

</details>


### [543] [Susceptibilities and Patterning: A Primer on Linear Response in Bayesian Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07980)
*Chris Elliott,Daniel Murfet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该文介绍基于统计力学中磁化率理论（[2504.18274, 2601.12703]）的神经网络可解释性框架：将可观测量对数据扰动的后验期望导数定义为磁化率，并通过涨落-耗散定理等价于后验协方差。不同可观测量对应不同对象（影响矩阵、结构磁化率矩阵），后者是数据分布到结构坐标映射的雅可比矩阵，其伪逆可线性化解模式问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 为神经网络提供一种基于统计力学磁化率理论的形式化可解释性框架，将数据扰动、模型结构与后验推断统一起来。

Method: 定义可观测量φ对数据扰动的磁化率为后验期望的导数，利用涨落-耗散定理将其转化为后验协方差。通过选择不同φ（如逐样本损失或组件局域可观测量）得到影响矩阵和结构磁化率矩阵，后者本质上是数据分布到结构坐标映射的雅可比矩阵。

Result: 结构磁化率矩阵（乘以nβ因子）是数据分布到结构坐标映射的雅可比；其伪逆提供了[2601.13548]中模式问题的线性化解，即找到产生期望结构变化的数据扰动。

Conclusion: 从统计力学基础出发，系统阐述了磁化率理论、其经验估计量及其与损失景观几何的联系，为神经网络可解释性提供了统一的理论工具。

Abstract: These notes introduce the theory of susceptibilities as developed in [arXiv:2504.18274, arXiv:2601.12703] for interpreting neural networks. The susceptibility of an observable $φ$ to a data perturbation is defined as a derivative of a posterior expectation, which by the fluctuation--dissipation theorem equals a posterior covariance. Different choices of $φ$ yield different objects: per-sample losses give the influence matrix (the Bayesian influence function of [arXiv:2509.26544]), while component-localized observables give the structural susceptibility matrix that pairs model components with data patterns. The susceptibility matrix is (up to a factor of $nβ$) the Jacobian of the map from data distributions to structural coordinates; its pseudo-inverse provides a linearized solution to the patterning problem of [arXiv:2601.13548]: finding data perturbations that produce a desired structural change. We motivate the theory from its statistical-mechanical foundations, then give a detailed exposition of susceptibilities, their empirical estimators, and their connection to the geometry of the loss landscape.

</details>


### [544] [Where's the Plan? Locating Latent Planning in Language Models with Lightweight Mechanistic Interventions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07984)
*Nicole Ma,Nick Rui*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文研究了语言模型在生成过程中是否在内部表征中编码了未来句法约束（如押韵词），并通过线性探针和激活修补方法在多种规模的Qwen3、Gemma-3和Llama-3模型上进行了测试。结果表明，几乎所有模型都能在表征中解码未来押韵信息，但只有Gemma-3-27B在因果层面上依赖这种编码，并在第30层附近发生因果驱动从押韵词到行边界的转移，该转移由5个注意力头实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究语言模型在前向传播过程中是否形成了对未来结构性约束（如押韵）的内部表征，以及这些表征是否因果性地驱动生成过程，从而理解模型规划能力的内在机制。

Method: 以押韵对联完成为测试任务，使用线性探针（探测表征中是否编码未来押韵信息）和激活修补（测试这些信息是否因果性地影响生成）两种轻量方法，在Qwen3、Gemma-3、Llama-3三个系列共十余种规模的模型上进行实验。

Result: 所有模型中未来押韵信息均可从行边界处的表征中线性解码，且信号强度随模型规模增大而增强。但只有Gemma-3-27B在因果上依赖该编码，表现为在第30层附近因果驱动从押韵词转移到行边界。其他模型整个生成过程中始终依赖押韵词，行边界处因果效应近乎为零。

Conclusion: 不同模型在规划未来约束的方式上存在本质差异：大多数模型直接依赖已经生成的押韵词本身，而Gemma-3-27B则演化出了将因果驱动转移到行边界的机制，该机制由5个特定注意力头实现，可恢复约90%的押韵路由能力。

Abstract: We study planning site formation in language models -- where internal representations of structurally-constrained future tokens form during the forward pass, and whether they causally drive generation. Using rhyming-couplet completion as a clean test of forward-looking constraint, we apply two lightweight methods (linear probing and activation patching) across Qwen3, Gemma-3, and Llama-3 at more than ten scales. Probing shows that future-rhyme information is linearly decodable at the line boundary, with signal that strengthens with scale in all three families. Activation patching reveals that only Gemma-3-27B causally relies on this encoding, exhibiting a handoff in which the causal driver migrates from the rhyme word to the line boundary around layer 30. Every other model we test conditions on the rhyme word throughout generation, with near-zero causal effect at the line boundary despite strong probe signal. We localize the Gemma-3-27B handoff to five attention heads through two-stage path patching that recover ~90% of the rhyme-routing capacity at the newline.

</details>


### [545] [Bayesian Sensitivity of Causal Inference Estimators under Evidence-Based Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07993)
*Nikita Dhawan,Daniel Shen,Leonardo Cotta,Chris J. Maddison*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出贝叶斯敏感性值（BSV）框架，通过结合先验知识来替代传统最坏情况敏感性分析，避免因假设不切实际而导致结论无信息或与先验矛盾的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有敏感性分析框架采用最坏情况变化评估结论稳健性，但这种方法往往导致结论无信息量，甚至与先验知识相矛盾。

Method: 推广s-value框架以估计三种常见因果推断假设的敏感性，并提出贝叶斯敏感性值（BSV），利用基于真实世界证据构建的先验分布计算期望敏感性，并通过蒙特卡洛近似进行估计。

Result: 实证发现最坏情况下的敏感性结论可能依赖于不切实际的数据生成过程变化；BSV框架能够提供更符合先验知识的敏感性评估。

Conclusion: BSV框架通过在敏感性分析中融入先验知识，克服了传统最坏情况方法的局限性，为因果推断提供更信息丰富且合理的稳健性评估。

Abstract: Causal inference, especially in observational studies, relies on untestable assumptions about the true data-generating process. Sensitivity analysis helps us determine how robust our conclusions are when we alter these underlying assumptions. Existing frameworks for sensitivity analysis are concerned with worst-case changes in assumptions. In this work, we argue that using such pessimistic criteria can often become uninformative or lead to conclusions contradicting our prior knowledge about the world. To demonstrate this claim, we generalize the recent s-value framework (Gupta & Rothenhäusler, 2023) to estimate the sensitivity of three different common assumptions in causal inference. Empirically, we find that, indeed, worst-case conclusions about sensitivity can rely on unrealistic changes in the data-generating process. To overcome this, we extend the s-value framework with a new sensitivity analysis criterion: Bayesian Sensitivity Value (BSV), which computes the expected sensitivity of an estimate to assumption violations under priors constructed from real-world evidence. We use Monte Carlo approximations to estimate this quantity and illustrate its applicability in an observational study on the effect of diabetes treatments on weight loss.

</details>


### [546] [Graph-Structured Hyperdimensional Computing for Data-Efficient and Explainable Process-Structure-Property Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.07999)
*Jingzhan Ge,Ajeeth Vellore,Ajinkya Palwe,Ahsan Khan,David Gorsich,Matthew P. Castanier,SeungYeon Kang,Farhad Imani*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出 PSP-HDC，一种基于图结构超维度计算（HDC）的框架，用于在数据稀疏、异构且交互主导的3D微纳制造场景中进行过程-结构-性能（PSP）关系预测。它通过将PSP依赖图编码为内部先验，结合可训练超向量编码器与关联记忆检索，实现高精度预测与内在可解释性。在3D平台片电阻预测任务上，准确率达0.910±0.077，优于强基线方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多光子光还原制造中，3D微结构的PSP预测面临数据稀疏、异构、交互主导的难题。传统特征向量模型统计上欠定，易产生虚假相关、跨域泛化差且解释不稳定；而机理模型依赖校准好的子模型，在工艺开发初期难以获得。

Method: 提出PSP-HDC框架：1）将有向PSP依赖图编码为内部先验；2）可训练的标量-超向量编码器学习参数特定嵌入；3）通过图对齐的捆绑与绑定操作沿有向PSP依赖组合样本表示；4）以类原型关联记忆检索进行预测；5）同一原型记忆同时支持决策与内在归因解释。

Result: 在3D平台片电阻相预测任务上，1000次随机拆分准确率0.910±0.077，过程折交叉泛化准确率0.896，均优于强基线方法。

Conclusion: PSP-HDC通过图结构HDC范式有效应对稀疏异构数据下的PSP预测挑战，在准确性与内在可解释性上均表现出优势，为微纳制造过程的数据驱动建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: Multiphoton photoreduction enables high-fidelity fabrication of complex 3D microstructures, yet reliable process-structure-property (PSP) prediction remains difficult because the available data are sparse, heterogeneous, and interaction-dominated. In this regime, conventional feature-vector models are statistically underdetermined, making them prone to spurious correlations, poor regime transfer, and unstable post hoc explanations, whereas mechanistic pipelines depend on calibrated submodels that are rarely available during early process development. We present PSP-HDC, a graph-structured hyperdimensional computing framework that encodes a directed PSP graph as an internal prior for representation, inference, and explanation. A trainable scalar-to-hypervector encoder learns parameter-specific embeddings on a fixed hyperdimensional basis to accommodate heterogeneous scales and noise. Sample representations are then composed through graph-aligned binding and bundling along directed PSP dependencies, and prediction is performed by associative-memory retrieval against class prototypes. Because the same prototype memories support both decision making and attribution, PSP-HDC provides intrinsic explanations at the parameter, group, and within-group levels, while memory alignment and separation quantify prototype formation during training. On sheet-resistance regime prediction for the 3D platform, PSP-HDC achieves an accuracy of 0.910 +/- 0.077 over 1000 random splits and 0.896 under process-fold generalization, outperforming strong baselines.

</details>


### [547] [STEPS: A Temporal Smooth Error Propagation Solver on the Manifolds for Test-Time Adaptation in Time Series Forecasting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08005)
*Jiaqi Liu,Yifan Ouyang,Zhifei Song,Sim Kuan Goh,Ashwaq Qasem*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: STEPS通过将测试时自适应重新建模为时间流形上的Dirichlet边界值问题，利用平滑有界的误差传播校正，在时间序列预测中实现了显著的性能提升，MSE相对降低26.82%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测的测试时自适应方法在面对短时、时序相关且有噪声的适应信号时，存在可识别性弱、误差累积以及长程预测不稳定等问题。

Method: 将TTA重新表述为时间流形上的Dirichlet边界值问题：将观测前缀误差作为未来误差场的边界条件；局部求解器在时间平滑性下传播前缀误差，全局求解器检索稳定的跨窗口误差记忆，时空流形融合（SMF）整合两者得到最终校正。

Result: 在6个标准基准和4个冻结骨干网络上，MSE相对降低26.82%，超过最强TTA基线12.77%。稀疏前缀和污染测试验证了其鲁棒性。

Conclusion: STEPS通过将误差传播建模为时间流形上的平滑有界校正问题，有效解决了现有TTA方法在时序预测中的误差累积和不稳定问题，具有显著的性能优势和鲁棒性。

Abstract: Test-Time Adaptation (TTA) aims to improve time series forecasting under distribution shifts by using limited observations revealed during inference. However, forecasting TTA must operate in a source-free online setting, where the adaptation signal is short, temporally correlated, and potentially noisy. Existing methods can therefore suffer from weak identifiability, error accumulation, and unstable long-horizon corrections when the revealed prefix is sparse or contaminated. To address these issues, we propose STEPS, a Smooth Temporal Error Propagation Solver for TTA in time-series forecasting. STEPS reformulates forecasting TTA as a Dirichlet Boundary Value Problem on a temporal manifold, where the revealed prefix error serves as the boundary condition for the unknown future error field. Then, STEPS solves a smooth and bounded correction field in prediction space: a Local Solver propagates prefix errors under temporal smoothness, a Global Solver retrieves stable cross-window error memory and Spatiotemporal Manifold Fusion (SMF) integrates both solutions into the final correction. Across six standard benchmarks and four frozen backbones, STEPS achieves an average relative MSE reduction of 26.82% over the zero-shot backbone, exceeding the strongest compared TTA baseline by 12.77%. Additional sparse prefix and contamination tests confirm the robustness of STEPS under limited and noisy prefixes.

</details>


### [548] [Interpreting Reinforcement Learning Agents with Susceptibilities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08007)
*Chris Elliott,Einar Urdshals,David Quarel,Daniel Murfet*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文将"敏感性"（susceptibilities）方法从神经网络可解释性推广到深度强化学习中的后悔（regret）设置，通过在简单网格世界模型中验证其揭示参数空间内部学习特征的能力，并讨论了该方法向RLHF后训练的扩展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以检测深度强化学习模型在参数空间中的内部发展特征，仅通过学习策略的表面变化不足以理解模型内部机制的演化。

Method: 将神经网络的敏感性方法推广到深度强化学习中的后悔（regret）框架，在网格世界模型中进行实验，并通过激活引导（activation-steering）方法进行验证。

Result: 敏感性方法能够揭示模型在参数空间中的内部发展特征，这些特征是仅通过研究学习策略无法检测到的，并通过激活引导实验得到验证。

Conclusion: 敏感性方法为深度强化学习模型可解释性提供了新视角，有望扩展到RLHF后训练等更复杂的对齐场景中。

Abstract: Susceptibilities are a technique for neural network interpretability that studies the response of posterior expectation values of observables to perturbations of the loss. We generalize this construction to the setting of the regret in deep reinforcement learning and investigate the utility of susceptibilities in a simple gridworld model that nevertheless exhibits non-trivial stagewise development. We argue that susceptibilities reveal internal features of the development of the model in parameter space that one cannot detect purely by studying the development of the learned policy. We validate these results with activation-steering, and discuss the framework's extension to RLHF post-training.

</details>


### [549] [Adaptive Domain Decomposition Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Traffic State Estimation with Sparse Sensor Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08028)
*Eunhan Ka,Ludovic Leclercq,Satish V. Ukkusuri*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出ADD-PINN，一种两阶段残差引导的自适应域分解物理信息神经网络框架，用于基于LWR模型的速度场离线重建。在稀疏固定传感器设置下，ADD-PINN相比PINN和XPINN等基线获得了更低的相对L2误差，训练速度比XPINN快2.4倍，并在NGSIM实验中通过激波指示器成功抑制了不必要的域分解。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PINN在基于LWR模型的交通状态估计中会过度平滑激波，导致对稀疏固定传感器数据的重建效果不佳。

Method: 两阶段残差引导框架：先训练粗粒度全局PINN，利用其空间残差分布设置子域边界并初始化子网络；通过数据驱动的激波指示器决定是否启用单域回退。

Result: 在25个配置中的18个和15个稀疏传感案例中的14个取得最低相对L2误差；训练速度比XPINN快2.4倍；NGSIM中激波指示器在所有50次运行中抑制了分解。

Conclusion: 残差引导的空间域分解是稀疏固定传感器下离线重建的有效PINN设计方案，尤其适用于存在局部过渡区域的情景。

Abstract: Traffic state estimation from sparse fixed sensors is challenging because physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) tend to over-smooth the shockwaves admitted by the Lighthill-Whitham-Richards (LWR) model. This study proposes Adaptive Domain Decomposition Physics-Informed Neural Networks (ADD-PINN), a two-stage residual-guided framework for LWR-based offline speed-field reconstruction. A coarse global PINN is first trained; its spatial residual profile is then used to place subdomain boundaries and initialize child subnetworks in a decomposition-enabled mode, while a data-driven shock indicator can retain a single-domain fallback when localized evidence of transition is weak. The primary offline I-24 MOTION evaluation spans five days, five sensor configurations, and ten seeds per configuration, yielding 1,500 runs in total. Against neural and physics-informed baselines, ADD-PINN attains the lowest relative L2 error in 18 of 25 configurations and in 14 of 15 sparse-sensing cases, while training 2.4 times faster than the extended PINN (XPINN) baseline. An ablation study supports spatial-only decomposition as an effective default for fixed-sensor traffic reconstruction in the evaluated settings. Supplementary Next Generation Simulation (NGSIM) experiments serve as a negative control: the shock indicator suppresses decomposition in all 50 runs, and the default single-domain fallback ranks first across all sensor configurations. These results support residual-guided spatial decomposition as an effective PINN-family design for offline reconstruction when sparse fixed sensing coincides with localized transition regions.

</details>


### [550] [Don't Get Your Kroneckers in a Twist: Gaussian Processes on High-Dimensional Incomplete Grids](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08036)
*Mads Greisen Højlund,August Smart Lykke-Møller,Henry Moss,Ove Christiansen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CUTS-GPR 提出一种结合加法核与不完全网格的高斯过程回归方法，实现核矩阵-向量积的近线性/线性复杂度（数据量N）及低阶多项式复杂度（维度D），支持数十亿数据点、数千维度的贝叶斯建模，并在计算化学高维势能面任务中验证有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统高斯过程回归计算复杂度为O(N³)，难以处理高维大数据场景（如计算化学中的高维势能面建模），亟需可扩展的精确GPR方法。

Method: 1) 采用加法核（Additive Kernel）分解高维结构；2) 引入不完全网格（Incomplete Grid）近似；3) 利用核矩阵的结构化特性，设计极快的矩阵-向量乘积算法，使复杂度降至近线性/线性（N维度）和低阶多项式（D维度）。

Result: 1) 支持数十亿数据点与数千维度的基准测试；2) 在N=447,265、D=24时数小时内完成完整GPR计算（含超参数优化）；3) 成功实现高维势能面的贝叶斯建模。

Conclusion: CUTS-GPR通过结构化核与网格技巧突破了传统GPR的扩展瓶颈，为高维大数据场景提供了可行的精确贝叶斯推断方案，尤其适用于计算化学等领域的复杂建模问题。

Abstract: We introduce CUTS-GPR, a new method for performing numerically exact Gaussian process regression (GPR) in high-dimensional settings. The key component of CUTS-GPR is an extremely fast kernel matrix-vector product, which exhibits near-linear or even linear scaling with the amount of training data, $N$, and low-order polynomial scaling with dimensionality, $D$. This is obtained by combining an additive kernel with an incomplete grid and exploiting the resulting structure of the kernel matrix. We demonstrate the scalability of the matrix-vector product by running benchmarks with billions of data points and thousands of dimensions. Full GPR calculations, including hyperparameter optimization, are completed in a matter of hours for $N = 447 265$ and $D = 24$. We demonstrate that our CUTS-GPR enables Bayesian modeling of high-dimensional potential energy surfaces - a longstanding challenge in computational chemistry.

</details>


### [551] [Beyond Pairs: Your Language Model is Secretly Optimizing a Preference Graph](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08037)
*Ning Liu,Chuanneng Sun,Kristina Klinkner,Shervin Malmasi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GraphDPO通过将偏好数据建模为有向无环图，利用排序信息进行语言模型对齐，优于传统成对DPO方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的DPO方法仅利用成对偏好比较，无法充分利用多轮采样数据中蕴含的丰富偏好结构（如传递性），导致监督信号冗余或冲突，优化不稳定。

Method: 提出GraphDPO，将多个响应按排名构建有向无环偏好图，设计基于Plackett-Luce的图结构目标函数，通过邻域聚合实现传递性约束；引入等价类分层处理离散信号，保证线性复杂度，并可选地锚定真实解以稳定训练。

Result: 在推理和程序合成任务上，GraphDPO显著优于成对DPO及其他列表式对齐方法。

Conclusion: 图结构偏好建模是一种可扩展且鲁棒的对齐范式，能有效利用多响应排序信息，替代传统成对或列表式方法。

Abstract: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) aligns language models using pairwise preference comparisons, offering a simple and effective alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) from human feedback. However, in many practical settings, training data consists of multiple rollouts per prompt, inducing rich preference structure that pairwise DPO fails to exploit. Collapsing such data into independent pairs discards transitivity, introduces redundant or conflicting supervision, and can lead to unstable optimization. We propose Graph Direct Preference Optimization (GraphDPO), a principled generalization of DPO that operates over directed acyclic preference graphs induced by rollout rankings. GraphDPO encodes dominance relations as edges and optimizes a graph-structured Plackett--Luce-inspired objective that aggregates supervision over graph neighborhoods, enforcing transitivity while recovering standard DPO as a special case. To handle discrete or sparse signals, we introduce an equivalence-class construction where responses with identical preferences form graph layers, and intra-layer edges contribute zero loss, preventing spurious gradients. Despite leveraging full graph structure, GraphDPO maintains linear per-prompt complexity via efficient log-sum-exp aggregation. We further incorporate optional ground-truth anchoring by inserting verified solutions as dominant nodes and applying an annealed schedule that stabilizes early training while gradually relaxing oracle supervision. Experiments on reasoning and program synthesis tasks demonstrate superior performance, suggesting that graph-structured preference modeling is a scalable and robust alternative to pairwise and listwise alignment objectives.

</details>


### [552] [Reinforcement Learning for Exponential Utility: Algorithms and Convergence in Discounted MDPs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.08053)
*Gugan Thoppe,L. A. Prashanth,Ankur Naskar,Sanjay Bhat*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文针对风险厌恶的指数效用优化问题，提出了两种基于Q-learning的强化学习算法（双时间尺度和单时间尺度），并分别证明了它们的收敛性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 指数效用优化的折扣MDP中缺乏原则性的基于价值的强化学习算法。
